Name: Tata Group
Description:
Founded by Jamsetji Tata in 1868, the Tata group is a global enterprise headquartered in India. The group operates in more than 100 countries across six continents with a mission 'To improve the quality of life of the communities we serve globally, through long-term stakeholder value creation based on Leadership with Trust'.

Sixty-six per cent of the equity of Tata Sons, the promoter holding company, is held by philanthropic trusts, thereby returning wealth to society. The Tata name has been respected in India for 150 years for its adherence to strong values and business ethics.

The companies of the Tata group employ the best and finest, strengthened by a culture of ethics and integrity. Today we stand strong at 702,454 employees.

Name: Larsen & Toubro
Description:
Larsen & Toubro is an Indian multinational engaged in EPC Projects, Hi-Tech Manufacturing and Services. It operates in over 50 countries worldwide. 

A strong, customer-focused approach and the constant quest for top-class quality have enabled L&T to attain and sustain leadership in its major lines of business for over eight decades.

Corporate Sustainability:
L&T was the first company in India in the engineering & construction space to publicly disclose its sustainability performance.  

Our Integrated Report, which tracks the sustainability performance of the organisation and its inter-connectedness with the financial performance, showcases how L&T is adding value to its stakeholders.

Our technological capabilities enable us to reach various nodes and build a network spanning products, processes, employees, environment and community. This enables a more holistic consideration of actions, outcomes and impact, which in turn accelerates and amplifies returns across all capitals - Financial, Natural, Human, Manufacturing, Intellectual and Social & Relationship.

Name: Aditya Birla Group
Description:
With a rich legacy spanning over 165 years,  Aditya Birla Group is a story of enriching lives, pioneering change, and leaving an indelible mark globally. 

Our success aligns with our philosophy of being A Force for Good. 

Operating in over 41 countries, we’re a powerhouse of innovation and customer-centricity. Our businesses have flourished into global leaders in key industries such as aluminium rolling, viscose staple fibre, carbon black, cement, financial services, fashion, hospitality, jewellery, entertainment and more.

Today, we are a US$ 65Bn global conglomerate with a market cap of over US$ 100Bn*. 

Some of our recent achievements:

Our journey of expansion continues with significant milestones achieved in 2024. We have ventured into branded retail jewellery with Indriya.
Our recent foray into paints sector, under the brand name, Birla Opus, demonstrates our commitment to exploring new horizons across 300 towns. With our expansion into the premium casual dining segment through our new-age hospitality arm we are celebrating the power of global cuisines in bringing people together. Birla Pivot, our B2B e-commerce platform, a major extension to the building materials sector, serving as a comprehensive hub for all building material needs.

With unwavering dedication, we endeavour to uplift communities socially and economically, enveloping them in the compassionate embrace of our commitment. Our efforts extend to 9,000 villages, impacting 11 million people annually. This includes providing skill based training for 100,000 individuals and immunizing with 100 million polio vaccinations.

Learn more about who we are: www.adityabirla.com

*End of Q3FY25 
 
Follow us on:
Twitter: @AdityaBirlaGrp 
Linkedin : @aditya-birla-group
Instagram: @AdityaBirlaGrp
YouTube: adityabirlagroup

Name: Mahindra Group
Description:
Many Companies. One Mahindra.

Founded in 1945, the Mahindra Group is one of the largest and most admired multinational federations of companies, with 324,000+ employees across 100+ countries. It enjoys a leadership position in farm equipment, utility vehicles, information technology, and financial services in India and is the world’s largest tractor company by volume. The Group operates in 20+ industries, including renewable energy, agriculture, logistics, hospitality, and real estate, with a turnover of over US $25 billion.

The Mahindra Group has a clear focus on leading ESG globally, enabling rural prosperity and enhancing urban living, with a goal to drive positive change in the lives of communities and stakeholders to enable them to Rise. 

Learn more about Mahindra on www.mahindra.com
X and Facebook: @MahindraRise
WhatsApp Channel: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VbB2EYe7tkjBJ14fH518
For updates subscribe to https://www.mahindra.com/news-room

Name: Saeed & Mohammed Al Naboodah Group
Description: Founded in 1958 by two brothers, the Saeed & Mohammed Al Naboodah Group is among the most well-respected family company names in the UAE. The management of the Group’s operating divisions is undertaken by Al Naboodah Group Enterprises (ANGE). Employing over 4,000 people, the ANGE core business focus covers civil engineering, building and MEP as well as a diverse portfolio of global brands in the transportation, travel, electrical, logistics and agriculture. The Al Naboodah brand is renowned for the delivery of world-class projects and services within demanding schedules and exceeding the quality demanded by its clients.

Name: Saeed & Mohammed Al Naboodah Group
Description: Founded in 1958 by two brothers, the Saeed & Mohammed Al Naboodah Group is among the most well-respected family company names in the UAE. Employing over 4,000 people, the ANGE core business focus covers civil engineering, building and MEP as well as a diverse portfolio of global brands in the transportation, travel, electrical, logistics and agriculture. The Al Naboodah brand is renowned for the delivery of world-class projects and services within demanding schedules and exceeding the quality demanded by its clients.

Name: Welspun World
Description:
Welspun is one of India’s fastest-growing global conglomerates valued at US$ 5 billion. We have businesses across categories like Line Pipes, Home Textiles, Infrastructure, Warehousing, Oil and Gas, Steel, Advanced Textiles, and Flooring Solutions.  While we are headquartered in Mumbai, we’ve established leadership in the Line Pipes and Home Textiles sectors, across the world. With 30,000+ employees and over 100,000 shareholders, we have a foothold in over 50 countries. Our manufacturing facilities are strategically located in India, the USA, and Saudi Arabia, and our clients include most Fortune 500 companies. We pride ourselves on our customer centricity and prioritize innovation, digital fluency, and engineering excellence across every aspect of our business. We’re serious about our three Es–Environment, Education and Empowerment–-and have numerous initiatives in place that drive sustained and systematic change at the grassroots level. 

At Welspun, we acknowledge that our employees are the backbone and we work towards curating robust learning and education opportunities so that our teams thrive with us. We hire more than 10,000 new members every year and take responsibility for providing every Welspunite a nurturing environment, competitive compensation, merit-based career progression, and opportunities to enhance their personal and professional growth. We’ve built a culture that recognizes and promotes talent, transparency, and inclusion and we work hard to ensure we live by our values.

From the communities, we touch to the entrepreneurs we partner with, we’re determined that as Welspun, we create a positive impact in every interaction.

Join us and be a proud and happy Welspunite.

Name: Piramal Group
Description:
- Offices in over 30 countries
- Brand presence in over 100 global markets
- Team of over 10,000 people from 21 diverse nationalities

Piramal Group is a global business conglomerate with diverse interests in Pharma, Financial Services, and Real Estate. The Group has offices in over 30 countries and a global brand presence in more than 100 markets.

Led by Mr Ajay Piramal, the Chairman, Piramal Group is a torchbearer of trusteeship and responsible business ethos. Based on the philosophy of ‘Doing Well and Doing Good’, the Group continues to create long-term value for its stakeholders and the community at large.

In the three decades of its existence, Piramal Group has pursued a twin strategy of both organic and inorganic growth.

Driven by its core values, Piramal Group steadfastly pursues inclusive growth, while adhering to ethical and values-driven practices.

Piramal Foundation, the philanthropic arm of the Piramal Group develops innovative solutions to resolve issues that are critical roadblocks towards unlocking India’s economic potential. Its sustainable development programmes in healthcare & nutrition, education and safe drinking water across 25 Indian states, largely in partnership with the central and state governments have impacted over 100 Million lives till date.

Each social initiative nurtured by the Piramal Foundation addresses one of the three focus areas :
Piramal Swasthya: Primary Healthcare and Nutrition
Piramal School of Leadership: Education Leadership and Women & Youth Empowerment
Piramal Sarvajal: Access to Safe Drinking Water

Name: BEXIMCO Group
Description:
The BEXIMCO Group is the largest private-sector group in Bangladesh. BEXIMCO was founded in the 1970s by two brothers – Ahmed Sohail Fasihur Rahman and Salman Fazlur Rahman. Since the early days, the Group has evolved from being primarily a commodities trading company to a leading, diversified group with a presence in industry sectors that account for nearly 75% of Bangladesh's GDP. BEXIMCO's corporate mission is "Taking Bangladesh to the world".

As BEXIMCO has grown over the years, the flagship platform now has operations and investments across a wide range of industries including textiles, pharmaceuticals, PPE, ceramics, real estate development, construction, trading, marine food, information and communication technologies, media, DTH, financial services, and energy. The Group sells its products and services in the domestic Bangladesh market as well as international markets. BEXIMCO is the largest employer in the private sector in Bangladesh and employs over 70,000 people worldwide.

The BEXIMCO name has now become one of the most recognizable brand names in Bangladesh. It is synonymous with innovation, trust, and quality. The Group consists of four publicly traded and seventeen privately held companies. The publicly traded companies are Bangladesh Export Import Company Limited, Beximco Pharmaceuticals Limited, Shinepukur Ceramics Limited, and Beximco Synthetics Limited. The total revenue of the group stands in excess of a Billion US Dollars per year.

In recent times BEXIMCO has launched its newest Vertical, the BEXIMCO PPE Division which is responsible for producing the highest grade of internationally certified PPE products for medical use.

BEXIMCO intends to leverage its market position and global scale, further diversify operations into highly profitable sectors, capitalize on the domestic growth opportunity and selectively pursue international opportunities going forward.

Name: Federal Ministry for Economic Affairs and Energy
Description: The major trends of the 21st century, notably globalisation, digitisation, demographic change, recent developments within the EU, and climate change all represent major challenges for German business to tackle. If we are to successfully address these issues, we need to develop our social market economy into a social-ecological market economy.  This is the over-arching task for the Federal Ministry for Economic Affairs and Climate Action.

Name: Raymond Limited
Description:
Raymond Group is a hundred year business group that has grown with India and stayed true to one idea. When you promise quality, you earn trust. When you repeat that every day, you build excellence. This is The Raymond Way.

Today, the group brings this ethos to its focused businesses across lifestyle, real estate, denim, precision engineering and aerospace through Raymond Lifestyle, Raymond Realty, Raymond UCO Denim, JK Maini Precision Technology and JK Maini Global Aerospace. Each business works in its own market, yet they are bound by the same discipline of craft, integrity, and long term thinking.

As Raymond Group enters its centenary year, the ambition is clear. Deepen its strengths. Back its people and leaders. Create value that endures across cycles and generations. The Raymond Way guides every choice the group makes, in India and across the world.

Name: Corporación Multi Inversiones
Description: Somos una corporación familiar multilatina con 105 años generando valor económico, social y ambiental en las comunidades donde operamos, ofreciendo excelencia y calidad en nuestros productos, servicios y proyectos. Integrada por más de 54 mil colaboradores, con presencia en 15 países, muchos de ellos ubicados en la región de Latinoamérica y Estados Unidos.

Name: Al Habtoor Group
Description:
More than four decades since inception, the Al Habtoor Group is now recognised globally as a major UAE conglomerate with a diversified business, with strategic assets in the hotel, automotive, real estate, education and publishing sectors.
The highly qualified, experienced and professional multi-national team, consisting of thousands of employees, is expected to continue to grow in line with planned expansion.

Habtoor Hotels - The Group owns and operates several of Dubai’s top class hotels under its banner, including the Habtoor Grand Resort & Spa and the latest addition to the portfolio – the Waldorf Astoria Dubai Palm Jumeirah, operated by Hilton Worldwide. Metropolitan Catering Services provides business and group functions across the UAE with high quality catering services. www.habtoorhotels.com 

Projects under development - Al Habtoor City and the Al Habtoor Polo Resort & Club.

Al Habtoor Motors – Established in 1983, the division has become one of the leading automobile distributors in the UAE. Car brands under its banner include Mitsubishi Motors, Chery, JAC, Fuso, Al Habtoor Tires and Batteries, Global Autoparts, SpeedFit, The CarZone, as well as premium marques - Bentley, McLaren and Bugatti. www.habtoormotors.com 

Diamondlease - An ISO 9001:2000 certified company, Diamondlease operates a fleet of over 8,000 dealer-maintained vehicles and operates a network of 17 branches serving its customers across the UAE. www.diamondlease.com 

Emirates International Schools - The Group operates two of Dubai’s leading British curriculum schools: Emirates International School-Jumeirah and Emirates International School-Meadows. www.eischools.ae 

Al Habtoor Real Estate - Property portfolio includes: The Al Habtoor Business Tower at Dubai Marina; Habtoor House Two in Al Barsha; Al Wasl Village - 26 villas; Four palatial VIP villas in Umm Suqeim; and the Al Habtoor Tower at Marina Walk. 

Al Habtoor Publishing - www.alshindagah.com

Name: Gargash Group
Description:
Established in 1918, Gargash Group is one of the UAE’s leading business enterprises comprising of internationally renowned brands across four verticals: automotive, real estate, financial services, and new ventures. It is recognized for its global expertise and local market knowledge, enabling the group to deliver integrated, innovative and competitive services. The group has introduced leading global automotive brands into the UAE, including Mercedes-Benz, Alfa Romeo, GAC MOTOR, Ankai, SIXT Rent a Car, SIXT Leasing & SIXT Limousine. 

Since 1998, the group’s financial services arm, Daman Investments, has provided advisory, asset management, brokerage, and wealth management services in the UAE. Gargash Real Estate develops and manages premium residential, commercial and industrial properties across the country. The group’s brands also include several leading restaurants and hotels in some of Dubai’s most popular destinations.

Name: CarDekho Group
Description:
CarDekho Group is India’s biggest digital automotive solutions provider that supports the car buyers at all stages of their personal mobility journey. It achieved Unicorn status in 2021. 

Established in 2008 by two brothers Amit and Anurag Jain in Jaipur, CarDekho is one of India’s most sought-after platforms in the auto sector. It has become the bridge between car buyers and all auto stakeholders including OEMs, dealers, and sellers in the country. 

It also collaborates with financial institutions and general insurance companies to facilitate used car finance and insurance, thereby providing a seamless experience to buyers and sellers.

Being one-stop destination for used car customers across locations, the company also has first-of-its-kind CarDekho Mall in Jaipur, which is among the largest used car showrooms in India. 

The Group’s auto business is expanding internationally and is currently present in two Southeast Asian countries – Indonesia (oto.com) and the Philippines (carmudi.com.ph). 

With a diversified portfolio of offerings, CarDekho has diligently expanded in more than 30 countries globally through its auto and non-auto solutions businesses – Reaching more people, serving more customers, helping its users make better and informed decisions.

Led by Decisiveness, empowered with Empathy, integrating Lean technology, fueling Innovation, being Trustworthy, and providing Excellent customer service makes us a ‘DELITE’-filled, diverse and inclusive workplace where each member is committed to build a seamless and tech-first ecosystem for our B2B and B2C stakeholders. We believe in rewarding and nurturing the right talent with fast-tracked career opportunities across our business verticals of Automobile, Health, Education, E-Commerce, Finance, and Technology.

For more details, visit: www.CarDekho.com

Name: Women in the Boardroom

Our focus is not a conversation about diversity—it is about actionable strategies and getting results. Our comprehensive approach includes:

Accountability and Insights: Acting as your accountability partner to ensure you achieve your objectives, while providing exclusive insights into boardroom trends and topics through engaging webinars and fireside chats.

Let us help you make your boardroom goals a reality.


---

CONTACT

Name: Grupo VILASECA
Description:
Multinacional con capital ecuatoriano que se ha constituido en uno de los conglomerados empresariales más grandes e importantes del Ecuador, concebido con una visión muy clara por parte de sus fundadores: ofrecer productos y servicios de una excelente calidad a precios competitivos y siempre guardando un alto sentido de responsabilidad social. 

Contamos con mas de 60 años de experiencia, y hemos llegado a ser referentes en las industrias de: Empaques, Alimentos, Suministros Ferreteros e Industriales y en la Industria Inmobiliaria. Tenemos presencia en: Ecuador, Perú, Bolivia y Colombia.

Name: German Federal Ministry of Transport
Description: As supreme federal authority the BMV is responsible for all matters of transport and mobility within the Federal Republic of Germany.

Name: Al Rostamani Group
Description:
Founded by Abdulla Hassan Al Rostamani in the early 1950’s, Al Rostamani Group is a leading UAE family business conglomerate, guided by its core values of commitment, care, and vision.

With a legacy spanning over six decades, the group is one of the earliest established and most prominent companies in the country. It is renowned for its unwavering dedication to excellence and innovation across a range of diverse industries.

Al Rostamani Group’s businesses operate in the automotive, general trading, real estate and construction, solar energy, financial services, travel and tourism, and technology solutions industries.

As the Group continues to expand and diversify its offerings, it remains steadfast in its commitment to its core values, cementing its position as a responsible and visionary business leader in the region and beyond.

Name: German Federal Ministry of Digital and Transport
Description: As supreme federal authority the BMDV is responsible for all matters of transport and mobility as well as digital aspects within the Federal Republic of Germany. In Berlin and Bonn 1,300 employees work together in nine departments including Digital Society, Air Transport, Waterways and Shipping, Ground Transport and Road Construction.

Name: Albatha Group
Description:
Albatha Group is a modern yet traditional family-owned conglomerate company based in the United Arab Emirates.  We have grown since our inception in the early 1950s.

Today the group compromises over 30 autonomous companies - specializing in sectors such as automotive, healthcare, manufacturing, engineering, electronics, FMCG, food, and real estate.

We have over 7,000 employees that enjoy our "values" based culture.
We work with some of the world's most recognized brands, and they trust us to represent them in the GCC.

Name: Confidential Company
Description: A well-established firm in New York City seeks top-notch candidates.

Name: United Group
Description:
United Group is one of the largest conglomerates in Bangladesh. 

The journey began in 1978 with a few modest ventures in the construction and infrastructure development sector and over the decades we have developed a diverse investment portfolio. We ventured in the Real Estate industry in the 90s as well establishing IPP. Our Power Generation is among the largest of the nation and  early 2000s we made our forays into healthcare and education sector. We have also developed yarn spinning, specialized services, shipping & logistics. At the end the first decade of the new millenia we made strong forays into the retail and services with pioneering and innovative products that have become the industry benchmark. 

Our most vibrant concerns are United Hospital, Unimart and Chef's Table and we are on the eve of launching one of the largest retail arcades in Bangladesh. We also have the biggest Real Estate project in the pipeline which will be constructed right at the heart of our Flagship project, United City.

Throughout the decades we worked diligently to maintain the quality of our services, compliance regulations set by the industry and we always strove to meet the expectations and commitments we make with our stakeholders.

Currently, we have over 37 active concerns and we employ nearly 10,000 personnel. Our core specialty has always been self sufficiency and sustainability which has enabled us to put together holistic solutions for our clients in every industry.

We plan to continue building on the legacy of success through maintaining the core set of values that have been nurtured, practiced and implemented in all of our ventures.

Name: Alkhorayef Group
Description:
Since our foundation in 1957, Alkhorayef Group has become a strong and successful diversified business. We are leaders in Saudi Arabia and in our region, enjoying a strong reputation for quality and service. We also have a growing international presence, operating in over 40 countries and six continents.

From our roots in agriculture, we’ve built up highly regarded businesses that supply pumps, pipes, and power generation machinery to major projects in many parts of the globe. We’re key players in agriculture, water, power and oil, as well as in the marine industry and in printing and paper, offering integrated solutions for the whole of a project lifecycle. 

In addition to our manufacturing operations, we also distribute numerous world-class brand names, including John Deere, Volvo, Castrol, Linde, Manroland, Yamaha and others.

Our Group is structured as four strategic business units: Oil and Lubricants, Machinery Systems, Contracting Services and Printing and Paper.

Name: Grupo Pantaleon
Description:
Pantaleon es una organización agroindustrial, dedicada al procesamiento responsable de caña de azúcar para la producción de azúcar, mieles, alcoholes y energía eléctrica. Con más de 176 años de operación, Pantaleon se ha posicionado como líder en producción de azúcar en Centro América y entre los diez grupos azucareros más importantes de Latinoamérica. La casa matriz está ubicada en Ciudad de Guatemala con operaciones en cinco países: México, Guatemala, Nicaragua, Chile y Estados Unidos. 

Conoce más: www.pantaleon.com

Name: BaFin
Description:
Wirksam, entschlossen und mit Weitblick. Für ein stabiles und faires Finanzsystem, dem Sie vertrauen können. 

Das ist die Vision der BaFin - der Bundesanstalt für Finanzdienstleistungsaufsicht.

Wir sind die zentrale Aufsichtsbehörde für Banken und Finanzdienstleister, Versicherer und den Wertpapierhandel.

Unser Ziel ist als integrierte Aufsicht, die Funktionsfähigkeit, Stabilität und Integrität des deutschen Finanzplatzes zu gewährleisten, die kollektiven Interessen der Verbraucherinnen und Verbraucher zu schützen und damit Vertrauen zu schaffen. 

Wie erreichen wir unser Ziel?
- Wir sichern die Zahlungsfähigkeit von Kreditinstituten, Versicherungsunternehmen und Finanzdienstleistern.
- Wir sorgen für faire und transparente Finanzmarktbedingungen.
- Wir setzen uns für den kollektiven Verbraucherschutz im Finanzsektor ein.
- Wir wirken der Geldwäsche und Terrorismusfinanzierung präventiv entgegen.
- Wir verfolgen Finanzgeschäfte, die ohne die erforderliche Erlaubnis betrieben werden.
- Wir wickeln Finanzinstitute bei unabwendbarer Insolvenz ab.

Gemeinsam mit europäischen und internationalen Partnern schafft die BaFin einen einheitlichen europäischen Finanzmarkt und setzt globale Aufsichts- und Abwicklungsstandards. 

Die rund 3000 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter arbeiten an den Standorten Bonn und Frankfurt am Main. Wir bieten sichere und flexible Arbeitsbedingungen mit einem umfangreichen Angebot an Sozialleistungen im Spannungsfeld zwischen öffentlicher Verwaltung, Politik und Finanzen. 

Bitte beachten Sie bei Diskussionen unsere Social-Media-Netiquette: bafin.de/netiquette

Name: City of Vienna
Description:
The Vienna City Administration is the largest employer in Vienna. It stands for social responsibility and accountability, reliability, and clear structures. About 67,000 staff members work for the different units and departments of the City Administration and in the city’s independent enterprises – the Vienna Hospital Group, the public housing association Wiener Wohnen, and the local wastewater management enterprise Wien Kanal. 

Vienna is internationally renowned for its excellent administration, which is also due to the high performance standards shared by its staff. Thanks to their extraordinary level of motivation, commitment, willingness to learn, flexibility, and mobility, they do an excellent job as they perform a variety of local administration tasks day by day, and provide vital services of general interest to the city’s population. The Vienna City Administration strives to maintain superior quality of life, top-quality infrastructure and reliable supply systems in Vienna while also implementing resource-efficient climate policies now and in the future. 

Of course, the broad spectrum of tasks opens up a wide variety of career opportunities for City of Vienna staff. A comprehensive training and further education programme facilitates qualification, and flexible working time models help them reconcile work, family life, and leisure. Providing equal opportunities for all staff members is a matter of fact for the City of Vienna. 

Netiquette: https://wien.gv.at/socialmedia-netiquette
Imprint: https://www.wien.gv.at/info/impressum.html

Name: TAO Legacy Holdings
Description:
TAO Legacy Holdings via RTS Global Partners, Fobillion Club and the Family Office Zone, has become the leading family office and family business conglomerate education technology platform. RTS via its parent investors builds and invests in family private equity ventures to transform family offices and family business communities. RTS has a 22 year history built upon its Education arm integrated in 2023 with the Family Office Zone on the Verchool Platform as part of its regeneration plan.

RTS over two decades has worked with 208 UHNW Families to date and delivered private programs to family offices and family businesses in 25 countries, from 2 to 1,300 members in 1st to 12th generation families, and impacted millions of people with virtual and physical events in 66 countries. RTS educates families on succession planning, board meeting facilitations, family constitutions, family value charters, family structures, family alignment, conflict resolution, business growth, new ventures and job role allocation areas.

RTS also invests in extensive research, publishing books, developing next generation programs and delivering private and public executive forums for families. 

RTS and its Founder in 2016 was recognised with the ‘Disruptive Entrepreneur of the Year’ award by the CEO of Dubai SME at the SME Global Summit, for its social impact, excellent governance and innovative solutions.

RTS stands for Regeneration, Transformation and Succession, and core values to Respect, Trust and Serve our partners. Our philosophy is built upon our One Family One Legacy mindset to build a Global Legacy Eco-System Platform.

In 2022 RTS entered the Deep-Tech space with Verchool Holdings, our newest investment with TAO Legacy Holdings, with a new path to serve family offices in building lasting legacies, via a new Family Office Zone in 2024, using Virtual Extended Reality and Spatial Web technologies to accelerate legacy building. 

www.verchool.com
www.taolegacy.com

Name: Federal Ministry for the Environment, Nature Conservation, Nuclear Safety and Consumer Protection
Description:
Protecting the climate, biodiversity and natural ressources - this is what the German Federal Ministry for the Environment, Nature Conservation, Nuclear Safety and Consumer Protection (BMUV) has been committed to for over 30 years. Our work focuses on measures for clean waters, intact soils and low-pollutant air, as well as the promotion of environmentally friendly mobility and climate-friendly technologies.
Our staff of more than 1.000 comes from a wide range of professions and personal backgrounds.

Name: InterGlobe Enterprises
Description:
InterGlobe Enterprises is an Indian travel conglomerate involved in Aviation (IndiGo), Hospitality, Logistics, Technology, Airline Management, Advanced Pilot Training, and Aircraft Maintenance
Engineering. InterGlobe, through its various businesses, employs more than 70,000 professionals across 135+ cities globally.

Since 1989, the group has been building businesses and working with global brands to deliver Quality and Value. It has been bridging the gap between people and markets through Innovation and Service Leadership. Over the past three decades, InterGlobe has continued to expand its vision, contribution, and footprint, becoming one of India’s foremost conglomerates.

Name: Orient Group Of Companies
Description:
Orient Group of Companies (OGC) is a diversified business conglomerate based in Pakistan, uniting high-impact enterprises across ceramics, garments, automation, real estate, and mixed-use developments. As the parent company of renowned brands such as Orient, Kontrol, and Hilton Pakistan, OGC is committed to driving industrial excellence and sustainable progress.

Name: Whole Assistant
Description:
THE WHOLE ASSISTANT VISION

Our mission is to foster community and provide actionable solutions for executive,
personal, and administrative assistants while empowering them to be their best
selves and lead more balanced lives.

OUR VISION

At Whole Assistant we believe that ever assistant is a hero – often moving heaven
and earth to ensure their office runs smoothly, their boss’ life is in order, and nothing
falls through the cracks. Assistants can wear many hats: gate keeper, office manager,
proxy, bookkeeper, babysitter, chauffer, database manager, researcher, professional
organizer, party planner, facilitator, tech support and travel agent to name a few. The
assistant role is messy in a way that only assistants understand.

1. We aim to foster a community that will engage with one another, offering support and
encouragement in what otherwise can be very isolating roles.

2. We seek to empower and educate assistants, offering actionable solutions to real time concerns
and dilemmas.

3. We promote self-care and healthy work-life balance with the understanding that healthier,
happier assistants will make the world a better (and more productive) place.

Rund 1400 Unternehmen bieten über 16'000 Beschäftigten zukunftsgerichtete Arbeitsmöglichkeiten in allen Branchen. In Emmen befindet sich derzeit am Seetalplatz auch die grösste Baustelle des Kantons Luzern. Es entsteht eine neuer Stadtteil mit Wohn-, Arbeits und Lebensraum und einem komplett umgestalteten Öffentlichen Verkehr. Entstehen wird auch das neue Verwaltungszentrums des Kantons Luzern mit über 2'000 Angestellten.

Herzlich willkommen in Emmen! 
www.emmen.ch
www.facebook.com/gemeindeemmen

Sie legt Wert auf die Sicherstellung der Chancengleichheit und der Rechtsgleichheit und fördert ihre Mitarbeitenden im Sinne einer permanenter Aus- und Weiterbildung. Name: MBOG Next
Description:
MBOG is hét platform voor hbo+ zorgprofessionals die mensen begeleiden bij het optimaliseren van hun gezondheid via voeding en andere leefstijlinterventies.
 
MBOG faciliteert leden bij het professioneel en zichtbaar uitoefenen van hun vak.

MBOG ziet een toekomst waarin hbo+ zorgprofessionals met kennis van voeding en leefstijl vanzelfsprekend onderdeel zijn van het zorglandschap.

MBOG draagt bij aan een zorgsysteem waarin inhoudelijke kwaliteit, gepersonaliseerde zorg en samenwerking binnen de zorgketen vooropstaan.

MBOG leden zijn zichtbaar, professioneel en worden erkend als waardevolle aanvulling op de reguliere zorg.

DOELSTELLINGEN
1. Professionalisering van de beroepsgroep
Het versterken van de kwaliteit, zichtbaarheid en professionele positionering van hbo+ zorgprofessionals die werken met voeding en leefstijlinterventies.

2. Faciliteren van ontwikkeling en praktijkvoering
Het ondersteunen van leden bij de professionele en inhoudelijke ontwikkeling van hun praktijk, onder andere via nascholing, intervisie, kwaliteitsbewaking en kennisdeling.

3. Netwerkopbouw en samenwerking
Het bouwen en onderhouden van een sterk netwerk van zorgprofessionals, en het bevorderen van samenwerking binnen de zorgketen en met maatschappelijke en onderwijsinstellingen.

4. Zichtbaarheid en externe positionering
Het faciliteren van leden in het zichtbaar en professioneel uitdragen van hun rol binnen de gezondheidszorg.

5. Bijdragen aan een toekomstbestendig zorgsysteem
Het leveren van een inhoudelijke bijdrage aan de ontwikkeling van een zorgsysteem waarin voeding, leefstijl en persoonsgerichte zorg vanzelfsprekende elementen zijn.

Name: American Council on Gift Annuities (ACGA)
Description:
The American Council on Gift Annuities (ACGA) is a qualified nonprofit organization formed in 1927 as the Committee on Gift Annuities for the purpose of providing educational and other services to American charities regarding gift annuities and other forms of planned gifts. It was incorporated (as) a 501(c)(3) nonprofit in 1993.

One of the primary activities of the Council is the publication of suggested charitable gift annuity rates for use by charities and their donors. The Council retains the services of an actuarial firm to advise and consult on matters pertaining to life expectancies and related matters. The Council has a long and distinguished record in this area, and its suggested rates have long been recognized, not only by charities and donors, but also by state insurance departments and the IRS as being actuarially sound and in the best interests of all parties involved.

The Council’s volunteer board of directors is comprised of professionals active in the field of planned giving with some of America’s most well-respected charities. These individuals give unselfishly of their time and energy to assist others in their gift annuity programs.

Name: CeReGAS
Description:
Los esfuerzos de la UNESCO para construir sociedades de conocimiento están siendo complementados por el trabajo de los Institutos y Centros de Categoría 2. Estas entidades, fundadas normalmente por los Estados Miembros, llevan a cabo un sin número de actividades que contribuyen a alcanzar los objetivos del programa estratégico de la UNESCO. Estos centros realizan diversas actividades tales como: investigación, talleres facilitadores y de ayuda al desarrollo de soluciones creativas en muchas de las problemáticas que enfrentan los países en todo el mundo en materia de desarrollo.
La solicitud de creación de estos institutos y centros proviene de los Estados Miembros. El Consejo ejecutivo procede entonces a examinar cada petición, acompañada de un estudio de factibilidad, antes de enviar las recomendaciones a la Conferencia General, que tiene la última palabra. Estos centros e institutos, aunque no forman parte, legalmente, de la Organización, están asociados con la UNESCO por medio de acuerdos formales. Hasta la fecha, la UNESCO ha otorgado la Categoría 2 a más de 80 entidades.

La propuesta para la creación de este Centro de Aguas Subterráneas considera y se sustenta en la experiencia de trabajo regional que el país desarrolló durante la ejecución del Proyecto para la Protección Ambiental y Desarrollo Sostenible del Sistema Acuífero Guaraní preparado y ejecutado entre los años 2002 y 2009 con sede en Montevideo.
Este exitoso proyecto financiado por el Fondo para el Medio Ambiente Mundial reunió los esfuerzos de Argentina, Brasil, Paraguay y Uruguay con el apoyo del Banco Mundial y el Departamento de Desarrollo Sostenible de la OEA. Fruto de él se acordó un Programa Estratégico de Acción para la protección y uso sostenible de este acuífero con esfuerzo de los 4 países.

Name: Taiko Group

The Taiko Group is one of Malaysia’s most dynamic and versatile privately held business groups. The Group’s headquarters is based in Ipoh, Perak, Malaysia with operations spread throughout Asia and Europe. The Taiko name is synonymous with dynamic and sustainable growth, sound financial fundamentals, professional management and a strong commitment to quality and excellence.

Notwithstanding being separate entities, all the business units or groups are imbued with the work culture of the Group’s Chairman, Dato Lee Soon Hian, who has always stressed to the Heads of Business Groups and all employees on the fundamental business ethics such as hard work, honesty, teamwork and being commercial minded. These fundamentals have steered the Group through various challenges and the Group’s exceptional growth over the past years is a testament to its success. 

The Group was founded by the late Tan Sri Dato' Seri Lee Loy Seng, thus sharing a common heritage with Batu Kawan Berhad and Kuala Lumpur Kepong Berhad, both listed on Bursa Malaysia and having businesses in Inorganic chemicals; plantations; oleochemical products; retails, cocoa processing, rubber gloves; wood parquet and property developments. From a property based group, the Taiko Group has diversified its businesses into 6 business units or groups - namely Chemical Trading (Taiko Marketing); HDPE drum (Taiko HDPE Drum); Bleaching Clay (Taiko Clay); Property (Taiko Properties); Bituminous Products & Sporting facilities (Taiko Bituminious Products) and Aviation (Smooth Route). Notwithstanding being separate entities, all the business units or groups are imbued with the culture and philosophy of our late founder, who was renowned for his dedication to fundamental business ethics such as hard work, honesty, teamwork and entrepreneurship.

Name: IBI2 Institute for Sustainable Transitions & Biomimicry Innovations
Description:
Sinds de industriële revolutie hebben we met z’n allen een wereld gebouwd die inmiddels tegen het einde van zijn houdbaarheidsdatum aanloopt. Klimaatverandering, sociale ongelijkheid, gezondheidsproblemen, grondstoffentekorten en vervuiling zijn onder andere de uitdaging van onze tijd!

De wereld verandert en u beseft dat uw bedrijf mee moet veranderen. Alleen de kosten van uw product in de prijs verwerken is niet meer voldoende. Wetgeving wordt aangescherpt, milieukosten worden hoger, sociale arbeidsomstandigheden worden onder een vergrootglas gelegd en eigenlijk denkt u zelf ook: hoe leg ik het uit aan mijn kinderen? Ofwel, u wilt wat met duurzaamheid. Maar het is ingewikkeld, er zijn ontzettend veel stromingen en eigenlijk is helemaal niet duidelijk hoe uw bedrijf kan overleven als u hiermee aan de slag gaat.

Maar het knaagt. Want hoe overleeft uw bedrijf het als u het niet doet? Jonge mensen willen werken in een bedrijf waarvan ze het belang zien, uw klanten willen steeds meer duurzaamheid in de keten, grondstoffen worden schaarser en u ziet zelf ook wel in dat een beetje energiebesparing en recycling een druppel op de gloeiende plaat is. Maar hoe dan wel? IBI² heeft voor u de oplossing. IBI2 biedt helderheid en begeleidt u op strategisch niveau niet alleenin het vinden van oplossingen voor duurzaamheid, maar creëert ook samen met u concepten met marktwaarde. IBI², Institute for Biomimicry Innovations, combineert kennis op het gebied van duurzaamheid in de meeste complete vorm met creativiteit om tot succesvolle productconcepten te komen. Nieuwe businessmodellen maken uw bedrijf veerkrachtig en zorgen ervoor dat duurzaamheid niet duur hoeft te zijn. Uw bedrijf overleeft niet alleen, maar straalt als nooit tevoren.

Name: Customer Service vs Customer Experience - BOOKS & Podcast -
Description:
"Es una lectura amena que proporciona forma y fondo para migrar del espejismo de los productos y servicios hacia la inmutable realidad de la Experiencia a Clientes. 
Toda organización que aún considere que lo que vende son “productos” está incurriendo en un costoso error y condenada a la irrelevancia.

Cuando una pregunta es poderosa, las respuestas son relevantes, ¿cómo convertirnos en la primera opción en las mentes de nuestros clientes? 

Conforme fui avanzando en la lectura del contenido inevitablemente reflexioné en mis propias experiencias, en lecturas del pasado, en paradigmas actuales, y en el tema o idea que cada capítulo plantea, lo cual validó que este libro debe ser lectura obligada para el CEO.

De inicio me hizo recordar que la lógica hace que la gente piense, pero son las emociones lo que nos mueven a actuar, y este libro lleva de la mano al CEO para reconocer sus conductas actuales, reflexionar con sinceridad y descubrir los cambios que deberá realizar para migrar a toda su organización de un formato de venta de productos o servicios a uno de auténtica generación de experiencias agradables y enriquecedoras. Todo un reto.

La más efectiva estrategia de ventas es aquella donde tus clientes se convierten en los principales promotores una vez que vivieron una experiencia positiva tan abrumadora que lo platican y comparten con sus colegas y amigos. 

Desde mi perspectiva y fundamentado en los más de dos mil doscientos servicios que nuestra organización proporciona a muy diversos líderes de organizaciones, la creación de experiencias produce resultados exponenciales en tanto que el servicio por sí mismo en el mejor de los casos es lineal. 

Disfruten de esta lectura y, si me permiten una sugerencia, adopten la mente “Sunao”, tolerante, abierta, sin egoísmo, dispuesta a aprender de los demás y capaz de encontrar lo positivo y agradable en toda circunstancia."

Prólogo de Enrique Espino Barrios
Director General
Centro de Competitividad de Monterrey

Name: ESQ Leadership Center
Description:
ESQ LC adalah lembaga training sumber daya manusia yang bertujuan membentuk karakter melalui penggabungan 3 potensi manusia yaitu kecerdasan intelektual, emosional, dan spiritual. Selama ini, ketiga potensi tersebut terpisah dan tidak didayagunakan secara optimum untuk membangun sumber daya manusia. Akibatnya, terjadi krisis moral dan split personality yang berdampak pada turunnya kinerja. Lebih buruk lagi, mereka menjadi manusia yang kehilangan makna hidup serta jati dirinya.

Training ESQ adalah solusi untuk menjawab permasalahan tersebut dengan menggunakan metode spiritual engineering yang komprehensif serta berkelanjutan. Melalui training ESQ, ketiga potensi manusia digabungkan dan dibangkitkan sehingga terbentuk karakter yang tangguh, peningkatan produktivitas sekaligus melahirkan kehidupan yang bahagia dan penuh makna .

Setelah 10 tahun berdiri, sejak 16 Mei 2000, ESQ LC telah menjadi salah satu lembaga pelatihan sumber daya manusia terbesar di Indonesia. Setiap bulan terselenggara rata-rata 100 even training di dalam maupun luar negeri, dan menghasilkan alumni per bulan rata-rata 10.000-15.000 orang. Sampai dengan saat ini, telah terselenggara lebih dari 8,000 training (data per September 2013) dengan total alumni hampir 1,2 juta orang (data per September 2013). Untuk melaksanakan itu semua, ESQ LC saat ini didukung lebih dari 500 orang karyawan.

Name: GDWS · Generaldirektion Wasserstraßen und Schifffahrt
Description:
Die GDWS gehört zum Ressort des Bundesministeriums für Verkehr und digitale Infrastruktur. Zusammen mit 17 nachgeordneten Wasserstraßen- und Schifffahrtsämtern sowie acht Wasserstraßen-Neubauämtern in den Regionen bildet die GDWS die Wasserstraßen- und Schifffahrtsverwaltung des Bundes (WSV).

Wir unterhalten und betreiben die rund 7.300 km Binnenwasserstraßen und 23.000 km² Seewasserstraßen, einschließlich der Schleusen, Wehre, Brücken, Talsperren und Schiffshebewerke und sind verantwortlich für das Verkehrsmanagement im See- und Küstenbereich. An den Wasserstraßen im Küstenbereich betreiben wir neun Verkehrszentralen und an den Binnenwasserstraßen fünf Revierzentralen, die rund um die Uhr besetzt sind.

Wir schaffen die Voraussetzungen für einen sicheren umweltfreundlichen Verkehr und unterstützen die nationale und internationale Schifffahrt bei allen Fragen rund um die Wasserstraßen. Bei unserer eigenen Schiffsflotte gehen wir mit gutem Bespiel voran und verwenden bei allen bundeseigenen Schiffsneubauten umweltfreundliche Antriebe. 

Unsere Flotte an Mehrzweckschiffen zählt zu den modernsten weltweit. Die vier bundeseigenen Spezialschiffe, plus die von uns gecharterten Notschlepper sorgen rund um die Uhr für die Sicherheit in Nord- und Ostsee. Im Havariefall sind die Schiffe in maximal zwei Stunden am Unfallort, startklar zum Notschleppen, zur Öl-, Chemikalien und Brandbekämpfung.

Bei all unseren Tätigkeiten und Maßnahmen an den Bundeswasserstraßen berücksichtigen wir naturschutzfachliche Belange und wassertouristische Aspekte. Für die Bundeswasserstraßen im Binnenbereich, die nur eine geringe oder keine Bedeutung mehr für den Gütertransport haben, werden derzeit Entwicklungskonzepte für die Zukunft dieser Gewässer erarbeitet.

In der WSV arbeiten bundesweit rund 12.500 Beschäftigte. 
Mit über 900 Auszubildenden in zahlreichen technischen und nicht-technischen Berufen ist die WSV eine der großen Ausbildungsverwaltungen des Bundes.

Name: Sustainable Beauty Coalition
Description:
The SBC exists to champion the growth of the beauty sector through sustainable practices and industry collaboration by:

What is the purpose of the Coalition? 
•	To develop a clear strategy, roadmap and initiatives which will accelerate the sustainability efforts of the industry. 
•	Encourage and strengthen links across the industry, communities, voices, and professional bodies to accelerate collaboration, knowledge and bolder collective efforts 
•	Work with government to champion the work of the industry and support the government agenda in the race to net zero 
•	Act to create stronger frameworks and policies for the Beauty sector in the UK 
•	Champion the Green Economy and Green Recovery 
•	Monitor the progress of the roadmap against its goals; and keep these goals and the 
overall execution of initiatives under review. 

3 Focus Pillars 
•	Transparency and accountability: being clear with and activate consumers and others about what sustainability means. 
•	Standards and certification: establishing industry- wide standards that meet the scale of the challenge and ensuring only meaningful certifications are used. 
•	Innovation and tech: harnessing the industry’s excellence in innovation for good and exploring the role this can play in delivering the ambitions of the framework.

Flexible office space is the future. Productive people build progressive companies - and where they work matters.

At The Business Exchange (TBE), our beautifully designed workspaces inspire creativity and collaboration. Each TBE building is home to internationally curated artwork, which provides an imaginative backdrop for new ideas and innovation to flourish.

You’ll get access to the TBE app, which allows you to connect with an entrepreneurial ecosystem of members - as well as book conference and boardrooms and seek assistance from on-site managers.

Ultimately, it’s about providing inspiring spaces that allows you to work with purpose. The companies who realise this will own the future - and at TBE, they already do.

What’s included?
• Central printing services
• Fully-furnished offices
• High-speed fibre internet
• Coffee shops and cafés
• Utilities and cleaning staff
• Business manager and reception services
• IT technician services
• Biometric security and 24/7 access
• Video conferencing and boardrooms
• Flexible event space

Other benefits
• Adaptable month-to-month terms
• Cutting-edge workspace design
• Access to TBE offices nationwide
• Connection with members via the TBE mobile app
• Access to a diverse talent pool
• Tailor made or branded workspace solutions

opportunities in TBE app

For more information and office enquiries visit our website www.thebusinessexchange.co.za or e-mail officespace@thebusinessexchange.co.za

Name: myOffice
Description:
myOffice Business Centre offer boutique high-end serviced office solutions in two of Dubai’s premium locations: Dubai Marina and Downtown. 

Both of our prestigiously located offices feature state-of-the-art facilities and include mail and concierge services that would suit the needs to the smallest detail of any-sized company.

Our flexible, tailor-made business set up and sponsorship options ensure your business will enter the local market at low risk and with continuous support.

Monthly payment options for leasing and support services ensure that your company has the best start possible whether you’re a start up or branching out into new territories.

myOffice encompasses innovative office design and infrastructure, quality of service, and personalized support. We are unique in that we offer a prestigious location, high-end office solution, that integrates into our customers business and personal needs. 

With over 50 years combined Middle East experience, myOffice partners have developed a flexible business set up and auxiliary service solution. 

Our range of services not only include fully furnished and serviced offices, but also phone answering and mail management, business sponsorship, trade license facilitation, and a wide range of concierge and business support services.

Name: NextGen Group
Description:
Founded in 2004, NextGen Group is a diversified international enterprise headquartered in Australia, operating across education, finance, taxation, technology, and professional development. Guided by our mission “to empower people and businesses through innovation, knowledge, and trust”, the Group is committed to creating long-term value for the communities we serve across Australia and India.

At the heart of the Group is Accounts NextGen, our flagship accounting and advisory division trusted by thousands of individuals, businesses, and professionals. Alongside it, we continue to expand through a family of independent yet interconnected companies — Tax NextGen, Finnex, NextGen IQ, NextGen IQ India, NexBot, Practitioner Hub, Career Hub, and NextGen Montessori. Each operates with a shared foundation of ethics, excellence, and a future-ready vision.

Rooted in a culture of integrity, learning, and innovation, the NextGen Group empowers clients, students, families, and businesses through practical solutions, global-standard education, and cutting-edge technology. Today, we serve tens of thousands across two countries – Australia and India – continuing to build a legacy of trust, growth, and sustainable impact.

Name: Allied Resources Group (ARG)

Name: American Board of Emergency Medicine
Description:
The American Board of Emergency Medicine (ABEM) is one of 24 medical specialty certification boards recognized by the American Board of Medical Specialties. ABEM certifies emergency physicians who meet its educational, professional standing, and examination standards. ABEM certification is sought and earned by emergency physicians on a voluntary basis; ABEM is not a membership association. 

The ABEM mission is to ensure the highest standards in the specialty of Emergency Medicine. 

ABEM’s purposes are:
 ◦To improve the quality of emergency medical care 
◦To establish and maintain high standards of excellence in Emergency Medicine and subspecialties 
◦To enhance medical education in the specialty of Emergency Medicine and related subspecialties 
◦To evaluate physicians and promote professional development through initial and continuous certification in Emergency Medicine and its subspecialties 
◦To certify physicians who have demonstrated special knowledge and skills in Emergency Medicine and its subspecialties 
◦To enhance the value of certification for ABEM diplomates 
◦To serve the public and medical profession by reporting the certification status of the diplomates of the American Board of Emergency Medicine

Please visit our website for additional information.

Name: Stadt Bielefeld
Description:
Karriere starten bei der Stadt Bielefeld
- und gemeinsam Zukunft schaffen.

Arbeiten bei der Stadt Bielefeld bedeutet, aktiv an der Gestaltung eines liebens- und lebenswerten Bielefelds mitzuwirken. Bei uns haben Sie die Möglichkeit, sich in Aufgaben und Projekte einzubringen, die das Leben der Bürger/innen direkt verbessern.

Wir gestalten gemeinsam Zukunft.
Wir machen Ideen greifbar, setzen Visionen um und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem jede/r Einzelne zählt - unabhängig von kultureller und sozialer Herkunft, Alter, Behinderung, Religion, Weltanschauung oder sexueller Orientierung und geschlechtlicher Identität. Ob in der Stadt- und Verkehrsplanung, im sozialen Dienst, im BürgerServiceCenter (BSC), im Zivil- und Katastrophenschutz oder in vielen anderen Bereichen unserer Stadt - jeder Tag bietet die Chance, echten Einfluss zu nehmen und einen nachhaltigen Beitrag zu leisten.

Bielefeld gibt Raum für Entwicklung.
Hier wächst nicht nur der Teutoburger Wald, sondern auch Ihre berufliche Perspektive. Als eines der größten Dienstleistungsunternehmen in der Region Ostwestfalen-Lippe sind wir stark in der Region und stark im Beruf. Bei uns finden Sie die ideale Umgebung für die Entwicklung der Stadt und für Ihre Karriere.

Engagierte Mitarbeiter/innen sind das Herz der Stadtverwaltung.
Tragen auch Sie dazu bei, dass Bielefeld ein Ort ist, an dem sich Menschen wohlfühlen und ihre Zukunft gestalten können. Ihr Handeln zählt - für Bielefeld, seine Bürger/innen und die kommenden Generationen.

Impressum: https://www.bielefeld.de/impressum

Name: Ahtna, Inc.
Description:
Ahtna, Incorporated is one of 13 Alaska Native Regional Corporations established by Congress under terms of the Alaska Native Claims Settlement Act of 1971. Based in Glennallen, Alaska, Ahtna, Inc. is owned by nearly 2,000 shareholders, the majority of whom are of Ahtna Athabascan descent, with many still residing in the Ahtna region, the traditional homeland of the Ahtna people.

As an Alaska Native and shareholder-owned corporation, Ahtna, Inc. remains committed to its vision and mission statements, with a goal of preserving, strengthening, and enhancing a cultural identity that has existed for thousands of years. Ahtna’s efforts are aimed at providing a broad range of opportunities for shareholders, continued business growth and diversification, as well as effective management of all Ahtna resources.

Name: IMS Ship Management Limited
Description:
IMS group has a rich history spanning over four decades, originating in 1969 with the establishment of International Marine Services by founder, Capt. S.C. Sood. Since then, the company has been engaged in a wide range of maritime-related activities. Today, IMS's primary focus is on several key areas, including Crew Management, Dredging and Infrastructure, Project Management and Consultancy, and Technical Management.

IMS Ship Management Pvt. Ltd (IMS) is a reputable company, having offices in Mumbai and Delhi, India with a presence in Singapore. The company is a licensed Ship Crew Manning agency authorized to provide Recruitment & Placement Services under the RPSL number MUM-023, as issued by the Director General of Shipping, Government of India. IMS is also licensed to supply non-marine crew members to vessels. Furthermore, IMS complies with the Maritime Labour Convention (MLC) and has been awarded ISO 9001:2015 certification, demonstrating commitment to providing quality services to their clients. IMS offers a range of services related to ship management, with a particular focus on crew management.

IMS has a proven track record of providing high-quality crew to over 650 merchant vessels, as well as catering to the crewing needs of various cruises and offshore companies. The company is committed to maintaining high standards of operating practices and adhering to national and international statutory regulations, standards, and guidelines related to fleet personnel management. IMS's rigorous adherence to these regulations ensures that their crew are highly trained and qualified, ensuring the safe and efficient operation of their clients' vessels. IMS is become a trusted partner for many companies in the maritime industry.

IMS is also expanding its fleet of dredgers to meet the demands of the growing infrastructure industry. The company is actively seeking new projects and joint ventures to take advantage of this fast-accelerating opportunity.

Name: Isiklar Holding
Description:
TURGUT ISIK, founder of ISIKLAR HOLDING A.S. was born in Bartın in 1932. After completing his elementary and high school education, he worked in the companies of his father and his grandfather for a while. In 1952 he established Isıklar Collective Company with his father Ali Rıza Isık. Turgut Isık who took over the works in 1959 as his father passed away, has established Isıklar Limited Company with Sezai Turkes and Fevzi Akkaya and by converting this company, which operated as a sales company for long years into a corporation, he entered industry with Bartın Brick factory. 

Fevzi Akkaya, Sezai Turkes, Turgut Isık Turgut Isık established the factories Baksan Bartın paper sack, Bartın Lime and Meytas Lime and Cumra Paper Bags Factory between the years 1970 and 1981 . In 1976 he established Isıklar Maritime Group being composed of Isıklar Maritime Bargem and Bartas Bartın Ship Barden. With the investments made in these companies, he had a fleet with 1 tanker and 13 dry cargo ships. With the establishment of Ozısık Construction and Genta Engineering Co, he entered into construction and contracting sectors. 



In 1974 in order to ensure continuity of his institutions, he gathered all his companies under the roof of ISIKLAR HOLDING A.S.

Turgut Isık who passed away on 26th of March 1990, had the principle “Life is not a challenge,challenge is life” and as being a member of Turkish Private sector, in order to make contribution to the economical development of our country, he has realized all his responsibilities both in and out of the country with his outmost efforts, meticulous works and never ending dynamism, which he deemed was his duty. A few years before his passing away, Turgut Isık has wanted to establish a foundation for health and education and he has started with the related works. His desire which he could not fulfill during his lifetime was realized by his family in 1991 being in line with his educational and health targets.

Name: Irish Chamber of Commerce, Singapore
Description:
The goal of the Irish Chamber is to provide our members with information, opportunities for business networking and to represent the views and interests of members.

Our primary focus is to:

- To contribute to an improved understanding of issues relevant to the development of business between Ireland and Singapore, by monitoring economic, political, business and legal issues.

- To provide a robust calendar of formal and informal networking activities that bring members together, provide access to distinguished speakers from the Singapore and Irish public and private sectors, and create an environment of ideas and sharing.

- To promote bilateral trade and investment between Ireland and Singapore by strengthening ties between these two business communities, and to serve and create business value for them.

- To represent the views and interests of members to government departments, and other international and local Singaporean organisations.

For more information please contact Benita Meagher, Executive Director of the Irish Chamber of Commerce, Singapore at support@irishchamber.org.sg

Name: Armstrong Group
Description:
Founded in 1946, what is now known as the Armstrong Group began life as Armstrong County Line Construction, contracting work for power and telephone utilities in Western Pennsylvania. In the 1950s we began to own and operate independent local exchange telephone companies. We expanded into the cable television industry in 1963. The 1980s saw us move into the security, restaurant and real estate development industries. And we’ve continued to expand and diversify. Our most recent addition has been Armstrong Comfort Solutions, a full service residential and commercial heating, cooling and plumbing provider.

Seven decades old, the Armstrong Group remains a family owned and operated business, now employing over 2,300 people across the nation. Strong management, fiscal responsibility, careful planning and diligent research are hallmarks of the businesses that make up the Armstrong Group of Companies, ensuring the mission statement of our founder; Growth and Perpetuity.

Name: South West Business Council
Description:
With over 20 years’ experience of supporting our members, the South West Business Council works closely with businesses from a diverse range of sectors to help them navigate challenges and achieve their ambitions.

We are in regular dialogue with government departments and have a strong reach into local authorities, including the Local Enterprise Partnership, as well as prominent regional organisations such as Tech South West, the South West Cyber Resilience Centre and the National Composites Centre and The Crown Estate.

CONVENE
We bring our members together for key discussion at regular events throughout the South West, encouraging the expansion of business networks, sharing innovative ideas, and catalysing opportunities.

INFORM
Drawing on the collective experience and knowledge of our Board, and our network of senior business leaders and Government contacts, we can provide members, regardless of size or sector, with strategic expertise and advice. Our insight allows us to offer a broad range of business services and support, helping members overcome challenges and barriers to growth, partnership or trade.

CONNECT
Our mission is to create a thriving business community by forging valuable connections and facilitating vital collaboration. We nurture personal, trusted, and long-standing relationships with our members and seek to understand their priorities to help them achieve their goals.

STRATEGIC OBJECTIVES
The South West is an exciting and dynamic region that has successfully attracted ambitious businesses and individuals from across the UK and beyond. At SWBC, we have been working hard to support these businesses and promote economic growth for over 20 years. Our aim is to act in the best interests of our members, providing a voice for businesses across the South West, representing their interests inside and outside the region, and forging opportunities for collaboration, innovation and prosperity.

Name: CEO Leadership Alliance Orange County (CLAOC)
Description:
CLAOC is a coalition of over 55 CEOs working together to solve our county’s most urgent problems and build a thriving Orange County for all. To fuel OC economic growth, close gaps, and secure future prosperity for all our residents we are developing an innovation ecosystem – through a focus on talent and capital. Our collective work will make it more desirable for talent to stay, connect more of our residents to higher-paying jobs, and strengthen new and established local companies.

CLAOC was founded in 2017 by CEOs and leaders of some of the most prominent companies in OC to help shape a positive future for county residents. Tapping into the influence and reach of our members, our diverse and experienced team bridges silos and industries to bring together and mobilize the right people, practices, and resources to accelerate progress. We analyze outcomes of our work and invest time and resources where we find the greatest impact.

Name: Students' Placement Office, IIT Kanpur
Description:
Students' Placement Office at IIT Kanpur has been providing world-class recruitment services to organizations worldwide for over three decades now. IIT Kanpur was in fact the first institute of the IIT fraternity to have a dedicated Placement Office. The Office is responsible for over 1000 jobs and 500 summer internships annually. We have over 300 clients worldwide who have been recruiting from IIT Kanpur regularly. We are committed to providing companies with a complete recruitment package right from declaration of Job Openings to Pre Placement/Promotional Talks and shortlisting to final recruitment. Our biggest USP is the exceptionally talented students graduating every year from IIT Kanpur. 

We believe in long term relationship with our clients, the Recruiters and it is NOT limited to Recruitment only. We specialize in providing a wide range of services to recruiters and strive for forming long term relations.

Our goals are:

1. Adding value to organizations worldwide by helping them recruit students from IIT Kanpur.
2. Providing short term industrial and academic project teams to companies through summer internships.
3. Fostering long term relations with organizations through Industry Defined Projects, dedicated Student Chapters and dedicated Student Research Groups.
4. Providing promotional services for organizations through workshops and interaction sessions ranging from over-the-internet interaction to Coffee Chats to dedicated workshops and lectures by Industry experts where they can promote their companies and products among over 10000 Campus Residents at IIT Kanpur.

Specialities: Recruitment Facilities, Promotional Services, Industry-Academia Partnership, Industry Defined Project Teams, Human Asset Management

Name: Eidgenössische Kommission für Frauenfragen EKF

Als unabhängige und überparteiliche Fachkommission beobachtet und analysiert die EKF die Entwicklung der Frauen- und Gleichstellungspolitik in der Schweiz, nimmt Stellung zu Vorlagen des Bundes und erarbeitet Empfehlungen für die Umsetzung der Gleichstellung. Die EKF nimmt eine wichtige Brückenfunktion zwischen Politik, Behörden und Zivilgesellschaft wahr.

Name: IHK zu Leipzig
Description:
Wir, das sind  etwa 67 000 Mitgliedsunternehmen, ca. 350 Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmer, die sich als Vertreter ihrer Region und Branche in den IHK-Gremien engagieren und über 1 800 ehrenamtliche Prüferinnen und Prüfer. Wir engagieren uns als  kritischer Partner der Politik, unabhängiger Anwalt des Marktes und praxisorientierter Dienstleister der Unternehmen.

Aufgaben:  Die Industrie- und Handelskammern haben die Aufgabe, das Gesamtinteresse der ihnen zugehörigen Gewerbetreibenden des IHK-Bezirkes gegenüber Kommunen, Landesregierungen, Politik und Öffentlichkeit wahrzunehmen, für die Förderung der gewerblichen Wirtschaft zu wirken. Die IHK zu Leipzig versteht sich als Dienstleister, der die regionale gewerbliche Wirtschaft branchenübergreifend fördert. Dabei werden die wirtschaftlichen Interessen einzelner Gewerbezweige oder Betriebe abwägend und ausgleichend gleichberechtigt vertreten. Das macht die IHK zum wichtigsten Sprachrohr für den Mittelstand der Region Leipzig. Durch die gesetzliche Mitgliedschaft ist die Neutralität und Objektivität gegenüber allen Mitgliedern sichergestellt. Die Aufgaben strukturieren sich in drei wichtige Säulen: Interessenvertretung, Hoheitliche Tätigkeit, Servicedienste für die Wirtschaft im IHK-Bezirk.

Die IHK zu Leipzig ist eine von 79 deutschen Industrie- und Handelskammern, deren Dachorganisation der Deutsche Industrie- und Handelskammertag (DIHK) in Berlin ist. Damit und mit einer Vertretung in Brüssel ist der direkte Draht zu den Institutionen der Bundesrepublik und der Europäischen Union gewährleistet.

https://www.leipzig.ihk.de/service/datenschutz/
Impressum: http://leipzig.ihk.de/impressum

Description:
Focus Travel Partnership is the leading consortium for SME Travel Management Companies in the UK. A membership organisation where independent agencies, who have mainly corporate travel business customers, combine their buying power to centrally negotiate optimum commercial terms. These range from centrally negotiated and distributed air fares and commission, industry supplier commercial deals plus access to cutting edge technology solutions. The Partnership is Partner owned and led, creating an ethos of an organisation run by the partners for the partners.

Focus Travel Partnership has 50 independent TMCs (Travel Management Companies) as Partners who, combined, have a turnover of £1.2billion across all facets of their travel businesses. Negotiations are managed centrally by the Focus Central team who have large and varied experience in the corporate travel community and therefore understand the diverse needs of the Focus Partners. Membership of the Focus Partnership is by invitation and there are strict criteria which Travel Management Companies (TMCs) must meet in order to join the partnership, allowing us to cohesively work together to achieve our mutual business goals.

MISSION

Our mission is to deliver unparalleled excellence and customer satisfaction through our state-of-the-art facilities and personalized services. By continuously innovating and adapting our solutions to the evolving business landscape, we strive to be the trusted partner that empowers your business to reach new heights.

Name: Kadooğlu Holding
Description:
Kadooğlu Otelcilik Turizm İnşaat ve Ticaret AŞ (Kadooğlu Hotel Management and Tourism Co.) has entered into the tourism sector with a hotel in Cizre. Also in the 2000s, the company has achieved significant successes in construction works such as shopping malls, hospitals, housing estates, luxury estates and fuel stations.

Kadooğlu Petrolcülük Taşımacılık Ticaret Sanayi İthalat ve İhracat AŞ (Kadooğlu Petroleum Transport Trade Industry Import and Export Co.) brought a new breath to the fuel industry and set the standards again soon became Kadooğlu Corporate Group’s locomotive. After getting the fuel distribution company license in 2006, ‘Kadoil’ brand was introduced in Turkey. In the meantime, Kadoil grew constantly and with its distribution network of 320 dealers, it took its place in the top ten out of 75 companies.

In 2007, vegetable oil production started in the company and “Bizce” brand -which was an export champion- was introduced in Turkey and the world. One of the Middle East’s biggest vegetable oil factory w established in Gaziantep, and 70 percent of production has still been exported to more than 25 countries. In 2008, Kadooğlu Holding opened Kadooğlu Mediterranean Filling Facilities on an area of 70 thousand square meters with a storage capacity of 70 thousand cubic meters; also in Mersin in 2010, the holding has implemented the largest offshore platform in Turkey.

Kadooğlu Holding shapes its activities in parallel with Turkey’s needs; so it has implemented Kadooğlu Enerji to contribute to generate the energy need which is one of the country’s most important problems.

Kadooğlu Holding is a large organization contributing Turkey’s industry as well as its promotion abroad with its companies where 1200 people are directly and 6500 are indirectly employed, and that has trade relations with over 25 countries in the world.

Name: Bayerische Ingenieurekammer-Bau
Description:
Die Bayerische Ingenieurekammer-Bau ist die Berufsvertretung der bayerischen Ingenieure aus Bauwesen und Bauwirtschaft, Freien Berufen und öffentlichem Dienst im Freistaat Bayern.

Als Körperschaft des öffentlichen Rechts vertreten wir die Interessen unserer rund 7500 Mitglieder in Politik, Wirtschaft, Verwaltung und Öffentlichkeit. Aufsichtsbehörde ist das Bayerische Staatsministerium für Wohnen, Bau und Verkehr.

Unsere Mitglieder sind Beratende Ingenieure als Pflichtmitglieder sowie freiberuflich tätige, angestellte, beamtete und gewerblich tätige Ingenieure als freiwillige Mitglieder.

Als Dienstleister für unsere Mitglieder bieten wir ein umfassendes Informations- und Serviceangebot. Mit der Ingenieurakademie Bayern tragen wir aktiv und umfassend zur Fort- und Weiterbildung bei.

Außerdem ist die Bayerische Ingenieurekammer-Bau zuständige Stelle für die Berufsanerkennung von Ingenieuren und Kontrollstelle gemäß EnEV / GEG (Stichprobenkontrollen von Energieausweisen und Inspektionsberichten über Klimaanlagen).

Name: First Philippine Industrial Park, Inc.
Description:
First Philippine Industrial Park (FPIP) is one of the largest and fastest-growing industrial parks in the Philippines today. With over 500 hectares of prime industrial land, it is the preferred location of more than 140 world-class manufacturing companies and counting including familiar industry-leading businesses such as Brother, Dyson, Collins Aerospace, Honda, Nestle, among others.

FPIP offers prime-grade and site-developed industrial spaces ideal for medium- to large-scale facilities for light industry and manufacturing operations. It also features commercial areas perfect for retail establishments, hotels, restaurants, and more. The FPIP community continues to grow at a fast pace but without compromise. Year after year, new developments rise, new innovations are introduced, and sustainability efforts are improved. 

FPIP is recognized as a sustainability leader in its industry. It has been a three time awardee by DENR for the implementation of Best Environmental Practices. At the same time, FPIP was one of only 2 recipients, among 400 ecozones in the country, of PEZA’s first Green, Healthy, Smart, and Sustainable Award.

FPIP was first developed by First Philippine Holdings (FPH) in a joint venture with Sumitomo Corporations in 1996, in response to the government’s call for private sector involvement in catalyzing industrial growth. Today, with its industrial offerings, best-in-class infrastructure, commercial offerings, and industry-leading park management, FPIP is able to effectively contribute to national development and economic growth. To date, FPIP locators collectively generate over 65,000 local jobs and billions of pesos in annual export earnings.

Learn more about FPIP by visiting www.fpip.com or by sending a message to our chatbot on Facebook.

Description:

We offer workspaces in the locations where everybody wants to be, without boxing you into a long lease. It’s a highly flexible model combining serviced and shared space, including private suites, permanent desks, hot-desking and corporate memberships. We also provide a range of superb event spaces and services for members and non-members alike. 

Our striking, character-rich buildings and the warm inclusive culture provide the perfect environment for your team to thrive. Our spaces are beautifully designed and furnished and expertly serviced and provisioned. There’s a team of business and hospitality professionals at each site to take care of everything, from tech support to teaspoons to bespoke networking events, so you can get on with generating success. 

Generator is not just a physical base and a support system for businesses, it’s also a highly engaged community that regularly gets together to make connections, learn and be inspired.
