Name: Alteo
Description:
Alteo, listed on the Stock Exchange of Mauritius since 2012, stands as a pillar of operational excellence and innovation in the agro-business, energy, and property sectors. Our commitment: transforming the East of Mauritius into an "everlasting place to grow."

We are the pioneers in this island of a thousand resources, actively bringing to life a sustainable social and economic model in the East, a region brimming with opportunity. At Alteo, we nurture excellence and authenticity within our ecosystem through eco-responsible initiatives that protect and enrich our land.

AGRO-BUSINESS: Alteo shines in the agricultural sector, showcasing the high potential of our cane and internationally-recognised special sugars. Our commitment to sustainable farming practices not only enhances our product quality but also supports our local communities, making a significant impact on the agricultural landscape.

ENERGY: As committed supporters of Mauritius’s energy transition, we are dedicated to harmonising human activity with the natural environment. Our goal is ambitious yet clear: achieving 100% renewable energy within the next five years, transforming our operations to ensure the well-being of future generations.

PROPERTY: In real estate, we embody a philosophy deeply rooted in our rural heritage, promoting sustainable living on the preserved lands of the East. Our developments, such as Anahita Beau Champ, not only represent smart investments but also create lifestyles that coexist harmoniously with nature, contributing to the prosperity of local communities.

CORE VALUES: Our values — Ambition, Respect, Integrity, Team Spirit and Excellence — guide our business conduct and are the pillars upon which Alteo is built. These values do not merely define us; they propel us towards greater achievements.

As Alteo continues to innovate and lead, join us to become part of our story — a story of growth, sustainability and excellence.

Feel our heartbeat. Embrace our philosophy.

Name: The Private Office of H.H. Sheikh Hamdan bin Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum
DCC plc
Description: Invested in Energy. DCC is a customer-focused energy business, specialising in the sales, marketing, and distribution of secure, cleaner and competitive energy solutions to commercial, industrial, domestic, and transport customers. Headquartered in Dublin, DCC is listed on the London Stock Exchange and is a constituent of the FTSE 100. In our financial year ended 31 March 2025, DCC generated revenues of £16.1 billion and adjusted operating profit of £609.7 million. DCC has an excellent record, delivering compound annual growth of 13% in continuing adjusted operating profit and unbroken dividend growth of 13% while maintaining high returns on capital employed over 31 years as a public company.

Name: Circular Bio-based Europe Joint Undertaking (CBE JU)
Description:
The Circular Bio-based Europe Joint Undertaking (CBE JU) is a €2 billion partnership between the European Union and the Bio-based Industries Consortium (BIC) that funds projects advancing competitive circular bio-based industries in Europe.
CBE JU is operating under the rules of Horizon Europe, the EU’s research and innovation programme, for the 2021-2031 period. The partnership is building on the success of its predecessor, the Bio-based Industries Joint Undertaking (BBI JU), while addressing the current challenges facing the industry. The CBE JU is the legal and universal successor of BBI JU in respect of all contracts, grant agreements and liabilities.
The CBE JU’s objectives are ensuring a high level of bio-based industrial systems’ environmental performance, accelerating the development and market deployment of bio-based innovative solutions. 
CBE JU organises yearly calls for proposals supporting research and innovation, de-risking investments, addressing market challenges, placing sustainability at the heart of the projects, strengthening the collaboration of all bioeconomy actors and engaging with stakeholders along bio-based value chains.

Name: SQF Institute
Description:
The SQF (Safe Quality Food) Institute is a division of the FMI, the food industry association, established to administer the SQF Program, a leading, global food safety and quality certification and management system. The Program provides independent certification that a supplier's food safety and quality management system complies with international and domestic food safety regulations. This enables suppliers to assure their customers that food has been produced, processed, prepared and handled according to the highest possible standards, at all levels of the supply chain.

For more information, please visit us at www.sqfi.com.

Name: Summit Power International
Description:
Summit Power International Ltd (SPIL), part of Summit Group, is headquartered in Singapore and led by Chairman Muhammed Aziz Khan, one of Asia’s most respected leaders in energy and infrastructure development.

As the largest Independent Power Producer (IPP) in Bangladesh, Summit Power International represents 17% of the nation’s private installed capacity and 7% of total installed capacity. SPIL owns and operates large-scale energy and infrastructure projects, including a Floating Storage and Regasification Unit (FSRU) that delivers 500 million cubic feet per day (mmcfd) of re-gasified gas to Bangladesh.

Through Summit Group’s integrated ecosystem and the leadership vision of Aziz Khan, the company continues to advance sustainable, reliable, and efficient power generation across South Asia. SPIL’s strategic partnerships with global investors, including Mitsubishi Corporation and JERA Co., Inc., underscore its commitment to innovation and international collaboration.

Summit Power International’s current portfolio includes the near-completion of the Meghnaghat II dual-fuel CCGT power plant, with a gross capacity of 590 MW. Beyond infrastructure, the company actively contributes to regional growth by supporting education, community welfare, and environmental initiatives—reflecting Summit Group’s values of responsible progress and corporate citizenship.

As Summit continues to expand its footprint across emerging markets, the company remains dedicated to developing world-class energy infrastructure that powers economies and empowers people—fulfilling Aziz Khan’s long-term vision of advancing sustainable energy independence in South Asia.

Name: BG BAU
Description:
Die BG BAU ist eine der großen Berufsgenossenschaften in Deutschland. Als Träger der gesetzlichen Unfallversicherung für die Bauwirtschaft und baunahe Dienstleistungen betreuen wir ca. 2,8 Millionen Versicherte in rund 500.000 Betrieben und ca. 50.000 privaten Bauvorhaben.

Wir fördern Arbeitssicherheit und Gesundheitsschutz im Betrieb und am Arbeitsplatz. Damit vermeiden wir Arbeitsunfälle und Berufskrankheiten.

Trotz aller Erfolge in der Arbeitssicherheit und im Gesundheitsschutz kann es zu Unfällen und Berufskrankheiten kommen. In diesen Fällen bieten wir umfassende Betreuung und stellen die Leistungsfähigkeit der Betroffenen mit allen geeigneten Mitteln wieder her bzw. leisten finanzielle Entschädigung.

Dabei handelt die BG BAU nach drei Grundsätzen:

- Alles aus einer Hand

- Prävention vor Entschädigung

- Reha vor Rente

Auf diese Weise ermöglicht die BG BAU einen umfassenden Schutz der Beschäftigten und eine hohe soziale Absicherung.

Als Körperschaft des öffentlichen Rechts stehen wir unter staatlicher Aufsicht. Das bedeutet insbesondere, dass wir an gesetzliche Vorschriften wie das Sozialgesetzbuch gebunden sind.

Solidarische Finanzierung

Die Berufsgenossenschaften finanzieren sich aus den Beiträgen der Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmer. Die Versicherten (Beschäftigten) zahlen keine Beiträge zur gesetzlichen Unfallversicherung. Hier finden Sie weitere Zahlen, Daten und Fakten zur BG BAU.

Viele Standorte ermöglichen eine ortsnahe Betreuung

Der Sitz der Hauptverwaltung der BG BAU ist in Berlin. Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter an unseren Standorten im gesamten Bundesgebiet sorgen dafür, dass Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmer und Versicherte ortsnah betreut werden.

Impressum: https://www.bgbau.de/impressum/

Name: Consejo General de Colegios Farmacéuticos
Description:
El Consejo General de Colegios Oficiales de Farmacéuticos es una corporación de derecho público que constituye el órgano de representación, coordinación y cooperación de la Profesión Farmacéutica, tanto en el ámbito estatal como en el internacional.

En España, en 2025, hay 81.081 profesionales farmacéuticos colegiados que desempeñan su actividad profesional en diversas modalidades de ejercicio profesional, siendo mayoritario el ejercicio profesional en la Red Asistencial de 22.231 Farmacias Comunitarias. 

En concreto, la  Farmacia Comunitaria representa un 67,8% de los colegiados; siendo Ortopedia (12,4%) y Alimentación/Nutrición y Dietética (12,3%) las siguientes actividades más ejercidas por los profesionales farmacéuticos.

Toda la información sobre la profesión farmacéutica se encuentra accesible en el portal de la Organización Farmacéutica Colegial —Colegios Provinciales, Consejos Autonómicos y Consejo General— Farmaceuticos.com

Base de Datos del Conocimiento  Sanitario - Bot PLUS 2.0.

Name: FTTH Council Europe
Description:
The FTTH Council Europe is an industry association with a mission to advance ubiquitous full fibre-based connectivity to the whole of Europe.

Fibre is the future-proof, climate-friendly infrastructure that enables an unparalleled fixed and wireless experience as well as new innovative digital technologies and services, empowering a leading Digital Society in Europe. This is a crucial prerequisite for safeguarding Europe’s global competitiveness while playing a leading global role in sustainability.

Our vision is that fibre connectivity will transform and enhance the way we live, do business and interact, connecting everyone and everything, everywhere.

FTTH Council Europe is also responsible for the organisation of the annual FTTH Conference, the largest fibre event in the world, recognised as the principle networking occasion for anyone in the business of fibre enabled technologies and services.  Since 2004, the FTTH Council team have run this event to provide all types of operators, policy makers, investors, vendors and with the opportunity to network, source information and do business.

Click here to learn more about the upcoming FTTH Conference 2023 in Madrid, Spain, happening on 18-21 April  https://bit.ly/3sa28rT

Name: Der Beauftragte der Bundesregierung für Kultur und Medien
Description: Kunst, Kultur und eine vielfältige Medienlandschaft sind tragende Säulen unserer Demokratie: Durch sie entstehen Spiegelräume der Gesellschaft, die Debatten antreiben, Konflikte verhandeln und so zu Verständigung und Toleranz beitragen. Sie zu fördern, mit passenden Rahmenbedingungen die kulturelle Infrastruktur zu stärken und Medienvielfalt sowie freie Meinungsbildung zu schützen – das sind die zentralen Aufgaben des Beauftragten der Bundesregierung für Kultur und Medien.

Name: The ANSA McAL Group
Description:

The Group operates across 11 sectors—Automotive, Beverage, Construction, Distribution, Packaging, Financial Services, Media, Retail, Real Estate, Services and Utilities—in Trinidad and Tobago, Barbados, St. Kitts and Nevis, St. Lucia, Guyana, Grenada, Jamaica, and the United States. Our continued strength is driven by our mission of "Inspiring Better Choices for a Better World."

Name: Bundesinstitut für Berufsbildung (BIBB)
Description:
Welcome to the LinkedIn account of the Federal Institute for Vocational Education and Training (BIBB).

Based on the tasks defined by the Vocational Training Act (BBiG), we are committed to developing vocational education and training in Germany. Our employees help us reach this goal every day with their commitment, expertise, and motivation. They further strengthen and shape the dual VET system in the national and international context. On our LinkedIn account, we will keep you informed about our work as well as the findings from our research. We further welcome your feedback.

We work in dialogue with science, politics, and practice and would like to continue this dialogue with you. BIBB identifies future tasks for vocational education and training, promotes innovations in vocational education and training on a national and international level, and develops new, practice-oriented recommendations for initial and continuing vocational education and training. 

On LinkedIn, we would like to connect with you and want to know: What is your perspective on initial and continuing vocational education and training? What issues are you concerned about, and what ideas or thoughts do you have in view of the current challenges?

As an employer, it is also important to us to highlight the important work our employees contribute every day and help them grow professionally. In particular, work-life balance is an integral part of BIBB's culture, right alongside diversity in the world of work. On our website, bibb.de/karriere, and on LinkedIn you will regularly find job and training opportunities in a wide range of areas at BIBB. 

We look forward to your feedback and your questions!

Name: Deutscher Nachhaltigkeitskodex (DNK)
Description:
Der Deutsche Nachhaltigkeitskodex (DNK) ist mehr als ein Berichtsstandard, der Nachhaltigkeitsleistungen transparent macht. Der DNK strukturiert und fördert die schrittweise Umsteuerung hin zu mehr Nachhaltigkeit in Unternehmen und Organisationen. Dabei hilft er den Anwenderunternehmen bei der Analyse der eigenen Geschäftstätigkeit, dem Aufbau einer Nachhaltigkeitsstrategie und ermöglicht einen Einstieg in die Nachhaltigkeitsberichterstattung. Gleichzeitig bietet er Unternehmen wertvolle Orientierung zu steigenden Berichtspflichten und deckt diese Anforderungen durch neue Berichtsoptionen ab.  
Der DNK als Prozessstandard: Die regelmäßige Berichterstattung macht die Entwicklung des Unternehmens mit seinen Veränderungsprozessen für die breite Öffentlichkeit einsehbar. Um nach dem DNK zu berichten, erstellen Anwenderunternehmen in der Datenbank eine Erklärung zu zwanzig DNK-Kriterien sowie den ergänzenden nicht-finanziellen Leistungsindikatoren. Optional berichten sie zum CSR-Richtlinien-Umsetzungsgesetz, zur EU-Taxonomie und/oder zum Nationalen Aktionsplan Wirtschaft und Menschenrechte (NAP).

Name: Global Peter Drucker Forum
Description:
The Global Peter Drucker Forum (Drucker Forum or GPDF) is an international management conference that seeks to advance a critical, international dialogue between management practitioners, academics, and other stakeholders relative to the fundamental ideas of Peter F. Drucker (1909 – 2005), the Austrian-born American management consultant, educator, and author. 

Held annually in Peter Drucker's home city of Vienna, Austria, the Drucker Forum has become one of the leading management conferences in Europe and is often hailed as the "Davos of Management". Learn more about the GPDF: http://www.druckerforum.org/

Name: San Diego S.A.
Description:
San Diego, S.A. es una empresa líder en producción de azúcar y energía con base en Guatemala y con más de 130 años de operación.   

Posee una capacidad de molienda de 2.5 millones de toneladas de caña de azúcar, produciendo más de 250 mil toneladas de azúcar al año para el mercado local y exportación alrededor del mundo.  Cuenta con capacidad de producir 148 MW de energía eléctrica para el mercado regional. San Diego, además, actúa en el mercado de bienes raíces. 

La Familia San Diego llega a integrar más de 5,000 colaboradores que con un firme compromiso con la calidad, la mejora continua de los procesos y la optimización de recursos busca a diario alcanzar mayores niveles de productividad, contribuyendo al crecimiento integral de la empresa y de Guatemala.

San Diego S.A., empresa de alcance mundial, tiene sus oficinas centrales en la ciudad de Guatemala y cuenta con operaciones en los departamentos de Escuintla, Santa Rosa y Jutiapa.  Con una evolución constante, en 1987 adquiere Ingenio Trinidad, en Masagua Escuintla, ubicando estratégicamente su sede industrial a sólo 35 kilómetros de Expogranel, la terminal de embarque de azúcar en Puerto Quetzal. 

Nuestra misión es satisfacer a nuestros clientes y consumidores con productos y servicios que cumplan con estándares y regulaciones nacionales e internacionales de calidad. Logramos esto con especial atención a nuestros colaboradores creando un ambiente de desarrollo y crecimiento personal y profesional, asegurando un negocio sostenible para beneficio de nuestros accionistas, colaboradores y comunidades donde operamos.

En San Diego generamos un mejor nivel de vida para todos los miembros de la Organización, sus familias y comunidades confirmando nuestro compromiso de trabajar por un mejor país.

Name: Stadt Köln
Description:
Gemeinsam Köln noch besser machen.

Wenn es um uns geht, müssen wir gar nicht allzu weit ausholen. Denn wir kennen uns bereits. Weil wir uns ständig begegnen: auf den Straßen, in der Bahn, im Stadion, im Büro, im Verein und in den Cafés. Weil Sie Kölner*innen sind – und auch, wenn Sie eher im Umland wohnen. Doch nun zu uns. Wir sind die Stadt Köln. Arbeitgeberin für rund 22.000 Mitarbeitende, die Köln mit ihrem Einsatz mitgestalten, am Laufen halten und mit Herz in die Zukunft führen.

Die Arbeitgeberin Stadt Köln

Stadtverwaltung Köln – das klingt zugegeben erst einmal nicht ganz so spannend. Doch ein Job bei der Stadt bedeutet bei uns alles andere als verstaubte Ämter oder Schema F. Das liegt natürlich an der Stadt Köln selbst, die für ihre Lebensfreude, Weltoffenheit und Internationalität ebenso bekannt ist, wie auch als Kulturhauptstadt, Sportmetropole und bedeutender Standort für Industrie, Handel und Wissenschaft. All das macht Köln so besonders, wie es ist. Und genau das bestimmt das Handeln unserer Mitarbeitenden, die mit viel Liebe für ihre Stadt und die hier lebenden Menschen das Beste geben.

Aber wer genau sind diese 22.000 Mitarbeitenden? Wir sind Stadtmanager*innen, Bauplaner*innen, Erzieher*innen, Informatiker*innen, Naturschützer*innen und noch einige mehr, die das öffentliche Leben in unserer Stadt gestalten. Und da unsere Stadt wächst und die Herausforderungen der Zukunft enorm sind, brauchen wir mehr von diesen engagierten Menschen. Schon heute zählen wir mehr als 700 verschiedene Berufe in unserer Stadtverwaltung. Das bedeutet: Bei uns gibt’s auch für Ihr Talent und Ihr Können den genau richtigen Platz. 

Übrigens bieten wir in all unseren Dezernaten und rund 80 Ämtern und Dienststellen weit mehr als Bürojobs. Wir sind somit Arbeitgeberin für Menschen mit den unterschiedlichsten Hintergründen und zugleich eine moderne Dienstleisterin, die die Kölner*innen in allen Lebenslagen umfassend berät und unterstützt. Wir machen Köln fit für die Zukunft!

Name: Irish Human Rights and Equality Commission
Description:
The Irish Human Rights and Equality Commission is an independent public body, appointed by the President and directly accountable to the Oireachtas. 

The Commission has a statutory remit set out under the Irish Human Rights and Equality Commission Act (2014) to protect and promote human rights and equality in Ireland, and build a culture of respect for human rights, equality and intercultural understanding in the State.

The Irish Human Rights and Equality Commission is Ireland’s national human rights institution and is recognised as such by the United Nations. The Commission is also Ireland’s national equality body for the purpose of a range of EU anti-discrimination measures.

Name: Federal Office for Economic Affairs and Export Control
Description:
The Federal Office for Economic Affairs and Export Control (BAFA) is a federal agency subordinated to the Federal Ministry for Economic Affairs and Climate Action (BMWK). 

BAFA is a client-oriented service provider for citizens and companies, from start-ups over SME’s to international corporations. On behalf of the federal government, BAFA is carrying out central programs to prevent climate change, e.g. by enhancing energy efficiency in the buildings sector or the promotion of electric mobility. 

With regard to the Federal Government's export control policy, BAFA as a central licensing authority is responsible for the administrative implementation. Together with the monitoring and investigating authorities, it is involved in a complex export control system.

In connection to the Supply Chain Act, BAFA has far-reaching supervisory powers to monitor and enforce the adoption by companies. On the other hand, it supports companies in the implementation by providing concrete information.

The Auditor Oversight Body (AOB) as a part of BAFA is responsible for the supervisory control of the Chamber of Public Accountants.

Whether in energy and climate protection, international trade, promotion of business and industry or the strengthening of human rights in global supply chains - BAFA's areas of responsibility are diverse and constantly evolving.

All provide the on-the-ground bench-strength, broad national/regional coverage and in-depth local-market knowledge and contacts that no branch office of a “global” firm could hope to emulate. Çelik grubu faaliyetlerinin yanında NFC Faydasıçok İnşaat firması ile modern sanayi siteleri kurmaktadır.

Kurucusu ve Onursal Başkanı Sn.Hasan Faydasıçok ’ un ismini uzun yıllar yaşatmak amacıyla Hasan Faydasıçok Eğitim Vakfı kurulmuştur. Faydasıçok Vakfı ile sosyal sorumluluk projelerinin kurumsal bir çerçevede planlanarak hayata geçirilmesi ve bu projelere ülke menfaatleri doğrultusunda düzenli bir şekilde katkıda bulunulması planlanmıştır.

Name: Federal Office for Civil Protection FOCP
Description:
The Federal Office for Civil Protection (FOCP) is Switzerland's national centre of expertise on civil protection matters. It lays the groundwork for and coordinates efforts to protect the population in the event of a disaster or emergency. Its core responsibilities are risk analyses, alerting and warning the public, civil protection training, telematics, protective structures and NBC protection and disarmament. Thanks to its cooperation with cantonal, national and international partners, the FOCP has the necessary capabilities, technologies and infrastructures to mount a response to a disaster or emergency.

What we do: 
•policy, research, coordination, deployment, training and infrastructure
•civil protection strategy development
•coordination of civil protection efforts in consultation with other relevant federal agencies, cantonal authorities and partner organisations
•risk-based planning of protective, rescue and relief measures
•assistance for management at federal level on civil protection matters 
•coordination of research on civil protection in general, as well as research on specific civil protection-related fields
•running of the Swiss centre of excellence on the protection from nuclear, radiological, biological and chemical threats and hazards
•running of a national emergency response organisation charged with warning, alerting and issuing instructions to the population, as well as providing the media and public with information
•provision of civil protection training at federal level in collaboration with the cantonal authorities and partner organisations
•planning and management of protective infrastructure projects, safeguarding the value of  protective structures, maintenance of technical systems and provision of civil protection material in collaboration with the cantonal authorities  
•assistance for the cantons and international input in the field of cultural property protection

Name: University of Birmingham Enterprise
Description:
University of Birmingham Enterprise supports academics who want to take their ideas to market, work with businesses and social enterprises, or do academic consultancy projects.   We do this by providing enterprise training, funding, office and laboratory space and a full technology transfer service. 

The University prides itself on producing research that is purposeful, pragmatic and pioneering.  This is evidenced in the number of patents filed each year, their development into viable technologies that are available for licensing, and the legacy of products, services and advice that have benefitted our commercial partners.   

We also establish spinout companies: University start-up companies focussed on the commercialisation of innovative  technologies invented at the University.  We also manage a portfolio of 35 spinouts, which have attracted more than £100m investment in the last 10 years, and we are continually looking for management talent that will help take the new generation of spinouts to even greater success.  

University of Birmingham Enterprise also runs services and facilities at the Birmingham Research Park, and these include the BioHub Birmingham, a biomedical incubator and accelerator, and the University’s business incubator, the BizzInn.  Finally, we run enterprise training for academics and Midlands-based entrepreneurs.

Name: Instituto Colombiano de Gobierno Corporativo ICGC
Description:
Los Institutos de Gobierno Corporativo son espacios de colaboración que existen en varios países del mundo para promover mejoras en la dirección y control de las organizaciones, contribuyendo a su exitoso desempeño. En estos espacios interactúan los actores claves de un país en materia de gobierno corporativo, como lo son: accionistas, inversionistas, alta gerencia, miembros de Junta Directiva, y representantes del gobierno, del sector financiero, de la academia, y de los organismos multilaterales, entre otros.

El Instituto Colombiano de Gobierno Corporativo – ICGC – representa este espacio en Colombia. Somos una asociación sin ánimo de lucro que congrega y articula a quienes buscan liderar de manera plural, independiente y objetiva, la promoción de mejores prácticas de dirección y control en las organizaciones, contribuyendo a su sustentabilidad y al desarrollo del país.

Esta iniciativa fue fundada el 17 de marzo de 2017 gracias al trabajo conjunto de un grupo de altos ejecutivos comprometidos con el avance del gobierno corporativo a nivel nacional, y al apoyo de instituciones reconocidas por su liderazgo en la promoción de buenas prácticas en la materia.

Además de la Corporación Financiera Internacional del Grupo Banco Mundial –IFC– que hizo parte de su proceso de fundación, contamos con el respaldo de otros organismos multilaterales y de cooperación que desempeñan un rol clave en el desarrollo de las buenas prácticas de gobierno corporativo a nivel mundial, como lo son la CAF –Banco de Desarrollo de América Latina, BID Invest y la Confederación Suiza para la Cooperación Económica y el Desarrollo –SECO–.

Pertenecemos a la Red Latinoamericana de Institutos de Gobierno Corporativo – IGCLA – a través de la cual desarrollamos iniciativas conjuntas que promuevan el desarrollo del gobierno corporativo a nivel local y regional.

Name: Soch Group
Description:
We live in a country of a billion minds and within these minds there are billions of ideas and dreams brewing. At SOCH Group, we wish to infuse life into as many of these dreams as we can. Through our nexus of businesses, we aim to establish a healthy and sustainable ecosystem around Indian start-ups, walk alongside them right from the point of conception and help them scale their business efficiently and sustainably.
Founded In 2015, SOCH Group is the brainchild of Rohit Mohan Pugalia and his wife, Purvi Pugalia. It began with a creation that came from the same place most great creations do, a necessity. In a bid to get her husband, Rohit to start snacking on healthy food, Purvi decided to apply a creative solution. She started baking healthy and delicious granola snacks for his tiffin, which not only won over his heart and stomach but also fueled his dream. Soon after, he decided to quit his job and pursue his dream of entrepreneurship by manufacturing the wonderful granola snacks. This laid the foundation for SOCH Group and its first brand, Munchilicious.
Since then, Rohit and Purvi have relentlessly channelised their hard work and passion to launch many more businesses and continually pushed them to new heights. In the process, they've managed to touch several lives, championed new dreams and fueled new ideas that promise a better tomorrow.

Name: Ministerium für Umwelt, Klima und Energiewirtschaft Baden-Württemberg
Description:
Umwelt, Klima und Energie – zu diesen Themen gestalten wir als Ministerium die Politik in Baden-Württemberg mit. 

Zu unseren Hauptschwerpunkten zählt es, unsere natürlichen Lebensgrundlagen (Wasser, Boden & Luft) zu sichern, in Baden-Württemberg die Anzahl der Treibhausgase zu minimieren, die klimafreundliche Energieversorgung auszubauen und die Artenvielfalt im Land zu erhalten. 

Für unsere rund 500 Mitarbeitenden bietet dieses breite und vielfältige Spektrum an Aufgaben zahlreiche Chancen, sich weiterzuentwickeln und gleichzeitig an der Umsetzung einer lebenswerten Zukunft mitzuwirken. Damit das gut gelingt, bieten wir als Arbeitgeber einen sicheren Job, flexible Arbeitszeiten (#Homeoffice), zahlreiche Aus- und Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten und Raum für die Vereinbarkeit von Beruf, Familie und Freizeit. 

Warum sollten Sie uns folgen? 
Auf unserem Kanal geben wir Einblicke in das Umweltministerium Baden-Württemberg als Arbeitgeber. Hier lesen Sie Wissenswertes zu unseren aktuellen Themen und Aufgaben in der Landespolitik, Infos zu zahlreichen Fördermöglichkeiten und Wettbewerben, aber auch zu internen Fragen, an denen wir als Behörde arbeiten, um uns fortlaufend weiterzuentwickeln. 

#umweltpolitik #klimaschutz #erneuerbareenergie #newwork #badenwürttemberg #behörde

Sie wollen mehr wissen? Bleiben Sie gerne mit uns im Austausch und stellen Sie Fragen in unserem Feed! Wir freuen uns!

Datenschutz: https://um.baden-wuerttemberg.de/index.php?id=22957

Úřad práce ČR za pomoci svých zaměstnanců poskytuje celou řadu služeb, jako zprostředkování zaměstnání, evidenci uchazečů a zájemců o zaměstnání, odborné poradenství při výběru povolání a změně kvalifikace, poskytování podpory v nezaměstnanosti, rekvalifikace, poskytování dávek státní sociální podpory, dávek pro osoby se zdravotním postižením, dávek pomoci v hmotné nouzi, příspěvku na péči, náhradního výživného a dávek pěstounské péče, provádění sociálního šetření v rodinách, práci sociálního pracovníka.

Name: Refika'nın Mutfağı
Description:
Refika Birgül 19 Mayıs 1980’de İstanbul’da doğdu. İstanbul Amerikan Robert Koleji’nden mezun olduktan sonra Koç Üniversitesi’nde Psikoloji bölümünü bitirdi. Lisans eğitiminden sonra da London Business School’da liderlik eğitimi aldı. Mezun olduktan sonra IF Istanbul Bağımsız Filmler Festivali ve ardından İstanbul Kültür Sanat Vakfı (IKSV) organizasyon bölümünde çalıştı. Son olarak da Özel Doğan Hastanesi’nde yaklaşık 6 sene boyunca üst düzey yönetici ve sonrasında genel müdür olarak görev yaptı. Tüm bunların sonrasında ise, içinden gelen sese kulak verip, Refika’nın Mutfağı’nı kurdu.

Refika, mevsimsellik, yerel malzeme kullanımı ve temelleri yüzyıllar öncesine dayanan tekniklere dayanan ancak bir o kadar da kolay ve güncel Türk yemeklerini eşsiz bir yorumla ele almasıyla tanınır. En büyük arzusu, son derece sıradan bir günde herhangi bir Fransız’ın, ailesine evinde lahmacun yaptığını görmektir.

Refika yaklaşık 4 yıl önce, şu an 2,3 milyonu aşkın takipçisi olan “Refika’nın Yemek Okulu” YouTube kanalını kurdu. Bu kanalın misyonu, herkesin mutfakla ilgili gereksinim duyduğu bilgilere kolay, hızlı ve ücretsiz bir şekilde ulaşabilmesidir.

2020 yılında da tüm dünyaya mutfakla ilgili ve ayrıca memleketimizin yemek kültürüyle ilgili bilgileri, teknikleri paylaşmak üzere İngilizce içeriklerin üretildiği “Refika’s Kitchen”  YouTube kanalını kurdu.

Youtube’daki varlığının yanısıra Refika Birgül 2010 yılından bu yana yemek kitabı ve gazete yazarı, televizyon programcısı olarak, 5 yemek kitabını, 3 farklı TV programını da hayata geçirdi.

2013’te Türkiye’nin, bu toprakların kıymetli el sanatlarını ve zanaatkarlarını korumayı amaç edinen “Refika'dan” markasını  kurdu. Kendi tasarımı olan ürünleri de  bu marka çatısında geliştirip üreterek, mutfakta insanların hayatını kolaylaştırmayı gaye edinmektedir.

Hem Türkçe hem İngilizce Youtube kanalının prodüksiyonunu yapan, hem de çeşitli markalara yemek odaklı video ve fotoğraflar üreten “Börek Prodüksiyon” yapım şirketi kurucusu.

Description:

Mükemmellik ve kalite kültürünü 30 yıldır yaşam biçimine dönüştürüyoruz.



KalDer – Türkiye Kalite Derneği, Türkiye‘de sanayi ve hizmet sektöründe çağdaş kalite anlayışının etkinlik kazanması, kalite bilincinin yerleştirilmesi, kalite çalışmalarının teşvik edilmesi ve dış pazarda rekabet şansımızın artması konusunda gerekli destek ve koordinasyonu sağlamak amacıyla, 1991 yılında İstanbul ‘da kurulmuştur. Bu oluşumla birlikte, amacına yönelik eğitim programları düzenlemiş ve sadece İstanbul’dan değil; Türkiye’nin her yerinden gelen eğitim taleplerine cevap vermeye başlamıştır. Merkez KalDer’in yürüttüğü faaliyetlere diğer bölgelerden de taleplerin gelmesiyle birlikte kurulan KalDer İzmir Şubesi, Ocak 1996 tarihinden bu yana faaliyetlerini devam ettirmektedir.

Name: Bundesamt für Strahlenschutz (BfS)
Description: BfS works for the safety and protection of man and the environment against damage due to ionising and non-ionising radiation. The field of ionising radiation includes, e.g., X-ray diagnosis in medicine, safety in the use of radioactive materials, among others in nuclear technology and the protection against enhanced natural radioactivity. Among the fields of work in the area of non-ionising radiation are the protection against UV radiation and the effects of mobile communication technology, precautionary protection of the population, employees in the working world and patients in the medical field being of decisive significance. Important part of radiation protection precaution are BfS's continuous measurements of radioactivity in the environment. The fields of responsibility of the BfS are radiological health protection, environmental and physico-technical radiation protection, radiological emergency management, nuclear safety, the federal custody of nuclear fuels, the management (disposal) of radioactive waste as well as the safety of transport and storage of nuclear fuels.

Name: Generalsekretariat GS-EJPD
Description:
Im GS-EJPD – der Stabstelle von Departementsvorsteher Beat Jans – schaffen wir optimale Voraussetzungen, die es dem Bundesrat erlauben, seine Aufgaben als Regierungsmitglied gegenüber der Öffentlichkeit zu erfüllen. Gut 150 Mitarbeitende sorgen unter der Co-Leitung von Generalsekretärin Nora Bertschi und Generalsekretär Sebastian Kölliker dafür, dass u.a. die Koordination zwischen den Ämtern reibungslos abläuft, Entscheidungsgrundlagen für Bundesrats-, Parlaments- und andere wichtige Geschäfte bereitgestellt wie auch die zur Verfügung stehenden Mittel bewirtschaftet werden.

Verteilt auf die Verwaltungseinheiten Staatssekretariat für Migration (SEM), Bundesamt für Justiz (BJ) und Bundesamt für Polizei (fedpol), umfasst das EJPD insgesamt rund 3000 Mitarbeitende. Zudem ist das EJPD auch Aufsichtsbehörde von selbständig geführten Einheiten: Institut für Metrologie (METAS), Institut für geistiges Eigentum (IGE), Revisionsaufsichtsbehörde (RAB) und Schweizerisches Institut für Rechtsvergleichung (SIR). Weiter sind dem EJPD auch diverse Kommissionen zugehörig.

Arbeiten im EJPD bedeutet: Arbeiten für die Menschen. Sei dies bei Prozessen zu Migration, Integration oder Asyl, der Gesetzgebung zu zivil- und strafrechtlichen Themen oder auch beim Schutz der Bevölkerung und der Bekämpfung von Kriminalität. 

Arbeiten im EJPD bedeutet aber auch:
- Flexibilität dank der Jahresarbeitszeit
- Mobiles Arbeiten in vielen Tätigkeiten
- Fünf bis sieben Wochen Ferien
- Attraktives und breites Aus- und Weiterbildungsangebot 
- Vielfältige Optionen beim Übergang ins Rentenalter
- Vier Monate Mutterschaftsurlaub, zwanzig Arbeitstage Vaterschaftsurlaub oder zwei Monate Urlaub bei Adoption

Name: Florida CFO Group
Description:
Founded in 2010, the Florida CFO Group provides part-time and interim CFO services to growth companies. This includes assisting in raising funds, mergers and acquisitions, recapitalization, exit and succession planning, and structuring to meet ongoing opportunities. 

Each of our partners is a career CFO, and many have been providing CFO services on a fractional share or interim basis over the past decade or more. Our partners’ focus on cost-effective financial reporting, budgeting, forecasting, controls, and fiscal management yields results. Each partner brings a wide-range of CFO skills and a wealth of experience to clients in a consultative partnership 

Our approach to client service includes two core guiding principles. First, we implement our CFO services to leverage our client’s full-time permanent accounting and finance staff whenever possible. Secondly, we believe in a proactive approach to the CFO function and the financial leadership of our client’s executive management team. 

As consulting CFO’s, we believe our role as “Chief Profitability Officer” resides fully with our clients and our scope of recommended services always makes this a priority. Our frequency of being on-site depends on inclusion in the executive management team, as well as the needs of the accounting and finance function. For more information on the Florida CFO Group and its partners, please visit our website at www.floridacfogroup.com.

Name: The Cowork Spaces - India
Description:
The Rise of Coworking Spaces in India:
Coworking spaces have become increasingly popular in India over the past few years. With the growth of the startup sector and the demand for flexible workspace solutions, coworking spaces have become a cost-effective and convenient alternative to traditional office spaces. In this blog, we will explore the trends and numbers behind the rise of coworking spaces in India, including the growth of the coworking aggregator platform market, the industries driving the demand for coworking spaces, and the expanding market for coworking spaces in both large and small cities. 
Coworking operators offer businesses up to 25% savings on office costs, and they provide an easy and efficient way to find and book suitable coworking spaces, saving them time and effort. 
According to reports, the coworking industry in India is projected to grow at a CAGR of 16% from 2021 to 2026. This growth can be attributed to the rise of startups and the increasing demand for flexible workspace solutions. India is currently home to the 3rd largest startup ecosystem in the world, and this has led to a significant increase in demand for coworking spaces.
The IT and technology sectors are the biggest users.

Name: Fernstraßen-Bundesamt
Description:
2018 errichtet ist das Fernstraßen-Bundesamt (FBA) eine unabhängige Aufsichts- und Genehmigungsbehörde für die Bundesautobahnen und sonstige Bundesfernstraßen im Geschäftsbereich des Bundesministeriums für Verkehr (BMV). Als Bundesoberbehörde nimmt das FBA überwiegend hoheitliche Aufgaben wahr.

Zuständigkeit:
- Widmung, Umstufung und Einziehung,
- Bestimmung der Planung und Linienführung für Bundesfernstraßen,
- Planfeststellung und -genehmigung für den Bau oder die Änderung von Bundesautobahnen einschließlich der vorgeschriebenen Anhörungen, und Wahrnehmung der Rechts- und Fachaufsicht über die Autobahn GmbH des Bundes.
- Unterstützung des BMV in Bezug auf die Bundesfernstraßen bei der Wahrnehmung der Aufsicht über die Auftragsverwaltung der Länder, Erarbeitung von Rechts- und Verwaltungsvorschriften sowie bei der zwischenstaatlichen Zusammenarbeit.

Hauptsitz ist Leipzig mit Standorten in Bonn, Gießen und Hannover.

Unsere Datenschutzerklärung finden Sie hier: 
https://www.fba.bund.de/DE/Service/Datenschutz/datenschutz_node.html

That is when the idea of an online portal, where individuals could come to sell freely without the overhead of tackling a wide range of technical and skill hurdles, came to her. SC was born. Leza set about cutting the technical challenges down until almost anyone could sign up and make money online. She partnered with cosmetics and beauty product suppliers worldwide and grew determined to offer price competitive products, not for simple commercial gain, but to make it worthwhile for individuals everywhere to gain access to her powerful selling platform.From the outset, the objective of the SC website was to create immediate solutions to the monetary and social problems of a large number of people.

Description:
Het Innovatieprogramma De AgroProeftuin is dé broedplaats voor vernieuwing en verduurzaming in de agrarische sector in Noordoost-Brabant. Wij nodigen agrarisch ondernemers en andere vernieuwers in de (voedsel)keten uit samen in de praktijk te leren, experimenteren en innoveren. 

Ons doel 
We zoeken innovatieve, toekomstbestendige landbouwoplossingen voor de maatschappelijke uitdagingen van dit moment. Denk aan schoon water, gezonde bodem, biodiversiteit en meer.

Samen ontwikkelen wij nieuwe, complete aanpakken om kringlooplandbouw in de praktijk mogelijk te maken. Het programma biedt een vruchtbare voedingsbodem voor toekomstbestendige verduurzaming van de (voedsel)productie. Hierbij zijn een gezonde bodem en schoon water leidend. 

Centraal staan de ondernemers, hun bedrijfssystemen en verdienmodellen én het sluiten van kringlopen. Kennisontwikkeling voor ondernemers, ketenpartijen en beleidsmakers gericht op innovaties in praktijk is de basis van het innovatieprogramma.

Name: Nationalpark Bayerischer Wald
Description:
Entlang der bayerisch tschechischen Grenze erstreckt sich zwischen Bayerisch Eisenstein im Landkreis Regen und Mauth im Landkreis Freyung-Grafenau der Nationalpark Bayerischer Wald. Am 7. Oktober 1970 wurde das Großschutzgebiet als erster Nationalpark Deutschlands eröffnet. Zusammen mit dem Nachbar-Nationalpark Šumava in Tschechien bildet er das größte zusammenhängende Waldschutzgebiet Mitteleuropas. Auf mehr als 24 000 Hektar gilt im Bayerischen Wald der Leitsatz „Natur Natur sein lassen“. 

Verwaltet wird das Gebiet von der Nationalparkverwaltung Bayerischer Wald, einer Sonderbehörde des Bayerischen Staatsministeriums für Umwelt und Verbraucherschutz. Zu den Aufgaben gehören neben dem Naturschutz unter anderem auch die Bereiche Forschung, Umweltbildung und Regionalförderung.

Mr. Sammons believed in working hard, investing for the long term, and rewarding the people who worked for him. His core values continue to be reflected in the operations of the enterprise today, which is proudly employee-owned.

SEI’s ESOP (Employee Stock Ownership Plan) allows each employee to share in the value created, no matter what role they hold. It offers increased retirement savings while fostering loyalty and commitment to the business—and each other.

Sammons continues to grow, but currently maintains long-term investments in the financial services, industrial, infrastructure, real estate and investment sectors, while remaining committed to the philosophies of their founder. With over $10 billion in annual revenues and over $143 billion in assets, Sammons is one of the largest privately-held companies in the United States.

The mission of the Bay County Chamber is “To create superior value for all chamber members, large and small; to cultivate economic and personal development; promote and protect a competitive enterprise system of business; be a community leader, while embracing Bay County’s opportunities and challenges”. 

The Chamber is not a division of the U.S. or State Chamber or a part of any government. We are not run by a small group of big businesses. In fact, 85% of the membership is comprised of businesses with 35 or fewer employees. We are a volunteer organization, owned by the membership, governed by a board and executive committee, managed by a paid staff and accountable to the membership. The Chamber of Commerce is governed by a volunteer board of directors. They are responsible for our financial accountability and policy. The Chamber exists to make Bay County a better place to live, work and play and is always striving to create value for our membership and helping your business grow. The Bay County Chamber is certified by the Florida Association of Chamber Professionals, a certification that sets the highest standards for Chambers of Commerce across the state of Florida. The Bay County Chamber is also award winning having won “Chamber of the Year” by the Florida Association of Chamber Professionals in 2004, 2010 and in 2016. For more information, please call our office at 850.785.5206 or visit PanamaCity.org.

Name: Stadt Reutlingen
Description:
Die Stadt Reutlingen ist eine vitale, selbstbewusste Stadt, als Oberzentrum Teil der Europäischen Metropolregion Stuttgart und in unmittelbarer Nachbarschaft zur landschaftlich reizvollen Schwäbischen Alb gelegen. Mit 115.000 Einwohnern ist Reutlingen als ehemalige Freie Reichsstadt ein dynamischer Dienstleistungs-, Handels, Technologie- und Industriestandort mit einer Vielzahl kultureller, sportlicher und sozialer Einrichtungen.

Mit mehr als 2.200 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern ist die Stadtverwaltung der zweitgrößte Arbeitgeber in Reutlingen. Sie bietet mit ihren Eigenbetrieben, den Technischen Betriebsdiensten Reutlingen (TBR) und der Stadtentwässerung Reutlingen (SER), eine Vielzahl von Möglichkeiten, sich beruflich zu engagieren, zu entwickeln und Führungsverantwortung zu übernehmen. 

Wir suchen daher fortlaufend Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter mit den unterschiedlichsten Qualifikationen, die mit ihrem Einsatz dazu beitragen, dass die Stadt Reutlingen eine attraktive Großstadt bleibt und sich weiter entwickelt. In interdisziplinären Teams arbeiten bei uns unter anderem Fachleute aus den Bereichen Verwaltung, Betriebswirtschaft, Pädagogik, Informatik, Bibliothekswesen, Technik und Handwerk zusammen. 

Die Anstrengungen unserer Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter gelten den Bürgerinnen und Bürgern der Stadt, deren Wünsche und Anliegen wir schnell und kompetent bearbeiten. Hierbei suchen wir täglich nach Wegen, um unseren Service noch effizienter und  bürgerfreundlicher zu gestalten.

Wir sind eine moderne Stadtverwaltung, die gesellschaftliche Vielfalt im Alltag lebt. Wir pflegen eine Unternehmenskultur, die von gegenseitigem Respekt und Wertschätzung geprägt ist. Die Förderung der Chancengleichheit aller Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter ist für uns selbstverständlich. 

Im Mai 2016 wurden wir für unsere familienbewusste Personalpolitik mit dem Zertifikat „audit berufundfamilie“ der gemeinnützigen Hertie-Stiftung ausgezeichnet.

www.reutlingen.de/karriere

RELAI fue formalmente creada en abril de 2019, en el marco de la reunión de Lima, y su constitución es posible gracias a un proyecto de cooperación técnica del Banco Interamericano de Desarrollo (BID), que continúa apoyando el funcionamiento de RELAI, organizando, coordinando y financiando sus principales actividades.

La administración de RELAI está a cargo de un Consejo Directivo integrado por un representante titular y un representante suplente de cada agencia socia. La presidencia de este órgano es rotativa durante un período de un año.

Name: Washington Consular Services, Inc
Description:
If you need your documents certified for international use, look no further Washington Consular Services can help you.

With over 30 years of experience, Washington Consular Services (WCS) is a boutique consulting company, and we are the leading experts in our field. We specialize in helping individuals and companies with their international and transactional needs.  WCS provides services for an "Apostille" (which means certification in french) including Consular Legalization. 

Many countries joined The Hague Convention of 1961. The treaty otherwise referred to as the "Apostille Convention" abolished the laborious multi-step process. The Convention was created with the intent to simplify the verification of public documents for international use. However, for those countries who are not part of the Apostille treaty, we provide clients with the "Consular Legalization", which involves further endorsements and guarantees.

Any type of food, cosmetic, pharmaceuticals or medical device product that you wish to market in another country needs must be authenticated by an official. Documents to be authenticated must first prove legitimacy by a designated party in the United States, or you won't be able to market or sell in a foreign entity. 

There are many types of Documents eligible for this service. Here are just a few: 

1) Government Documents: Federal; State; and Local.
2) General Documents: Marriage & Death Certificates; Academic Diplomas; Patents, Legal documents; Power of Attorney; FDA; and Compliance Regulations Records. 
3) Commercial/Shipping Documents: Exporting Products; Invoices, etc.,

We are located in the heart of the nations capital and in close proximity to embassies and consulates. Our valued customers have come to rely on us for our expertise to get their official documents authenticated with speed, affordability, and efficiency. 

We're here for you! For more information call us anytime at 1-866-255-2627 or visit www.wcss.com

Name: Outdoors NSW & ACT
Description:
We are the peak body for the outdoor pursuits that support health, wellbeing and skill development outcomes in NSW & the ACT, the organisation, (formerly known as ORIC), represents the outdoor community, advances outdoor standards, safety and practices, and fosters greater participation in the outdoors.

Outdoors NSW & ACT exists to support its members in getting more of our community active for their own health and wellbeing. Our industry saves $480 Million in the health care system every year by getting people active and reducing risks of health conditions brought about by inactivity. 

We have been in existence since 1984, celebrating our 40th year next year. 

Our organisation gets people active in 4 areas; Outdoor Recreation, Outdoor Education, Adventure Tourism & Nature Therapy. Each providing connection with nature which is highly researched as an antidote for mental health challenges, vitamin D intakes and better regulated breathing. In addition the skills people learn in the outdoors include social skills, resilience and skills for life (that can't be taught in a classroom) . 

Every year we search for ways to improve our reach and communications to audiences and provide them with opportunities to better instil better health outcomes for them. Beyond these physical advantages, our programs instil invaluable life skills such as social interaction, resilience, and character development—attributes that are often elusive within the confines of a classroom. As we continually strive to broaden our reach and enhance our communication efforts, we are unwavering in our commitment to providing opportunities that empower individuals to attain better health outcomes.

For membership queries contact 1300 964 246 or email contact@outdoorsnswact.com.au
https://www.hopp.bio/outdoors-nsw-act

Name: Bayerisches Staatsministerium für Wirtschaft, Landesentwicklung und Energie
Description:
Wie wird sichergestellt, dass Bayern eine möglichst dezentrale und nachhaltige Energieversorgung erhält? Mit welchen Maßnahmen kann man den mittelständischen Betrieben bei der Digitalisierung helfen? Und wie kann das Flächensparen noch besser gelingen?

Als Bayerisches Staatsministerium für Wirtschaft, Landesentwicklung und Energie kümmern wir uns um diese Herausforderungen und finden Antworten auf die Fragen der Unternehmen, Bürger und Kommunen. Im Fokus stehen dabei so vielfältige Themen wie Mittelstandspolitik, Digitalisierung, Energiewende, Landesentwicklung oder auch Mobilfunkinfrastruktur.

Wir sorgen dafür, dass der Freistaat als Standort für die Wirtschaft auch in Zukunft zur Weltspitze gehört. Alle Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmer sollen die besten Voraussetzungen für ihren wirtschaftlichen Erfolg haben – davon sind wir überzeugt. Deshalb setzen wir uns nicht nur für eine hohe Wettbewerbsfähigkeit ein, sondern fördern auch Innovationen, unterstützen Gründer und arbeiten daran, dass attraktive Beschäftigungsmöglichkeiten entstehen.

Wir kennen die Interessen der bayerischen Betriebe: vom Weltkonzern bis zum mittelständischen Familienbetrieb, von der Industrie über Handwerk und Tourismus bis hin zum Handel. Wirtschaftspolitischer Kompass unserer Arbeit ist die Soziale Marktwirtschaft. Auf diese Weise schaffen wir Wohlstand für alle Menschen in unserem Land.

Ganz konkret unterstützen wir die Betriebe in Form vieler Förderprogramme, wie zum Beispiel dem Digitalbonus oder der Hightech Agenda Bayern. Einen Überblick zu allen Programmen findet ihr hier: www.stmwi.bayern.de/service/foerderprogramme.

Übrigens: Auch Ludwig Erhard, Vater der Sozialen Marktwirtschaft und späterer Bundeskanzler, war von Oktober 1945 bis Dezember 1946 bayerischer Wirtschaftsminister. 

Impressum: q.bayern.de/imprint

Name: SBA Group
Description:
SBA group is one of the largest Lithuanian-capital enterprises investing in state-of-the-art innovations to create a better environment. The activities of SBA companies focus on furniture, textile, real estate sectors ant investment management. SBA group unites 30 enterprises running in Lithuania and other Baltic and CEE countries with more than 3500 people working there. Its annual turnover was 400 million euros in 2023. More than 90 percent of SBA companies’ production is exported to 50 countries worldwide. 

Invent Everyday, for the Better - this is a mission of SBA companies. Innovative solutions, modern and environmentally friendly systems help ensure sustainable business development with maximum attention for the people and the environment and minimum footprint on the planet. 

The main SBA business areas:
 SBA Home unites furniture producers Klaipėdos baldai, Šilutės baldai, Inno Line, Visagino linija and Kauno baldai, "Innovo logistika". These factories operate in 210 thousand square meters. 
SBA Apparel units innovative textile companies Utenos Trikotažas and Šatrija in Lithuania and Mrija in Ukraine. 9 million meters and 3 million units of innovative textiles are created annually. Utenos and About are the B2C brands. 
 Innovative real estate development company SBA Urban develops commercial and residential real estate. 54 thousand square meters of commercial real estate was developed in Vilnius (Green Hall valley, Monday Office open space) and Kaunas (Kauno dokas and Business Leaders Center).
Investment in real estate is managed by Capitalica Asset Management which owns business centres 135 in Vilnius, Kauno dokas in Kaunas and shopping centre Luizė in Klaipėda. It also developed business centre VERDE in Riga's Skanste district.

SBA was established in 1990. Its headquarters are located in Vilnius and Kaunas.

Name: Private Directors Association
Description:
Good Governance Begins With a Solid Foundation

Who We Are: Our sole focus is on the unique governance needs of private companies throughout the lifecycle of their businesses. Good governance drives private company growth which in turn helps build strong communities and economies.

The Private Directors Association, established in 2014, is an independent 501(c)(6) organization based in Chicago. It stands as the sole national association devoted to enhancing the growth and sustainability of private companies through effective board governance.

PDA's mission is to drive private company success through the creation and optimization of governance boards, comprised of qualified and diverse members.

Our vision is for the Private Directors Association to become the leading professional association for private company directors, advocating and championing board excellence.

With a membership exceeding 3,400+, the association represents a diverse and highly skilled community of executive leaders, encompassing current and prospective board members, private company owners, C-level executives of family-owned businesses, ESOPs, private equity-backed companies, and early-stage ventures.

Our members engage across our 20 Chapters nationwide (and growing) to promote the mission of enhancing corporate value through high-performing boards.

Our value lies in our exclusive focus on addressing the distinctive governance requirements of private companies throughout their business lifecycle. We recognize that strong governance drives private company growth, thereby contributing to the development of robust communities and economies.

For more information, visit privatedirectors.org or call 847.986.9350.

Name: Stadt Bern
Description:
Die Stadtverwaltung besteht aus fünf Direktionen und verschiedenen Stabsstellen, die den Gemeinderat der Stadt Bern bei der Erfüllung seiner Aufgaben unterstützen.

Die Direktionen

Die Präsidialdirektion erfüllt verschiedene Querschnittsaufgaben, leitet und koordiniert die politische Planung des Gemeinderats und die ganzheitliche Stadtentwicklung.

Die Direktion für Sicherheit, Umwelt und Energie ist für die Bereiche Sicherheit, Schutz, Rettung, Umweltschutz, Wasser- und Energieversorgung sowie die Wirtschaftsförderung zuständig.

Die Schwerpunkte der Direktion für Bildung, Soziales und Sport sind: Kindergarten, Volksschule, Kinderbetreuung, Jugend, Alter, Sozialhilfe, Integration, Sport, Gesundheit und Sucht.

Die Direktion für Tiefbau, Verkehr und Stadtgrün ist verantwortlich für die Tiefbauinfrastruktur, die Stadtentwässerung, die Verkehrsplanung, die Grünanlagen in der Stadt Bern, die amtliche Vermessung und die Abfallentsorgung.

Die Direktion für Finanzen, Personal und Informatik erbringt vor allem verwaltungsinterne Dienstleistungen. Sie ist zuständig für die Finanzen, die Steuern, die Liegenschaften der Stadt Bern, die Personalverwaltung sowie für Informatikversorgung und Material der Stadtverwaltung.

Name: Strategic PA Network
Description:
Strategic PA Network is an active professional networking group for high performing Personal Assistants, Executive Assistants, Virtual Assistants, Administrators and Office Managers based in the UK. We are not county specific – anyone is welcome to attend, we also welcome international connections.

Events are listed on our website - www.strategicpanetwork.com - if you are thinking of coming along please do! We are a friendly group, all inclusive, everyone who attends has a desire to learn new things and connect with likeminded peers. 

“Working as a PA, EA or VA you have to be self-sufficient a majority of the time and it is not often you work as part of a team. Joining the Strategic PA Network (formerly BBO PA Network) feels like joining my own team, a group of like-minded, driven individuals who encourage, support and push one another. The network provides development opportunities businesses cannot always provide their support staff. It also, is an inclusive environment, giving you the opportunity to network with peers, companies, and speakers with whom you wouldn’t necessarily get the chance to meet!” Feb 2019

The network was established by Sarah Howson in 2015 whilst she was on maternity leave out of frustration for a lack of networking events for Assistant. The network provides a friendly, safe and inclusive environment to:
- Share Best Practice
- Discuss Ideas
- Build Relationships
- Inspire One Another
- Learn From Each Other

In person events are hosted at various London, Buckinghamshire, Berkshire and Oxfordshire venues.

We have been fortunate enough to have some interesting and thought-provoking speakers in the past. Each networking event includes stimulating elements of learning and development.

We want all members to leave our events feeling part of something and inspired!

Name: Innovation City Cape Town
Description:
Innovation City Cape Town is South Africa's first truly international innovation collaboration space. 
Innovation City is a invitation-only community of digital start-ups, scale-ups, corporates, intrapreneurs, entrepreneurs, world changers and innovators.  It is a world-class network that wants to help accelerate digital innovation in Cape Town through fostering co-creation. 
Through partnership with Epicenter Stockholm and its 500+ membership companies, Innovation City can help fast track Cape Town's digital ambitions.

Name: American Astronomical Society (AAS)
Description: The American Astronomical Society (AAS), established in 1899, is a major international organization of professional astronomers, astronomy educators, and amateur astronomers. Its membership of approximately 8,000 also includes physicists, geologists, engineers, and others whose interests lie within the broad spectrum of subjects now comprising the astronomical sciences. The mission of the AAS is to enhance and share humanity’s scientific understanding of the universe as a diverse and inclusive astronomical community, which it achieves through publishing, meetings, science advocacy, education and outreach, and training and professional development.

Name: Ahlatcı Holding
Description:
Ahlatcı Holding, bugün yurtiçi ve yurtdışında 58 şirketi 5 binden fazla çalışanıyla, enerjiden sağlığa, kıymetli madenlerden finansa, ileri teknolojilerden otomotive, havacılıktan madenciliğe, gayrimenkul yatırımından savunma sanayine uzanan geniş bir yelpazede 10 farklı sektörde faaliyetine hız kesmeden devam etmektedir.

Yıllık 2,4 trilyon TL’lik yıllık cirosu ve 6 milyar dolarlık ihracatı ile kuruluş vizyonu ve hedefleri doğrultusunda emin adımlarla ilerlemektedir. Her yıl olduğu gibi bu yılda Fortune 500 Türkiye sıralamasında, Ahlatcı Holding iştirakleri Türkiye’nin en değerli ilk 30 şirketi arasında yerini koruyarak Ahlatcı Kuyumculuk 4,  Ahlatcı Metal Rafineri 28. sırada yer almıştır.

Küresel kıymetli madenler piyasasında yarım asrı geride bırakan Ahlatcı Holding, gelecek nesillere daha iyi bir dünya bırakmak için geliştirmekte olduğu yenilikçi ürün çözümleri ile bugün ülkenin ve bölgenin hatta dünyanın dört bir yanında finanstan sağlığa, savunma sanayinden enerjiye, havacılıktan elektronik para kullanımına uzanan geniş bir yelpazede ülke insanını geleceğe, daha yeşil ve sürdürülebilir bir dünyaya, tüm işletmelerini kârlılığa, iş ortaklarını ise başarıya taşıyarak devam etmektedir.

Ahlatcı Holding çatısı altında faaliyet gösteren tüm şirketleri, yenilikçi fikirlerle, ülkenin her kesimine her konuda çağın gereksinimlerine uygun çözüm odaklı hizmet üreterek ülke ekonomisinin yürütücü gücü olarak sektörlerinde en önemli aktörler arasında yer almaktadır.

Ahlatcı Holding sürdürülebilir çözüm üretme misyonu ile geleceğin ihtiyacı olan var olduğu tüm sektörlerdeki yenilikleri yakından takip ederek yatırımlarına ve çalışmalarına hızla devam etmekte, her geçen gün sektörel faaliyetlerini zenginleştirmektedir.

Ahlatcı Holding, bünyesindeki grup şirketlerinin yanında, Ahlatcı Eğitim Vakıfı aracılığıyla başlattığı sosyal sorumluluk projeler ve gerçekleştirdiği etkinliklerle sürdürülebilir bir toplumsal fayda yaratmayı hedeflemektedir.

Name: Stadt Luzern
Description:
Die Stadt Luzern zählt rund 83'000 Einwohnerinnen und Einwohner und ist die Hauptstadt des Kantons Luzern. Sie ist Standort von Universität und Fachhochschulen und das kulturelle Zentrum der Zentralschweiz. Gegen 90 Prozent der Beschäftigten sind im Dienstleistungssektor tätig. 

Unser Engagement für zufriedene Mitarbeitende:
Vielfältige Aufgabenbereiche, sichere Arbeitsplätze, soziales Engagement, exzellente Möglichkeiten für eine ausgewogene Work-Life-Balance sowie fortschrittliche Arbeits- und Anstellungsbedingungen zeichnen die Stadt Luzern als Arbeitgeberin aus. Dazu zählen ein gerechtes, transparentes Lohnsystem und vorteilhafte Sozialleistungen, familienfreundliche Anstellungsbedingungen, verschiedene Arbeitszeitmodelle, Engagement für die Gesundheit, Gleichstellung von Frauen und Männern sowie ein breites Aus- und Weiterbildungsangebot.

Suchen Sie eine neue Herausforderung?
Die Stadt Luzern als Verwaltung beschäftigt in über 100 verschiedenen Tätigkeiten rund 1‘700 Mitarbeitende sowie 900 Lehrpersonen und bildet mehr als 60 Lernende in 12 Berufen aus. Wir suchen stets qualifizierte Mitarbeitende für die abwechslungsreichen Aufgaben in einer Stadtverwaltung. Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Bewerbung.

Unser vollständiges Stellenangebot sowie unsere Anstellungsbedingungen finden Sie unter www.jobs.stadtluzern.ch

Name: Alserkal Group
Description:
Founded in 1947 by Mr. Nasser bin Abdullatif Alserkal, the Alserkal Group of companies group of companies have made their longstanding mark within the market as one of the established Emirati companies that continues to prosper with its ever-growing reach and solidified connections within the UAE and its neighboring countries.

Having been active for more than 60 years, Alserkal Group of companies and its subsidies have played an important role in the overall development of the UAE and its trading sector. Starting of a Real Estate and General Trading entity the Alserkal Group of companies expanded its reach and servicing sectors by partnering with key names such as Bridgestone tires and Apollo tires.
Its various other activities include Travel and Tourism, Facilities Management, Properties and cultural initiatives.
Alserkal resounds within the walls of SEWA (Sharjah Electricity and Water Authorities), DEWA (Dubai Electricity and Water Authorities), Etisalat (UAE’s Communication facet), Emirates NBD and many more as an integral part of the board, aiding establishment. The current generation, Mr. Ahmad Alserkal and the family play stake holders to the entities and continue on the legacy of the Alserkal name.

Mr. Nasser bin Abdullatif begun as a businessman with the community and the growth of the country marked as priority in his ambitious plans. He surpassed several milestones that boosted UAE’s trading growth by being the first to commercialize electricity, introduce water drilling and generators, oversaw the establishment of the UAE’s first Telephone Company.

Alongside its corporate aspect of business, the Alserkal Group of companies partake in social events that in community and tram building. All the units functioning under the Group of companies take pride in their local history and emulate the very same importance as it Alserkal Group of companies did decades ago and perseveres to continue on this path of flourishing business with the community at its heart.

Name: Bayerisches Staatsministerium für Wohnen, Bau und Verkehr
Description:
Das Bayerische Staatsministerium für Wohnen, Bau und Verkehr ist für alle Bereiche des Bauens und des Verkehrs sowie die Wohnraum- und Städtebauförderung in Bayern zuständig. Auch die staatlichen Bau-, Grundstücks- und Wohnungsbaugesellschaften sowie die Immobilienverwaltung des Freistaats sind Teile des Bayerischen Staatsministeriums für Wohnen, Bau und Verkehr. Dabei bringen wir nicht nur Bauten und Straßen weiter, sondern auch Menschen. Wir bieten Arbeitsplätze in spannenden Berufen und verfügen über vielfältige Angebote im Bereich Ausbildung & Studium. Und in unseren Stellenanzeigen findest Du vielleicht genau die passende Herausforderung für Dich.

#wirbauenbayern

Karriere: www.wir-bauen-bayern.de

Name: Epicenter Stockholm
Description:
Epicenter is Stockholm’s first House of Digital Innovation at the heart of the city and Sweden’s digital landscape. At Epicenter members are invited to innovate alongside the world’s fastest growing digital companies and creative corporate initiatives. Within Epicenter, Swedish and international entrepreneurs and companies meet to collaborate, learn and grow their businesses. 

Epicenter runs corporate innovation labs, provides fast growing digital companies with flexible work space, as well as knowledge and creativity through seminars and educational programs for companies and organizations that wish to learn more about digital opportunities and corporate innovation. 

The conception and development of Epicenter is based on the founding teams extensive knowledge in building companies designed to create innovation with impact. 

Epicenter is managed by growth experts Result and leading digital knowledge event Sime and is part of AMF Fastigheter's Mood Stockholm.

Name: UDD Ventures
Description:
UDD Ventures Aceleradora apoya emprendedores de todo Chile - sean o no de UDD - con proyectos que tienen al menos una validación técnica y están cercanos a comercializar. Seleccionamos emprendimientos de todas las industrias, aunque tenemos una línea de especialización en el área Salud. 

Contamos con financiamiento SSAF (Subsidio Semilla Asignación Flexible) de Corfo, mediante el cual entregamos co-financiamiento de hasta 60 MM$ a emprendimientos dinámicos (tienen una capacidad de duplicarse cada 3 años) e innovadores. Además, somos patrocinadores de CORFO e Innova BioBio, con lo cual también podemos apoyar otras líneas de financiamiento que varían entre 5 y 50 MM$. Aparte de financiamiento, entregamos mentoría, asesoría, talleres, redes y networking.

Name: Tarım Kredi Holding
Description: Headquarted in Ankara Turkey, Tarim Kredi Holding Inc. was established in order to consolidate the 18 companies owned by The Agricultural Credit Cooperatives of Turkey (ACC). These companies operate in diversified fields including production, distribution and international trade of food, fertilizer, seed, animal feed, drip irrigation and green house materials, agrochemicals, animal husbandry and also services as insurance, pension, logistics, foreign trade, IT and licenced warehousing. In the light of 155 years of knowledge and experience in the Turkish agriculture, The Agricultural Credit Cooperatives of Turkey is the biggest organisation which meets all kinds of agricultural input needs and credit requirements of its approximately 1.1 million members with 17 regional unions, 1615 cooperatives 204 service operation offices and 20.957 employees all over Turkey.

Name: Erciyes Teknopark
Description: Erciyes Üniversitesi Teknoloji Geliştirme Bölgesi(Erciyes Teknopark) 30 Nisan 2004 tarihli resmi gazetede Teknoloji Geliştirme Bölgesi olarak toplamda 277.074,24 m2’lik bir alana sahip olarak ilan edilmiştir. Yönetici şirket Erciyes Teknopark A.Ş. Erciyes Teknopark’ın vizyonunun ve amaçlarının gerçekleştirilmesinden birinci derecede sorumlu tüzel kişiliktir. 4691 sayılı Teknoloji Geliştirme Bölgeleri Yasası kapsamında Erciyes Üniversitesi Teknoloji Geliştirme Bölgesi yönetici şirketi olarak görev yapan Erciyes Teknopark A.Ş. 8 Şubat 2005 tarihinde kurulmuştur.

Name: CC Industries
Description:
CC Industries, (“CCI”) is a Chicago-based professional services company for the Crown family’s portfolio of industrial company assets.

Privacy Policy
At CC Industries, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This privacy policy outlines how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard the information you provide to us through our website, services, including any data collected during the recruiting process, and interactions with our company.  

Information We Collect
We may collect various types of information, including, personal Information - Information that can identify you, such as your name, address, email address, phone number, company affiliation, and other contact details.  

Information Sharing
No mobile information will be shared with third parties/affiliates for marketing/promotional purposes. All the above categories exclude text messaging originator opt-in data and consent; this information will not be shared with any third parties. 

Data Security
We implement security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.  

Change to This Privacy Policy
We may update this privacy policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the updated policy on our website. 

Contact Us
If you have any questions, concerns, or feedback about our privacy practices or this policy, please contact us.

The aim is to create an exclusive and inimitable luxurious experience setting new benchmarks with their detailed high standards.

Name: Cyber Valley
Description:
Cyber Valley is Europe’s largest and leading research consortium in the field of artificial intelligence (AI) and modern robotics. Cyber Valley has a mission and a public mandate to advocate for entrepreneurship, research, development, application, and acceptance of technologies and methods in the field of intelligent systems. The company envisions a future where the full potential of intelligent systems is leveraged for the greater good of the world.

The Cyber Valley Community connects partners from science, industry, and society, along with AI researchers and entrepreneurs. The Cyber Valley GmbH is funded by the state of Baden-Württemberg and acts as the central organizer, service provider, and host for the Cyber Valley Community. While the GmbH operates from Stuttgart and Tübingen, Cyber Valley has a larger scope: As a national and European driving force, it attracts the best people from all over the world to create the future with AI.

Name: Khoury Group
Description:
Since 1952, Khoury Group, established by George M Khoury, has been a trusted name in delivering exceptional pharmaceuticals and consumer supplies throughout Jordan. With a legacy spanning over decades, the group has consistently demonstrated expertise and innovation in the industry.

At the heart of Khoury Group II is Khoury Drugstore Co. (KDS), the flagship company specializing in pharmaceutical storage, distribution, sales, and marketing. KDS takes pride in providing unparalleled customer care and ensuring widespread availability of its products in every pharmacy across Jordan.

Khoury Group II is also leading the way in dental product and equipment sales in Jordan through Khoury Medical and Dental Co. (KMD). Moreover, the group's cosmetics and pharmaceutical manufacturing arm, 3R Pharmaceutical Industries (GMP certified), is revolutionizing secondary packaging and toll manufacturing of pharmaceuticals and cosmetics in the region.

In 2003, the establishment of Global Health Co. marked a significant milestone as it played a pivotal role in shaping the private market for Pharma in Iraq. Today, Global Health stands as a premier distributor of pharmaceuticals, serving pharmacies and hospitals in both the private and public sectors of Iraq.

As an umbrella group, Khoury Group II goes beyond providing life-saving medications. Thuraya Co., its logistics, clearance, transport, and storage subsidiary, operates multiple offices across Jordan. Thuraya specializes in clearance and shipping of sensitive pharmaceuticals destined for Iraq, the MENA and international markets.

Lastly, Khoury Group has introduced Global Health Pharmacy Ltd., our newly founded pharmacy venture that combines cutting-edge technology with personalized services to cater to all of our patients' medical needs. With a blend of modernity and traditional care, we strive to deliver exceptional healthcare experiences.

For more information, follow us on our social media pages.

Name: EER Middle East
Description:
At EER Middle East, we help companies, their employees and individuals move, work and succeed across the Middle East. 

For over 20 years, we have been a trusted partner in providing Corporate Services, Immigration and Relocation services in the Middle East region. With offices in Dubai, Abu Dhabi and Riyadh, and a presence in Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman and Qatar, we provide tailored solutions that make expanding into new markets simple, efficient and seamless.

From business set up, regulatory compliance and visas, to relocating assignees or individuals and their families, our team has the expertise and knowledge required to manage every aspect efficiently and effectively.

Name: JCBL Group
Description:
The JCBL Group, is a story of passion and inspiration, a story where a vision took shape in 1989 and today, touches over a billion lives across continents.

From its early foray into mobility solutions, the Group today has established a strong presence in all major sectors of the economy such as- Mobility Applications, Defence, Railway and Bus Components, Agriculture, Finance, and International Trading. In line with its ethos to bring the best to Indian consumers, the Group has also tied up with Global brands like Daimler, Toyota and Harley-Davidson to bring a world-class driving experience to Indian roads.

Anchored in India and wedded to traditional values and strong ethics, the JCBL Group is constantly growing, innovating and building multinational businesses that will achieve growth through excellence and innovation while balancing the interests of stakeholders, employees and the country.

Das AWI überwacht den Unfall- und Gesundheitsschutz in den Betrieben und fördert den Bau preisgünstiger Wohnungen.

Name: Prefeitura Municipal de Contagem
Description:
Contagem é um município brasileiro do estado de Minas Gerais na Região Metropolitana de Belo Horizonte. É a cidade com a terceira maior população do estado, com  621.865 habitantes em estimativa do IBGE em 2022.

Contagem é um dos mais importantes municípios de Minas Gerais, principalmente pelo seu grande parque industrial. Seu sistema viário, planejado para comportar um fluxo intenso de veículos e de carga, é feito através das principais rodovias do Brasil, a BR-381 (Fernão Dias - acesso a São Paulo), BR-262 (acesso a Vitória e Triângulo Mineiro) e a BR-040 (acesso a Brasília e Rio de Janeiro).

A economia de Contagem é baseada em serviço e indústria. Contagem ocupa a 30º posição entre as cidades com os maiores PIBs do Brasil, com um valor aproximado de R$ 45 bilhões. O levantamento confirma o momento positivo da economia do município, que em 2020 ocupava a 32ª posição. A cidade ficou à frente de grandes capitais como Florianópolis (SC), Natal (RN), Vitória (ES) e Belém (PA), em um claro reconhecimento da importância do município para a economia nacional.

Segundo levantamento da Junta Comercial do Estado de Minas Gerais (Jucemg), Contagem sustenta a terceira posição entre as cidades que mais abriram empresas em Minas Gerais entre os anos de 2024 e 2025. O balanço da Jucemg contempla empresas de todos os portes, com exceção de Microempreendedores Individuais (MEIs). Esse é mais um sinal que as políticas e iniciativas da Prefeitura de Contagem que visam o desenvolvimento econômico no município são férteis e frutíferas.
