Name: Iskur - Agency of Employment
Description:
•	Turkish Employment Agency was established for aiding activities of protecting, improving, generalizing of employment and preventing unemployment, and for executing unemployment insurance services has obtained a structure that enable it to implement active and passive labour force policies alongside its classical services of finding jobs and employees within an extended mission area.
•	A General Council, in which social parties have a majority and representatives of public and universities can also participate, has been formed in order to aid creating the employment policy of Turkey, by adopting an organization model open to participative and social dialogue. 
•	Executive Board including representatives of workers, employers, merchants and craftsmen has been formed as the organ of the institution which possesses the supreme administration and decision-making abilities, authority and responsibility.
•	Provincial Employment Boards have been formed so as to improve local initiative in regional development and determine local employment policies in provinces.
•	Establishment of Private Employment Agencies has been permitted so that they render both domestic and overseas activities of finding jobs and employees, and the monopolistic authority of the Institution in this field has been abolished.
•	In order to deliver active services in provinces, Regional Directorates have been abrogated and Provincial Directorates have been constituted.
•	As career vocation, Employment and Vocational Expert has been generated in order the missions of the Institution to be delivered actively and to provide qualified personnel employment.

Name: Chugach Alaska Corporation

Our companies combine high-quality operations with best value management services. Our history of exceptional value and stellar customer service has earned us recognition as a leader in our industries.

Established in 1972 under the Alaska Native Claims Settlement Act, Chugach is a unique organization, dedicated to serving the interests of the Alaska Native people of the Chugach region. We represent more than 2,500 Aleut, Eskimo and Indian shareholders, and we work to provide opportunities through responsible management of our lands, businesses and assets. 

Chugach is more than a family of companies. We have been tasked with an important purpose: to provide a pathway to success for contemporary Chugach people. Our corporation serves as a bridge from the traditions of the past to the opportunities of the future, and we strive to preserve our cultural ways while working for a vibrant future.

Blending rich heritage and cultural values with a proven track record of  exceptional customer service, we employ extensive operational and financial capabilities to support our customers.

The Vimson Group also has philanthropic interests in sports with  over 6 decades  running the Salgaocar Football Club whic has won several national championships,  and healthcare with the SMRC's V. Name: Wakatū Incorporation
Description:
Wakatū Group has its corporate offices based in Whakatū (Nelson), Aotearoa (New Zealand).  With offices across Aotearoa and the world, Wakatū owns property and food and beverages businesses through its wholly-owned entities, Whenua, Kono NZ LP and AuOra.  Manaaki is our charitable arm, which leads programmes focused on building the capability of our families and employees, which includes wānanga, cultural and educational development. 

Wakatū Group is owned by the Māori customary owners of the Nelson region.  In centuries past, we settled in Nelson in a series of epic migrations. Etched in our collective memory, they are central to our identity.  We are the People of the Heke – the People of the Migrations.

In 1977, the Māori descendants of the hekenga, now the owners of the Nelson-Motueka-Golden Bay tenths reserves and occupation reserves, formed Wakatū to manage their land. 

Since 1977, we have strategically and purposefully designed Wakatū, to support the families of Wakatū, as well as our wider region.  Our economic base has diversified into our property businesses and the export products we create from our land and water. 

With a strong heritage as gardeners and fishers, Wakatū has created brands that celebrate our culture and front our offerings of  quality food and beverages. Although our products are available throughout world, we remain a family business and organisation.

Name: BFIT-Bund
Description:
BFIT-Bund steht für die Überwachungsstelle des Bundes für Barrierefreiheit von Informationstechnik. Wir prüfen unabhängig die digitale Barrierefreiheit von Webseiten und Apps von öffentlichen Stellen des Bundes. Damit digitale Teilhabe tatsächlich umgesetzt wird, beraten wir zu den Prüfungsergebnissen.
Wir unterstützen als sachverständige Stelle die Schlichtungsstelle nach § 16 Behindertengleichstellungsgesetz (BGG) im Schlichtungsverfahren, wenn jemand sie wegen einer digitalen Barriere kontaktiert.
Gemeinsam mit dem Ausschuss für barrierefreie Informationstechnik entwickeln wir praxisnahe Lösungsansätze und publizieren diese regelmäßig in barrierefreier Form.
Wir dokumentieren den aktuellen Stand der fortschreitenden Technik und berichten alle drei Jahre an die EU Kommission über den Stand der Barrierefreiheit von digitalen Angeboten des Bundes und der Länder.

Die BFIT-Bund ist bei der Deutschen Rentenversicherung Knappschaft Bahn-See unter der Fachaufsicht des Bundesministeriums für Arbeit und Soziales angesiedelt.

JSJ businesses include Dake, GHSP, Hudson Technologies, McLoone and Sparks Belting. From machine tools, automotive solutions and medical devices, to metal name plates and conveyor belts, these businesses serve global customers ranging from startups to multinational corporations.  

What does JSJ stand for? The name was created from the initials of the company’s founding families – the Jacobsons, Johnsons and Sherwoods. Their histories became forever entwined when our cornerstone business, Grand Haven Brass Foundry, burned to the ground. Together they rebuilt it. Ever since, these families bonded to build a resilient culture that embraces earning trust, working together, learning by doing and stewarding the company legacy. 

Both new and experienced employees find a welcoming environment at JSJ. We place a high value on talent, leadership and making a positive difference for future generations.

Name: WFL - Wirtschaftsförderung Herzogtum Lauenburg
Description:
Bei der WFL setzen wir uns mit Leidenschaft für die wirtschaftliche Entwicklung im Kreis Herzogtum Lauenburg ein. Unser Ziel ist es, für Unternehmen und ihre Mitarbeiter optimale Bedingungen und Wachstumsmöglichkeiten zu schaffen.

Unsere Dienstleistungen:

Umfassende Beratung: Von der ersten Geschäftsidee bis zur erfolgreichen Ansiedlung – wir stehen Unternehmen bei Erweiterung, Umsiedlung oder Neugründung zur Seite. Mit individueller Beratung und Unterstützung bei der Standortwahl und Genehmigungsverfahren bieten wir einen Rundum-Service. 

Entwicklung von Gewerbegebieten: Wir arbeiten kontinuierlich an der Erschließung und Entwicklung neuer Gewerbeflächen. Dabei spielen die Themen „Grüne Gewerbegebiete“, Nachhaltigkeit durch Flächenrecycling und Nachverdichtung eine große Rolle. 

Vernetzung und Kooperation: Als zentraler Ansprechpartner fördern wir die Vernetzung zwischen Unternehmen, Verwaltung und Politik. Wir initiieren und unterstützen Austauschformate und Foren, die den wirtschaftlichen Dialog im Kreis stärken. 

Förderung des Unternehmertums: Besonders am Herzen liegt uns die Unterstützung von Gründer:innen und stehen mit Rat und Tat zur Seite. 

Zugang zu Fördermitteln: Wir navigieren Unternehmen durch den Dschungel der Fördermöglichkeiten und öffnen die Türen zu Landes- und Bundesförderungen, damit kein Potenzial ungenutzt bleibt. 

Wir für das Herzogtum! Als Ihr Partner in Sachen Wirtschaftsförderung stehen wir für Engagement, Expertise und eine enge Zusammenarbeit mit vielen Akteuren im Kreis Herzogtum Lauenburg und darüber hinaus.

Name: Kho Alliance
Description:
Kho Alliance is a group of entities which focuses itself in providing integrated solutions in legal services, strategic planning, business mentoring, investment while also provide contribution in legal-aid, start-ups assistance and scholarship.

It was started in 2002, when a consulting firm providing strategic planning was established to provide services to some of our first clients (now, after 15 years, many of them are still our clients!). In 2003, the firm changed its course by providing legal services, thus, another firm - a law firm - was established, meanwhile the strategic planning services were still provided to the clients as additional services. In the next decade, the law firm has been growing into reputable law firm, with banking & corporate financing, project & structured financing, financial technology, mining & energy, merger & acquisition, spin-off, reorganization & dissolution of company, corporate governance, commercial transaction, litigation support, and dispute resolution as its main practice areas.

In 2014, an initiative was taken to enable the firm to provide broader services and more intensively involve in contribution to the society. The law firm was reorganized and changed its name several times, now the Law Offices of Steven Kho & Associates. PT Steven Kho Indonesia was established to take over and continue the strategic planning services used to be provided by Steven Kho Consulting (and it also continues to use the brand), and a charity foundation - Yayasan Steven Kho Amerta - was founded to cater the needs of contributing back to the society. The latest corporate action, the establishment of another legal practice, the Law Offices of Wirodihardjo & Associates, completed and close the year of 2017.

Now, we are welcoming 2018 with excitement, by launching new brand - Kho Alliance - under which the firms and foundation will operate. The new brand reflects our philosophy of providing and becoming positive impact for our surrounding.

Name: DCC Graduate Programme
Description:
DCC plc is a leading international sales, marketing and support services group operating in 22 countries, supplying products and services used by millions of people every day. Headquartered in Dublin, the Group operates across three sectors: energy, healthcare and technology, employing over 16,000 people. DCC plc is listed on the London Stock Exchange and is a constituent of the FTSE 100. 

While you may not have come across the name DCC before due to our devolved structure, you will almost certainly have heard of one or more of our 40+ businesses. They include industry-leading brands in the UK, Continental Europe and Ireland, such as Certas Energy, Flogas, Butagaz, DCC Vital, Fannin, Laleham Healthcare, and the official Xbox distributor in the UK – Exertis. 

Our focus on strong organic and acquisitive growth makes for a very fast-paced environment, with new projects and new commercial challenges around every corner. Graduates on the DCC Graduate Programme are guaranteed to be involved in projects that add real value to the businesses in which they are placed. 

We operate across three different divisions: DCC Energy, DCC Healthcare and DCC Technology. This gives our graduates the opportunity to explore a wide range of career paths in a variety of industries.

Name: Koncernas ACHEMOS GRUPĖ
Description:
Koncernas „Achemos grupė“ yra viena didžiausių nacionalinio kapitalo verslo grupių, vienijanti per 40 bendrovių Lietuvoje ir užsienyje. 

Koncerno „Achemos grupė“ įmonės 2020 metais uždirbo 922 mln. pajamų. Jose dirba daugiau kaip 4400 darbuotojų. Į valstybės biudžetą 2020 metais buvo sumokėta 80,4 mln. eurų mokesčių ir papildomai 37,5 mln. eurų kitų įmokų už SGD terminalo išlaikymą, VIAP ir ATL leidimus. 

Koncerno „Achemos grupė“ veiklos sritys: 

• Trąšų gamyba ir prekyba („Achema“, „Litfert“, „Agro Baltic“, „Liteximp“ ir kt.)
• Agroverslas („Agrochema“ ir kt.)
• Krova ir logistika (AB „Klaipėdos jūrų krovinių kompanija“ (KLASCO), „Krovinių terminalas“, CKT, „Transachema“ ir kt.)
• Dujų gamyba ir prekyba („Gaschema“, „Achema Gas Trade“ ir kt.)
• Energetika („Renerga“ ir kt.) 
• Gamyba („Achempak“)
• Viešbučiai („Grand SPA Lietuva“, „Old Mill Hotel“, „Palangos vėtra“ ir kt.)
• Žiniasklaida („Radiocentras“)
• Paslaugos („Iremas“, „Draudimo brokerių aljansas“, „Budrus sakalas“ ir kt.)

Koncernui „Achemos grupė“ priklausančios bendrovės veikia Lietuvoje, Latvijoje, Estijoje, Lenkijoje, Vokietijoje, Prancūzijoje, Belgijoje, Suomijoje, Švedijoje, Čekijoje ir Kroatijoje.

Koncerno „Achemos grupė“ įmonės yra vienas didžiausių darbdavių Lietuvoje, darbuotojams suteikiančių patrauklius socialinius paketus.

Koncerno bendrovės nuolat investuoja į aplinkosaugą ir poveikio aplinkai mažinimą, yra socialiai atsakingos, remia vietos bendruomenių, kultūros ir sporto projektus.

Name: Sepas Holding | هلدینگ سپاس
Description:
مجموعه «سپاس» فعالیت خود را در سال 1395 در ابتدا به صورت فعالیت جداگانه در سه مجموعه مجزا در حوزههای اینشورتک، تراول تک و فین تک آغاز کرد. در سال 1400 این سه مجموعه با هم ترکیب شده و هلدینگی به نام «هلدینگ سپاس» را تشکیل دادند. هلدینگ سپاس با اتکا بر استفاده از به روزترین زیرساختهای فنی و با بهرهگیری از متخصصین باتجربه درصدد توسعه و گسترش سه حوزه بیمه، گردشگری و مالی کشور بوده است.

در هر کدام از این حوزهها محصولات و خدمات متنوعی عرضه شده است. مهمترین محصولات اینشورتک شامل بیمه دات کام، سامانه مناقصات بیمهای، بازاریابی هوشند و سامانه بازاریابان و محصولات تراول تک شامل GDS، سفر دات کام، شانا تراول، سامانه مدیریت فرودگاه، سامانه مدیریت مجوز پرواز، I6 و BSP و محصولات فین تک شامل نت سیس پی، مارکت پلیس و کیف پول است. هدف هلدینگ سپاس، عرضه خدمات باکیفیت در هر سه حوزه و برطرف کردن نیاز مشتریان و ایجاد بستری مناسب در فضای آنلاین است. هم اکنون این گروه با تلاش، توانسته خود را به عنوان یک بازوی مهم در بستر کارآفرینی کشور معرفی کند.

Name: Worcestershire Local Enterprise Partnership
Description:
Worcestershire was one of the first standalone, single-county LEPs to be approved in December 2010 by the Departments for Business Innovation and Skills (BIS) and Communities and Local Government (CLG). It is one of 39 LEPs established by the Coalition Government with a role to help determine local economic priorities and lead economic growth and job creation.

There are many advantages in being a single county LEP. Many of our stakeholders, partnerships and statutory bodies have a matching geography and we are able to align, co-ordinate and co-operate with them to exploit opportunities. Decision making and communication is therefore streamlined, enabling the partnership to be ‘fleet of foot’, committed, pro-active and ready to play its role.

Our task is to shape the best business environment for the county, stimulate growth of the local economy, encourage inward investment, boost enterprise and job creation, and actively promote Worcestershire as an exceptional place to work, live and prosper.

Worcestershire LEP is led by private sector businesses in partnership with the public sector – comprising Worcestershire County Council and the six district councils of Worcester City, Bromsgrove, Redditch, Malvern Hills, Wyre Forest and Wychavon.

Name: Hui Huliau
Description:
The Hui Huliau family of companies is a performance driven organization that delivers success for our customers through innovative solutions and effective contract performance. In our first five years of operation, we grew from a startup organization with a handful of employees to a trusted service provider for large, complex multinational contracts. Our employees are among the best in the industry and have decades of hands-on experience across a wide range of disciplines.

As a nonprofit 501(c)(3) Native Hawaiian Organization (NHO), Hui Huliau’s core purpose is to function as a community service organization and address the needs of Native Hawaiians. We do this through our own diverse programs and by supporting like-minded nonprofits whose mission aligns with ours. 

Profits from our Small Business and SBA certified 8(a) companies support our nonprofit activities. Our 8(a) companies are eligible for Department of Defense sole source contract awards with contract value up to $100M without justification and approval.  
  
Our Mission:  To strengthen our communities, make a positive impact on the lives we touch, and provide a brighter future for the Native Hawaiian people through education, economic opportunities, and the preservation of the Hawaiian language and culture.

Name: StädteRegion Aachen
Description:

Unsere rund 2.500 Mitarbeiter*innen machen’s möglich, dass wichtige Bedürfnisse und Services aller Einwohner*innen in unserer StädteRegion (= Landkreis Plus) erfüllt werden! Keine leichte Aufgabe, aber wir haben eine klare Mission: Unsere Region lebenswerter, sozial gerechter und zukunftssicherer zu machen.

Kurz gesagt: Als Verwaltung sind wir die Superheld*innen für über 560.000 Menschen in zehn Städten und Gemeinden!
 
Dabei setzen wir auf das Wohlbefinden und die Zufriedenheit unserer Mitarbeiter*innen. Wir geben alles, um euch ein flexibles, modernes Arbeitsumfeld zu schaffen, in dem sich jede*r entfalten kann!
 
Folge uns hier, wir nehmen dich mit in unsere Welt!
 
Schreib uns auch gerne – wir antworten!

Name: CEO Business Club (.com)
Description:
The mission of the CEO Business Club is to promote and facilitate ethical business in abundance.

The Club is an exclusive business networking platform for CEOs with a growth mindset. It enables like-minded business leaders to share valuable insights, strategies, and methods to future-proof and scale their organizations.

We advocate for business ethics, foster a global business network, nurture a shared understanding of business, and actively engage in forums and events. This aligns with our goal of empowering CEOs to drive exponential growth, transforming their organizations into highly attractive and investable entities in a rapidly changing business landscape.

We have four guiding principles that underpin member participation:
- Nurture a deeper understanding of business and investment, often through unconventional success methods.
- Promote a strong culture of business ethics.
- Build a supportive, global network for business and investment.
- Participate in group engagements (e.g., business and investment forums or Round Tables).

These four pillars encapsulate our purpose of “Business in Abundance.” As part of this mission, we educate, inform, advise, invest in, and inspire our members. In doing so, we resonate with our members, cultivating collective energy and fostering a robust sense of community. This approach leads to unity, shared purpose, and mutual support among our members.

Name: M. Demajo Group
Description:
The M. Demajo Group is a recognized leading business player in Malta, with a successful history spanning numerous decades. The Group’s growth and diversification has resulted in a wide coverage of business sectors, through a commitment to long-term results. Starting from the importation and distribution of wines and spirits at the beginning of the twentieth century, the Group expanded in post war Malta to cover manufacturing, retail business, graphic arts, timbers and increased involvement in large projects. In line with developments in post-Independence Malta, the Group became an innovative player in the tourism sector, the regional energy sector and is an important actor in the local developing ICT scene.  

In more recent decades the Group’s various activities have been developed through organic growth, acquisitions and partnerships. Its strong financial situation, its business reputation and its renowned track record as a business partner are all key factors in the continued expansion of the M. Demajo Group.

Name: KOSONG SATU GROUP
Description:
Established in 2013, Kosong Satu Group is a multi-industry holding company founded on a simple yet powerful idea: creating ecosystems. Since our inception, Kosong Satu Group has grown to include over 20 active brands spanning real estate, entertainment media, business services, and community ventures, with a team of over 100 people—and still expanding!—united by a shared vision of innovation and impact.

Our journey began with Baliprod Films, which has since grown into a global production house, collaborating with brands such as Netflix, Nike, Samsung, Coca-Cola, and Hugo Boss, among many others. Following this success, we launched some of Bali’s most recognized brands, including Legal Legends Indonesia, High and Low Headhunters, and Bali Model Agency, to name a few.

We are now expanding our reach into the realm of real estate development and community ventures, building businesses that are not only innovative but also grounded in a strong vision of helping and benefiting the local community. Currently, we are in the process of creating an international school, a bakery, a shopping center, and a community square.

Speaking of teams, ours is a diverse mix of individuals from nine countries across five continents. This rich blend of cultures, skills, and perspectives is one of our greatest strengths, driving our success and shaping who we are as a company, truly earning us the title of Bali’s A-Team.

Name: Bayerisches Landesamt für Denkmalpflege
Description:
Das Bayerische Landesamt für Denkmalpflege ist die zentrale Fachbehörde des Freistaats Bayern für Denkmalschutz und Denkmalpflege. Entscheidend sind für uns die Fragen „was ist ein Denkmal“ und „wie gehen wir damit um“? Seit der Gründung des Amtes 1908 sind die Führung der Denkmalliste und die Beratung von Eigentümern, Planern und Institutionen unsere Hauptaufgaben. Wir sind Ihr Ansprechpartner für alle Fragen zu Bau- und Bodendenkmälern: Wir beraten Sie, wenn Sie Ihr denkmalgeschütztes Haus umbauen oder renovieren möchten und begleiten archäologische Ausgrabungen. Es ist unsere Aufgabe, die Zeugnisse der Vergangenheit zu bewahren.

Wir sind Dienstleister für das kulturelle Erbe Bayerns und die Menschen, die damit zu tun haben. Wir informieren, beraten und unterstützen Sie. Während das Bayerische Landesamt für Denkmalpflege für alle fachlichen Fragen zuständig ist, ist die Umsetzung des Denkmalschutzgesetzes Aufgabe der Unteren Denkmalschutzbehörden der Landkreise bzw. kreisfreien Städte.

Unser Ziel ist es, die historische Identität Bayerns zu bewahren. Wir geben unseren Denkmälern eine Zukunft.

Unsere Datenschutzhinweise für die Datenverarbeitung über LinkedIn hier: https://blfd.bayern.de/meta/datenschutz/index.html#link_10.

Name: Riqueza Business Solutions
Description:
Riqueza Business Solutions is part of the Riqueza Group of companies, owned wholly by Riqueza Holdings Ltd.

Riqueza Business Solutions operates across mainland U.K. and internationally to provide funding and loan solutions to businesses and their owners.

Ranging from £10k to £150m our team are vastly experienced in the various ways a business can attract a loan or funding solution including:

- Asset Finance
- Invoice Finance
- Commercial Mortgages
- Bridging Loans
- Unsecured loans 
- Secured loans
- Revolving credit lines 
- Trade & Stock finance
- Specialist funding 

We have access to a huge range of funding partners spanning banks; 2nd tier lenders and HNW individuals. Extensive due diligence is carried out by any of our funding partners before any loan of any value is awarded.

If you’re a business owner or a professional advisor to a business owner seeking a loan or funding solution, we would love to hear from you for an informal chat to establish how we might help.

Name: Lipton Rogers Developments LLP
Description:
Who We Are

The formation of Lipton Rogers Developments reunited the co-founders of Stanhope, Sir Stuart Lipton and Peter Rogers. Their unparalleled creative and delivery capabilities have been the driving force behind many of the major iconic developments in London for over thirty years. With the addition of the market-leading investment and finance capabilities of Rupert Clarke as Managing Partner, Lipton Rogers Developments represents a formidable operating platform for the origination and delivery of major London development and regeneration opportunities.

Lipton Rogers Track Record

Lipton Rogers as a team has developed more than 30m sqft of major commercial and mixed use projects in and around Central London. Frequently at the outset these projects have presented significant complexities and challenges where Lipton Rogers have used their creative planning, design and construction solutions to deliver exceptional results.

Lipton Rogers’ principal activity has been focused on multiple and individual office developments in the City and West End. Outside these core markets, the team has delivered many major mixed use, government, theatre and art projects – Lipton Rogers has been behind the renaissance of many of the most prominent theatrical and arts buildings in Central London.

Name: Handwerkskammer für Mittelfranken
Description:
Die Handwerkskammer für Mittelfranken ist Partner und Wegbereiter für eine sichere Zukunft des mittelfränkischen Handwerks –am Puls des Fortschritts.

Für unsere rund 22.000 Mitgliedsbetriebe sind wir die erste Anlaufstelle für das Handwerk in der Region. Wir beraten in allen Fragen der Existenzgründung, Betriebsführung, Nachfolge, Qualifizierung und Fachkräftegewinnung. Unsere Bildungs- und Technologiezentren in Nürnberg und Ansbach sichern mit praxisnaher Aus- und Weiterbildung die Zukunftsfähigkeit des Handwerks.

Unsere Haltung ist klar: Wir sind da, wo Zukunft geschrieben wird. Neue Geschäftsmodelle, nachhaltige Innovationen und politische Impulse fürs Handwerk bringen wir aktiv voran. 

Was uns besonders macht: Wir hören zu, vernetzen, unterstützen und sind sichtbar. Wir stoßen Entwicklungen an, transformieren Wissen in greifbaren Nutzen für unsere Betriebe und sind gleichzeitig starker Partner der Politik, Wirtschaft und Zivilgesellschaft.

Wir sind keine Denkfabrik im Elfenbeinturm, sondern praxisnah, wirtschaftlich und bodenständig. Wir glauben an Fortschritt im Gleichklang mit Verantwortung. 

Unser Herz schlägt fürs Handwerk – im Takt, unaufhörlich, klug, engagiert. Und damit schlagen wir im selben Rhythmus wie unsere Mitglieder.

Wir sind Handwerk. Wir pflegen unsere Wurzeln und schaffen Perspektiven. Als sicherer, attraktiver Arbeitgeber mit ambitionierten Zielen gestalten wir das Handwerk von morgen – gemeinsam mit Betrieben, Mitarbeitenden, Auszubildenden und Partnern in der Region und darüber hinaus.

Name: Athena Executive Services
Description:
Athena Executive Services pairs high caliber, part time, virtual Executive Assistants with business owners and executives.

Benefits that our clients report:
· They are happy that they now are spending more of their time on what they are needed for most in their company. They are wasting less time on activities someone else could do.
· They have a new-found peace of mind and life balance (going to the gym; ending work at a reasonable time; spending time with family; having time for business planning; etc.)
· They are saving money by simply paying for the hours someone works 

Some of what you get:
· Our assistants are independent contractors who work from home, with their own equipment. Our clients save money, not having to provide office space, equipment, benefits, etc.
· They are experienced being on virtual/ remote teams and how to perform well in that environment. We work with our clients to establish effective communication structures so that you are clear about what work is being done.
· Support is available anywhere from 10 to 30 hours/week. It’s amazing the difference just 10 hours/week of support can make!
· Coaching is available at no extra charge for those who have never had an assistant before, or want support in working most effectively with their assistant.

Working part-time, our assistants are out of sight and often out of mind, while they are busy taking ownership of and completing items on your to-do list.

Whether it’s booking your family’s trip, helping you slay your inbox, pulling together documents for your mortgage application, or being the bouncer and bodyguard for your calendar . . . we do that.

Turn your assistant into a high-performing Executive Assistant!
Athena Executive Services offers a coaching program for the Executive Assistant you already have!  Our coaching program includes 8 hours of coaching and is done over the phone in 8 – 10 phone calls, covering our 8 Key Distinctions to being a high-performing Executive Assistant.

Name: Medisky Group
Description:
Medisky Group, a prominent conglomerate hailing from Dankuni, Hooghly, stands as Bengal's beacon of promise in diverse industries. Specializing in healthcare through Medisky Hospital, educational initiatives via Delhi World Public School - Hooghly, and sports development through the Medisky Sports Foundation, the group has firmly rooted itself in these sectors.

In January 2023, the inaugural Medisky School Games, hosted by Delhi World Public School - Hooghly, marked the group's foray into sports, with the CEO announcing its biennial occurrence, aiming to transform it into Eastern India's premier school sporting event. This momentum continued with the unveiling of Medisky Football Academy in 2025, furthering the group's commitment to sports excellence.

With ambitious expansions into hospitality, real estate, entertainment, and retail sectors on the horizon, Medisky Group's prowess has not gone unnoticed. The accolade of 'Most Promising Business Group in India' at the North American Bengali Conference 2022, presented by Bandhan Bank Chairman Mr. Chandrasekhar Ghosh at Planet Hollywood, Las Vegas, was a testament to the group's exceptional strides. The esteemed award was proudly accepted by our Chairman, Mr. Laltu Ghosh, and Chief Executive Officer, Mr. Symon Ghosh.

Medisky Group owes its distinction to its visionary leadership – Chairman Mr. Laltu Ghosh, Vice-Chairman Mrs. Sutapa Ghosh, and CEO Mr. Symon Ghosh. Their mission, resoundingly clear, revolves around bettering the world, commencing from their hometown, Dankuni, Hooghly.

What sets Medisky Group apart is its dynamic business strategies, unwavering dedication, and astute marketing approaches. For inquiries or collaborations, direct correspondence with our CEO is welcome via email at ceo@mediskygroup.com.

Name: Bayerisches Landesamt für Steuern
Description:
Benjamin Franklin sagte: „Nur zwei Dinge auf Erden sind uns ganz sicher: der Tod und die Steuer.“
Letzteres ist unser Geschäft. Damit hierbei nichts dem Zufall überlassen wird, sind wir kompetenter Ansprechpartner und Bindeglied zwischen dem Bayerischen Staatsministerium der Finanzen und für Heimat und den bayerischen Finanzämtern.
Mit unserer Leidenschaft für Menschen, Zahlen und Informationstechnik unterstützen wir mit knapp 1.700 Beschäftigten organisatorisch, fachlich und technisch unsere Finanzämter.
Wir verstehen uns dabei nicht nur als Serviceleister für Steuerverwaltung und Steuerberater, sondern auch als großer IT-Dienstleister für Behörden, Steuer– und Justizverwaltung. Wir vernetzen nicht nur Maschinen, supporten unsere eigenen Endgeräte und halten alles am Netz, sondern wir gehen im Rahmen von KONSENS auch die Entwicklung der Steuersoftware für 16 Bundesländer begeistert an. Zudem beschaffen wir zentral für die bayerischen Finanzämter die Ausstattungsgegenstände, insbesondere das Mobiliar und die EDV-Anlagen.
Zwar sind wir kein direkter Ansprechpartner für Steuerbürgerinnen und –bürger, aber wir erledigen engagiert alle wesentlichen Aufgaben des Personalwesens für über 15.000 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter und sind Disziplinarbehörde im Geschäftsbereich des Bayerischen Staatsministerium der Finanzen und für Heimat. Es finden jährlich gut 1.500 Nachwuchskräfte ihren Weg zu uns oder zu einem der 76 Finanzämter in Bayern und starten ihre Karriere in verschiedensten Fachrichtungen, sei es in einer Ausbildung oder einem dualen Studium. Ebenso gestalten bei uns hochmotivierte Tarifbeschäftigte mit ihren modernen Arbeitsplätzen tatkräftig unseren Dienstalltag mit.
Wollen Sie bei unseren abwechslungsreichen und verantwortungsvollen Tätigkeiten dabei sein? Wünschen Sie sich flexible Arbeitszeiten, vielfältige Aus- und Fortbildungsmöglichkeiten und natürlich ein gutes Betriebsklima?
Dann schauen Sie gleich auf unserer Homepage www.baylfst.de vorbei.

Name: Club Italia - ContactLess Users Board
Description:
CLUB ITALIA  ContactLess Technologies Users Board è stata costituita il 17 Gennaio 2000. L’Associazione, senza scopo di lucro, ha la finalità di promuovere sul territorio italiano l’utilizzo di sistemi di pagamento e di accesso basati su carte intelligenti (a microchip), con validazione di prossimità (contactless) integrati con i sistemi di infomobilità.
L’obiettivo è incentivare l’uso del trasporto pubblico di persone aumentandone la flessibilità nell’uso, la sicurezza, la comodità di pagamento, l’interazione dei modi di trasporto, e il controllo sociale.

CLUB ITALIA intende essere l’organizzazione in cui tutti i soggetti interessati scambiano informazioni ed esperienze, per contribuire a dare risposta alle diverse questioni di natura tecnica, amministrativa ed organizzativa che si presentano nella progettazione, realizzazione e gestione di sistemi di pagamento contactless per la mobilità integrati con i sistemi piu’ avanzati di infomobilità.

Description:
The Value Legacy celebrates the stories of successful family businesses. The platform is also a proponent of Spiritual Capital – the family, financial, human and social capital – towards preservation of wealth of these successful families.

The three dimensions of Social Capital are: an interconnected network of relationships, levels of trust that characterise these relationships and the resources or benefits that are gained or transferred by virtue of these relationships.

The Value Legacy summit intends to bring together principals of family businesses towards pursuing shared objectives that complement their strategy for growth. The summit aims to build on the strengths of these families’ long-term outlook, engaging these leaders to collaborate with other family businesses towards value creation upon shared values.

The summit aims to establish mutually beneficial relationships amongst participating families. Name: The Ideal 8-Figure Exit for Ambitious 7-figure Owner Managed Businesses
Description:
Two Things Happen to EVERY Business Owner:

100% leave their business.
No one can cheat death.  Yet most business owners do not have plans for this eventuality, let alone the sale of the business.

They start in 3 roles.
They are owner, directors and employees.  These 3 roles become fused and it makes it difficult to separate them later as the business grows.

Because most business owners only sell one business, it’s essential to understand the exit journey and how to get prepared.  

Why is it important for business owners to Get Exit Ready?  Most business owners only sell one business and have never been through an exit or sale process before.  We show them the roadmap for the journey they are going to be on and help make the route smoother and less stressful (saving a bucket load of money at the same time).

Business owners who aren’t prepared for exit can get help.  Christine will give you a plan of action to get exit ready that results in the business being worth more and easier to sell on better terms whenever it’s the right time for you.  This avoids the tragedy of leaving money on the table or, worse, closing the business with nothing to show for years of effort.

I'm Christine Nicholson - The Business Mentor.
Multi-award-winning, professionally accredited and experienced Business Mentor who works with leaders of Owner Managed / Family Run businesses.

As a business owner myself I've been in your shoes and felt all these things and many more.  I've fallen flat on my face and had to pick myself up, dust myself off and get back on the horse.  I've also had great mentors along the way to help me.  No man (or woman) is an island and all the most successful entrepreneurs have mentors.  In fact business owners with mentors are 70% more likely to succeed.

Call for a chat - no obligation for anything other than 15-20 minutes which will change your day - and possibly your future.

Our operations are managed under a Quality Management System based on ISO 9001, which allows us to be consistent with our certified customers; we also comply with the international requirements of ISO/IEC 17021-1, ISO/IEC 17065 and ISO/IEC 17020 (applicable to certification bodies). We are accredited as a certifying body by ANAB (ANSI-ASQ National Accreditation Board in the U.S.), an accreditation body of the United States, and by EMA (Entity Mexican Accreditation A.C.) Accreditation body of Mexico with an international presence, being members of IAF (International Accreditation Forum), a global association for conformity assessment of accreditation bodies in management systems. We also have accreditations from GFSI schemes such as SQF Institute, The Foundation FSSC 22000, GLOBALG.A.P. and PrimusGFS Standard.

We are approved by Exemplar Global for the application of certified exams for our training courses. We also have the approval of the International HACCP Alliance to teach courses under their standards. Our instructors are approved internationally by: SQF Institute, Food Safety Preventive Controls Alliance (FSPCA), Primus GFS Standard and BRCGS Approved Training Partner.

Name: Equity Corps - The Alternative to an Executive Search Firm
Description:
Equity Corps is The Alternative to an Executive Search Firm.  We never charge a lump sum fee, stake our fee on our executive’s successful service, and specialize in helping Founders and CEOs of emerging growth companies land top talent otherwise out of reach.

THE FOUNDER'S PROBLEM – Growth requires building a strong Leadership Team, but Founders often lack the requisite in-house recruiting expertise and the executive search industry's legacy model (lump sum fees + client  bears 100% of financial risk + high failure rates) is impractical for many emerging growth companies, which have a small margin for error.

EQUITY CORPS' SOLUTION – We believe that Founders & CEOs would be better served if their search firm’s 
financial interest were directly aligned with their own.  Our new model offers - 

                                                       * STRUCTURED FEES     (vs. lump sum search fees)
                                                       * FEES CONTINGENT ON SERVICE     (vs. no fee/service link)
                                                       * BUSINESS RESULTS FOCUS     (vs. staffing focus)

Name: Mobil
Description:
Mobil is a world renowned gas station, as well as the signature brand for the motor fuel related products of **[ExxonMobil](http://www.crunchbase.com/organization/exxonmobil)**. 

Mobil emerged from the breakup of Standard Oil, which occurred in 1911. Standard Oil was dissolved by the Sherman Antitrust Act, and one of the 33 companies that resulted from the split was Standard Oil of New York, which eventually became Mobil. In 1955, Standard Oil of New York renamed itself as Socony Mobil Oil Company, and in 1963 it adopted the name Mobil. The signature had finally brand emerged.

In 1998, [Exxon](http://www.crunchbase.com/organization/exxon) and Mobil signed a $73.3 billion agreement that would merge the two companies together, and become **[ExxonMobil](http://www.crunchbase.com/organization/exxonmobil)**. 

Today, Mobil still acts as the signature brand for **[ExxonMobil](http://www.crunchbase.com/organization/exxonmobil)**, and is a well recognized gas station around the world.

Dabei haben wir den einzelnen Grundstücksbesitzer ebenso im Fokus wie das weltweit agierende Unternehmen. 
Zu unserer LGLN-Familie gehören über 2.000 Menschen. Wir arbeiten an 53 Standorten in ganz Niedersachsen. Viele von uns sind Vermessungstechniker/innen und Geomatiker/innen, die sich nach der Ausbildung bei uns um das Messgeschäft und die Daten und Karten in der Produktion kümmern. Genauso viele haben einen Abschluss als Bachelor oder Master of Science der Fachbereiche Geodäsie oder Geoinformatik. Sie sind nach ihrem Studium bei uns in verantwortlichen Positionen im Innen- oder Außendienst, in der Entwicklung oder als Führungskraft eingestiegen.
Und dann gibt es eine Reihe von Kolleginnen und Kollegen mit einem Ausbildungs- oder Studienabschluss aus dem Bereich der Informationstechnologie. Sie arbeiten meist in Hannover bei der Landesvermessung.
Immer häufiger kommen Quereinsteiger/innen aus verschiedensten anderen Berufen zu uns, die uns zum Beispiel bei der Immobilienbewertung, im Außendienst, im Projektmanagement, in der Öffentlichkeitsarbeit oder bei vielen anderen Aufgaben unterstützen.
Wir bieten duale Studiengänge und verschiedene Ausbildungsplätze und kümmern uns mit viel Leidenschaft um unsere jungen Leute, die mit Ausbildungs-, Bachelor- oder Masterabschluss bei uns attraktive Aufgabenfelder und gute Karrierechancen erwarten dürfen. Lebenslanges Lernen wird bei uns groß geschrieben und wir fördern unsere Mitarbeitenden fachlich und in allen Lebenssituationen.

The role of the Foundations was described by Krishnamurti himself when he said,

'The Foundations will see to it that these teachings are kept whole, are not distorted, are not made corrupt. They will not give rise to any sectarian spirit in their activities… nor create any kind of place of worship around the teachings or the person.'

The Foundation is not a religious organisation nor does it have any spiritual authority but it provides a service to those who may be interested in pursuing an understanding of Krishnamurti’s teaching in their own lives.
The staff of the Foundation work in close cooperation with Information Centres in Britain and Ireland, Committees around the world, and the Krishnamurti Foundations and Centres in America, India and Spain.

D-Foot International is an international non-profit association registered under Belgian law, promoting the global profile of diabetic foot prevention and care through awareness, guidance, education, research and professional development. 

Our aim is to prevent and reduce the number of lower limb amputations from diabetes worldwide. 

With our global network of dedicated, specialised footcare representatives, we focus on: 

• implementing the ’International Consensus on the Management and Prevention of the Diabetic Foot’ guidelines, 
• training healthcare professionals how to manage diabetic foot problems effectively and prevent amputations, 
• giving healthcare professionals strategies to implement, develop and sustain foot services, 
• guiding healthcare professionals how to train and support their colleagues, 
• promoting the recognition of diabetic foot specialists. 

D-Foot International is the implementation group of the International Working Group on the Diabetic Foot (IWGDF).

Name: CNC Forensic Toxicology Services
Description:
Established in 2010 by Dr Craig Nicholas Chatterton, CNC Forensic Toxicology Services provides comprehensive and confidential expert witness, consultancy and analytical services in forensic toxicology to the legal profession, professional institutions, police forces, members of the public and HM Coroners in the United Kingdom.

Dr Chatterton trained as a Home Office forensic toxicologist whilst employed by the Forensic Science Service between March 2001 and October 2009.  During this time he gained approval as an Authorised Analyst from the Home Secretary and was registered with, and as assessor for the Council of Registered Forensic Practitioners (CRFP).  During his time at the Forensic Science Service, Dr Chatterton managed the national drink/drug-driving unit, which processed in excess of 15,000 case samples per year.

In November 2009 Dr Chatterton took up the role of Consultant Toxicologist / Business Development Manager UK and Ireland for Eurofins Forensic Services, where he provided forensic toxicology consultancy and analytical services to a wide range of customers including HM Coroners, legal professionals, police forces, The Forensic Science Service, LGC Forensics and Forensic Science Northern Ireland.

As an acknowledged expert, Dr Chatterton specialises in hair analysis and interpretation, post-mortem toxicology, road-traffic analysis/interpretation (including hip-flask defence and impaired driving) and defence review.

Com um ambiente de negócios reconhecido pela segurança jurídica e fiscal, incentivos fiscais atrativos e infraestrutura de ponta, o Espírito Santo se destaca como um dos estados mais competitivos do Brasil. Nosso compromisso é criar condições favoráveis para que empresários e investidores encontrem no estado as melhores oportunidades para expandir seus negócios e transformar ideias em resultados concretos.

Por meio de uma diversidade de programas, oferecemos suporte a empresas que desejam se instalar ou expandir suas operações no nosso estado, com políticas que estimulam a inovação, geram empregos e impulsionam o desenvolvimento regional.

Aqui no LinkedIn, queremos estar mais próximos de você, empresário e investidor, compartilhando ações estratégicas, novidades sobre o ambiente de negócios capixaba, projetos de impacto e casos de sucesso que comprovam que o Espírito Santo é o melhor lugar para empreender e crescer.

Name: Bright Spark PAs
Description:
Our mission is to provide a flexible and affordable Personal Assistant service to individuals, startups and small businesses in order to help them grow & succeed.

We understand how important it is to have the perfect Assistant which is why we work hard to get to know all about you and your business.

We've done all the hard work so you don't have to. All of our PAs & VAs pass a rigorous interview process and training so that they are all up to speed.

 We match you with one of our superstar PA's or VA's depending on your needs and their experience, skills and personality traits.

Your PA or VA will have a weekly check in chat with you so they can get a feel for the most urgent tasks on your list and make helpful suggestions for streamlining tasks or taking things off your plate.

Our service is 100% flexible. You can use as many or few hours as you like from week to week and we only bill for hours used. We use Toggl to accurately track tasks to ensure every hour is utilised to its full potential. Payment is in advance and any hours not used roll over to the following month. Simple.

Neben der Bundesservicestelle „Aktion zusammen wachsen“ und der Servicestelle des „Bundesprogramms Mehrgenerationenhaus“ sowie der Geschäftsstelle der Conterganstiftung werden darüber hinaus auch die Hilfetelefone „Gewalt gegen Frauen“ und „Schwangere in Not“ vom Bundesamt betreut. Name: Handwerkskammer Chemnitz
Description:
Verantwortung übernehmen, Anliegen erkennen, verwalten: Stellvertretend für eine gesamte Region baut die Handwerkskammer (HWK) Chemnitz seit Jahren auf die Kompetenzen und Fähigkeiten ihrer rund 22.000 Mitgliedsbetriebe und deren gut 140.000 Beschäftigte sowie knapp 5.500 Auszubildende. Wie kaum eine andere Branche beflügeln diese mit ihren täglichen Produktions- und Dienstleistungen die sächsische Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft.

AIs mitgliedsstarke Kammer in Deutschland schließt die HWK Chemnitz einen großen Kammerbezirk ein, der sich von den Landkreisen Erzgebirgskreis, Mittelsachsen und Vogtlandkreis über Zwickau bis hin zur Stadt Chemnitz erstreckt - Spitzenwert in den neuen Bundesländern.

Diese konzentrierte Handwerkskraft unterstreicht die Verantwortung der HWK Chemnitz. Ihr gegenüber steht sie als Interessenvertreter, Selbstverwaltungsorgan und Dienstleister in der Pflicht. Auf allen politischen Ebenen gilt es, sich für günstige wirtschaftliche Rahmenbedingungen im Sinne des Handwerks zu engagieren, zuverlässiger Verwalter in allen Obliegenheiten der Handwerksorganisation zu sein sowie umfangreiche Beratungsleistungen durch kompetentes Fachpersonal anzubieten. Mit zwei Bildungs- und Technologiezentren (BTZ) in Chemnitz und Plauen ist die HWK Bildungsdienstleister für die Aus- und Weiterbildung des regionalen Handwerks.

Wir freuen uns, Sie auf unserem offiziellen LinkedIn-Kanal begrüßen zu dürfen und Sie mit allen nötigen Informationen, News und Feeds rund um das Handwerk in der Region zu versorgen. Egal ob Meisterfeiern und Jubiläen, Veranstaltungen oder das Campusleben im BTZ - folgen Sie uns gerne und lassen Sie sich von der Faszination Handwerk bezaubern.

Specialties:
The City of Titusville operates under a City Council/City Manager form of government. The City Council consists of five council members elected for four year overlapping terms. The City Council appoints a City Manager to oversee the operations following under the City Council. These include the operational departments of Community Development, Economic Development, Fire and Emergency Services, Legal/City Attorney, Police, Public Works, and Support Services. The City's total budget $117,927,461 and the General Fund is $106,875,293. Overall the City has 495 authorized positions.

Name: GoClean Nederland
Description:
GoClean voor een echte zwerfafvalaanpak! Bewustwording over (zwerf)afval voor iedereen, bij gemeentes, scholen en bedrijven. We hebben maar één wereld! 

Kern kwaliteit/ waarde propositie van het ZAK (ZwerfAfvalKompas)
-Digitalisering van het zwerfafval stroom
-Inzicht geven aan beleidsbepalende instanties voor een effectieve aanpak ten behoeven van de leef omgeving
-Creëren van bewustwording ben de verantwoordelijke en bij het generale publiek.

Om tot een bronbestrijding te komen is het van belang te weten hoeveel, wat voor soort, waar en waarom ergens zwerfafval ligt. 
Vanuit GoClean zijn wij gestart met een werkmethode die wij ‘Schoonwandelen’ noemen.
Veel van onze vrijwilligers wandelen schoon. 
Dit betekent dat zij tijdens de buiten wandeling van elk stuk zwerfafval dat zij opruimen een foto nemen en in een app zetten. In deze app wordt de foto opgeslagen met coördinaten waar het is gevonden en er worden type specifieke tags toegevoegd aan de foto. Daarnaast gebruiken ze tijdens de wandeling de wimmerring, datagrijper of schoonwandelwagen waarmee ze het zwerfafval scheiden op PMD, rest en Glass. PMD zetten ze aan de weg en krijgt een tweede leven, rest afval ‘daar douchen we van’. Op deze manier zijn alle Schoonwandelaars data over zwerfafval aan het verzamelen en geven het zwerfafval een tweede leven .
Deze data kan uitgelezen en geanalyseerd worden in het door GoClean ontwikkelde ‘Zwerfafvalkompas’. Daarmee krijg je ‘Zicht op afval’. 

Vanuit de analyses uit o.a. het ‘Zwerfafvalkompas’ wil GoClean dat er een veel beter beleid, samenwerking en afstemming komt tussen overheden, producenten, lokale ondernemers en de burgers. Los van elkaar kan men niet tot een hoopgevende reductie van zwerfafval komen. Ons motto is dat vingerwijzen naar elkaar geen zin heeft, maar met elkaar in gesprek gaan en verbinding zoeken wel. Vanuit hier kan er met data en feiten een effectieve bronbestrijding gerealiseerd worden.

Name: Gemeinde Pratteln
Description:
Die Gemeinde Pratteln lebt ihre Vision: die lebendige Gemeinde mit aktivem Dorfleben und vielfältigen Quartieren vereint Wohnen, Arbeiten und Freizeit.

#prattelenunserezukunft #familienfreundlich 
 
Pratteln ist Arbeits- und Wohnstätte, Familien- und Freizeitort. Pratteln ist rau und borstig, Pratteln ist liebevoll und zart. Pratteln ist für viele Menschen Lebensmittelpunkt und Lieblingsplatz. Die Liebe zu Pratteln setzen wir in unseren Aufgabenbereichen immer wieder um. Pratteln mit ihren 17'000 Einwohnerinnen und Einwohner ist im Aufbruch. Die Gemeinde erschliesst sich mehr Raum und transformiert alte Industrie- und Gewerbezonen zu urbanen, attraktiven Wohnvierteln. Auch unsere Arbeitsbereiche verändern sich. Sie sind stark vom digitalen Wandel geprägt. Einwohnerinnen und Einwohner verstehen sich immer mehr als «User», die ihre Gemeinde auf Qualität und Benutzerfreundlichkeit bewerten. Die Verwaltung geht deshalb immer mehr von einer Rolle des Regulators zu einer Rolle des Moderators über, kommuniziert mit der Bevölkerung auf den vielfältigsten Kanälen und lässt sie am Geschehen über partizipative Prozesse mitwirken. 

Unsere Personalpolitik 

Die Gemeinde Pratteln pflegt eine zeitgemässe, sozial verantwortungsvolle, wirtschaftlich tragbare Personalpolitik. Dazu zählen ein gerechtes, transparentes Lohnsystem und vorteilhafte Sozialleistungen, familienfreundliche Anstellungsbedingungen, Engagement für die Gesundheit, Gleichstellung von Frauen und Männern sowie ein breites Aus- und Weiterbildungsangebot.

In der Verwaltung und in den kommunalen Betrieben sind rund 160 Mitarbeitende beschäftigt. Zudem werden fünf Lernende in drei verschiedenen Berufen ausgebildet und ein Ausbildungsplatz im Bereich Soziale Arbeit angeboten. Wir suchen stets qualifizierte Mitarbeitende für die abwechslungsreichen Aufgaben in einer Gemeinde. Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Bewerbung.

Name: KingCert
Description:
Our company, which started its activities in 2004, carried out training/support activities in the fields of Management Systems and Product Certification until 2013. As of 2013, it has changed all the necessary structure to become an independent and certification body.

Within this framework, with the expert and experienced audit team since 2013 under the trademark of KingCert under the registration of our company,we carries out audit and certification activities in accordance with management systems standards. ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 22000, ISO/IEC 27001 etc.

As a result of the audits completed in 2017, with DAC (Dubai Accreditation Center) with code number CB-077-MS, we are accredited to ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 standards within the framework of ISO/IEC 17021-1:2015 standard.

In 2019, IAS (International Accreditation Services, Inc.), with headquartered in the United States, issued ISO/IEC 17021-1, ISO/IEC 17021-2, ISO/IEC 17021-3, ISO/IEC 17021-10, ISO/TS 22003 and ISO/IEC 27006 with the code number MSCB-196. We are accredited for ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 22000, ISO/IEC 27001 and ISO 45001 standards.

As of the end of 2020, KingCert has been accredited to ISO 37001: 2016 standards with ISO 22301: 20019 and simultaneous IAF code expansion to the standards it is accredited to.

KingCert is the first IAS accredited certification body in Bulgaria.

Since its establishment, KingCert, which has always adopted the principle of being ahead of its customers expectations, continues to invest in its personnel and technology in order to realize this principle.

Geographical Scope: KingCert is able to provide certification services to worldwide.

Name: Amt für Kommunikation (AK) - Office for Communications (OfCom)
Description:
Im Bereich der elektronischen Kommunikation ist das AK die Regulierungs-, Aufsichts- & Verwaltungsbehörde in Liechtenstein.

Als unabhängige Regulierungsbehörde fördert & überwacht das AK den wirksamen Wettbewerb auf den Telekommunikationsmärkten, führt Marktanalysen durch, ordnet Massnahmen der Sonderregulierung  an & überwacht deren Einhaltung. Als Verwaltungsbehörde verwaltet das AK Nummerierungsressourcen, Adressierungselemente & Funkfrequenzen.

Das AK unterstützt als Schlichtungsstelle Konsumenten & Unternehmen, Streitigkeiten rasch & kostengünstig beizulegen. Dabei handelt das Amt neutral & unabhängig.

Im Bereich der Funkfrequenzen ist das AK zuständig für die Frequenzplanung, die nationale & internationale Frequenzkoordinierung sowie -zuteilung. Das AK ist in allen fachspezifischen Arbeitsgruppen der Internationalen Fernmeldeunion, der Konferenz der Europäischen Verwaltungen & der EU als Mitglied oder Beobachter vertreten.

Im Medienbereich ist das AK Geschäftsstelle der Medienkommission sowie für die selbständige Erledigung der nach Art. 86 Abs. 1 Bst. a bis e des Mediengesetzes der Regierung zugewiesenen Geschäfte zuständig.

Im Bereich der Signatur- & Vertrauensdienste ist das AK Aufsichtsstelle und verwaltet & veröffentlicht Informationen über Zertifizierungsdienste in Liechtenstein.

Im Postbereich ist das AK die Regulierungs- Aufsichts- & Verwaltungsbehörde.

Im Bereich Weltraum ist das AK als Aufsichts- & Verwaltungsbehörde zuständig für den Vollzug & die Aufsicht nach dem Weltraumgesetz.

Das AK berät die Regierung in allen Fragen in den oben angeführten Fachbereichen und hat weiters Einsitz in internationalen Foren, Gremien & Organisationen, wo es die Interessen Liechtensteins vertritt.

Einheitliche Bezugsquelle iSd Art. 10 RKV ist die Webseite des AK. 

Bei Fragen und Anliegen betreffend Information und Kommunikation der Regierung Liechtenstein, wenden Sie sich bitte an die Abteilung Information und Kommunikation der Regierung (IKR).

Name: Servicios Corporativos SerCor S.A.
Description:
Servicios Corporativos SerCor S.A. es una compañía que ofrece diversos servicios financieros, principalmente, a las empresas pertenecientes al Grupo Angelini. Esta empresa, fundada el año 2000, es parte importante de este holding empresarial, desarrollando actividades sensibles para las matrices corporativas.

Dentro de las actividades que desempeña SerCor destacan tres áreas principales: Estudios Económicos, Auditoría Interna y el Registro de Accionistas. Además de éstas, la compañía entrega servicios como Contabilidad y Seguridad Informática Corporativa.

En lo que respecta a Estudios Económicos, nuestra empresa es responsable de la búsqueda, análisis, evaluación y presentación de oportunidades de negocios para el Grupo. En esta línea, constantemente se están revisando diversas industrias, empresas y transacciones que ocurran en el mercado. Además, esta área realiza el Control de Gestión para las empresas matrices y sus compañías relacionadas.  

Auditoría Interna desarrolla y estructura planes particulares y atingentes a las principales empresas operativas del Grupo. A través de esta función, SerCor provee a los respectivos Directorios y Administraciones de información valiosa en torno al ambiente de control bajo el cual se desarrollan los procesos internos de cada compañía y la rigurosidad en su cumplimiento.

El registro de accionistas responde a la necesidad de contar con respaldos e información certera de la propiedad de las empresas relacionadas. No obstante lo anterior, este servicio también se realiza para empresas no pertenecientes al grupo.

Por otra parte, nuestra compañía coordina el trabajo de Gobiernos Corporativos para el Grupo y asesora a las distintas empresas en la implementación, capacitación y adecuación de nuevos requerimientos.

Así, pese a ser una compañía pequeña, Servicios Corporativos SerCor S.A. desempeña un rol fundamental para los intereses del holding.

Name: Michigan Black Chamber of Commerce, Inc.
Description:
Mission: The Michigan Black Chamber of Commerce, Inc (MBCC) is dedicated to economically empowering and sustaining African American communities through entrepreneurship and capitalistic activity within the State of Michigan and via interaction with the Black Diaspora.

Mission: The Michigan Black Chamber of Commerce, Inc (MBCC) is dedicated to economically empowering and sustaining African American communities through entrepreneurship and capitalistic activity within the State of Michigan and via interaction with the Black Diaspora.

History: The Michigan Black Chamber of Commerce in partnership with the International Detroit Black Expo and the Michigan Minority Business Development Council, Inc was incorporated in Detroit, Michigan in October of 2006. The nonprofit corporation was created to change the dynamics of black business development, mobilization, access to capital and empowerment, while serving also as a center-point for African American businesses to be provided exposé’s, resources, education and networking opportunities throughout the State of Michigan and/or technological information gateways.

Purpose: The MBCC is a nonprofit, nonpartisan, nonsectarian organization dedicated to the economic empowerment of African American communities in direct association with the National Black Chamber of Commerce. MBCC plans to advocate for, charter and develop Black Chambers of Commerce throughout the State of Michigan; as a means to serve its mission statement and provide further economic empowerment for black-owned businesses.

Vision: The MBCC is a 501(c) 6 tax-exempt corporation standing in the forefront of educating, competing globally and training of African American communities towards the need to participate vigorously through capitalistic means in this global economy, but more importantly in the State of Michigan economic Diasporas.

Throughout the 1990's, African American businesses in the U.S. posted sales of more than $100 billion annually. In general, African Americans represent an annual spending base of over $800 billion. MBCC has harnessed much of the power of these dollars and provides unique opportunities for corporations and African American businesses to partner in creating greater opportunity for all people. The State of Michigan has produced more than 44,000 African American businesses and collectively taps into the 4.6 billion dollar buying power produced by the black consumer.

Name: Pekkala Executive
Description:
Pekkala Executive on suorahakukumppani valmistavan teollisuuden ja teknisen tukkukaupan yrityksille. Hoidamme rekrytointeja asiantuntija-, päällikkö- ja johtotason rooleihin, aina räätälöidysti asiakkaan tarpeisiin.

Rakennamme pitkäaikaisia kumppanuuksia asiakkaidemme kanssa ja haluamme olla mukana heidän kasvutarinassaan. Jokainen hakuprosessimme on yksilöllisesti suunniteltu ja pohjautuu syvälliseen ymmärrykseen yrityksen kulttuurista, tavoitteista ja tarpeista. Meille on tärkeää löytää osaajia, jotka aidosti sopivat asiakkaamme organisaatioon ja joiden panos tuottaa pitkän aikavälin tuloksia.

Erikoistumisemme valmistavaan teollisuuteen ja tekniseen tukkukauppaan antaa meille syvällisen toimialaymmärryksen ja kattavan verkoston alan huippuosaajiin. Panostamme myös ehdokaskokemukseen – kohtaamme jokaisen osaajan ammattitaitoisesti ja arvostaen, jotta heille jää rekrytointiprosessista positiivinen kokemus.

Toimimme avoimesti ja pidämme kommunikoinnin selkeänä ja sujuvana sekä asiakkaan että ehdokkaiden suuntaan. Kun yhteistyö on mutkatonta, myös tulokset puhuvat puolestaan.

Name: Grup Clade
Description:
Clade Grup Empresarial Cooperatiu és el primer grup cooperatiu català multisectorial. Els seus socis, amb vocació de liderar els respectius sectors d’activitat, tenen en comú la voluntat de créixer de manera eficient i socialment responsable.

Grup Clade és el primer grup empresarial cooperatiu de Catalunya. Constituït a finals del 2004, el grup té la missió de donar una resposta eficaç, des dels valors del cooperativisme, als nous reptes que planteja un escenari econòmic caracteritzat pel canvi i la globalització.

Clade vol ser un referent a Catalunya d’un model d’empresa basat en les persones, que opera, amb eficiència, sota criteris d’innovació permanent i sostenibilitat, tot creant riquesa i ocupació estable

Clade Grup Empresarial Cooperatiu es crea l’1 de desembre de 2004 a Barcelona, essent-ne socis fundadors quatre cooperatives (Abacus, Grup Qualitat, Ecotècnia i La Fageda) i dues societats anònimes laborals (Telecsal i La Vola).

Actualment el formen onze societats conformen el grup: Abacus Cooperativa, Cooperativa Plana de Vic, Suara Cooperativa, Escola Sant Gervasi, Fundació Blanquerna, Grup Cultura’03, Grup Qualitat, La Fageda, lavola  , IUCT i Fundació Catalana de Cooperació. Totes aquestes organitzacions comparteixen un mateix model societari, basat en la innovació, que fa compatible l’eficiència empresarial amb la dimensió social.

Name: STADT WEIL AM RHEIN
Description:
Weil am Rhein liegt im äußersten Südwesten Deutschlands im Dreiländereck mit Frankreich und der Schweiz in der Metropolregion Basel. Die rund 31.000 hier lebenden Menschen machen die Stadt zu einer der am dichtesten besiedelten in Baden-Württemberg. 

Sie bildet mit Hafen, Umschlagbahnhof und ihrer Lage an der Nord-Süd-Achse des Güterverkehrs von Rotterdam bis Genua eine wichtige europäische Verkehrsdrehscheibe und ist damit idealer Wirtschaftsstandort für zahlreiche internationale Unternehmen.

Die einstige "Eisenbahnerstadt" hat viele Gesichter. Architektur und Design von Weltruhm wie etwa das Vitra Design Museum oder die Dreiländerbrücke haben hier ebenso ihren Platz wie der Weinanbau, der jahrhundertelang das Leben am Fuße des Tüllinger Bergs prägte. Die alten Ortskerne in Altweil, Ötlingen und Haltingen zeugen heute noch davon.

Name: Ontario Funeral Service Association
Description:
The OFSA is dedicated to the pursuit of excellence in funeral service while providing continued education to funeral professionals. Promoting excellence in Ontario Funeral Profession since 1883, our Member funeral service professionals have the highest standards. Trust the OFSA Advantage as we have much to offer and we can't wait to connect you to your member benefits.

History

OFSA was formed in 1883. It was  originally called the Embalmers' Association. In 1922, the association was incorporated as the Ontario Funeral Service Association. OFSA is a  voluntary professional association of funeral directors with members throughout Ontario.

After effectively representing the  funeral profession in Ontario for over 120 years, we responded to the  needs of our Independent members and the New OFSA now represents only the Independently Owned Funeral Establishments.  OFSA provides education, training and marketing support to give our members the competitive advantage, and protection for their business through our successful lobbying efforts.

Mission Statement

The  Ontario Funeral Service Association is the leader in advocacy and  ethical business advancement for the independent and family owned  funeral homes in Ontario, providing Members with professional development, support, resources and peer networks.

Vision Statement

To  build on and grow our proud tradition since 1883 of ethically promoting  the betterment of the funeral profession in Ontario, the success of our  Member independent and family owned funeral homes, and to be an  effective advocate for our Members on legislative issues that affect our  profession throughout the 21st Century. 

Mandate

The  Ontario Funeral Service Association (OFSA) maintains a high standard of  efficient service among our members in the interests of public welfare.  OFSA strives to increase public awareness of the funeral profession as  well as consumer protection through its lobbying efforts.

Name: California Young Surveyors Network (CA YSN)
Description:
We are a Statewide Network that aims to help connect, educate and involve aspiring Land Surveyors in California. 

We represent California as one of many state young surveyor networks under the umbrella of the National Society of Professional Surveyors -Young Surveyors Network (NSPS YSN). 

The NSPS YSN is modeled after and closely tied to the International Federation of Surveyors (FIG) Young Surveyors Network, the NSPS Young Surveyors Network is an organization dedicated to creating a national network of Young Surveyors within NSPS and its affiliate organizations.

With the first NSPS YSN meeting held in 2014, the organization was developed to build networks and grow relationships for surveyors under the age of 35 or who recently graduated. As those new to the profession have a greater opportunity to increase personal and professional networks, they will motivate others to join the community and promote the surveying.

The definition of a Young Surveyor is someone under the age of 35 or who earned their Degree within the past ten years. All surveyors, however, are welcome to join, but the focus will remain on supporting those new to the industry.

MISSION STATEMENT:
To recruit, connect, develop, and retain young surveyors by providing a community within our professional organizations and creating professional development opportunities allowing room for success.

Drážní úřad jako drážní správní úřad rozhoduje o zabezpečení přejezdu a názvu stanice (zastávky), rozhoduje o vydání úředních povolení pro provozování dráhy, o udělení licencí pro provozování drážní dopravy, vydává osvědčení dopravce k provozování drážní dopravy na dráze celostátní a dráhách regionálních, vydává průkazy způsobilosti osob k řízení drážních vozidel, vydává průkazy způsobilosti určených technických zařízení tlakových, plynových, elektrických, zdvihacích, dopravních, kontejnerů a výměnných nástaveb a drážních vozidel, vydává osvědčení o odborné způsobilosti pro provádění revizí, prohlídek a zkoušek určených technických zařízení v provozu, ukládá pokuty podle zákona o dráhách, vykonává státní dozor ve věcech drah.

Name: Coordenadoria de Governo Aberto
Description:
A Coordenadoria de Governo Aberto (CGA) é uma área da Secretaria Executiva de Relações Institucionais (SERI), parte da estrutura da Casa Civil, que tem como atribuição articular e gerir políticas públicas para promover o governo aberto na gestão municipal. Mas, afinal, o que é Governo Aberto? É um governo com mais transparência, integridade, participação social e colaboração focado na população, além de envolver assuntos como dados abertos, controle social, colaboração, combate à corrupção, linguagem simples e inclusão e diversidade.

Para a promoção do Governo Aberto na cidade de São Paulo, a CGA coordena diversos projetos de transparência e inclusão da sociedade civil nas decisões de políticas públicas. Como exemplo, a CGA é responsável desde 2016 pela interação com a Parceria para Governo Aberto (OGP, da sigla em inglês), coordenando, junto à sociedade civil, os processos de elaboração, implementação e avaliação dos compromissos dos Planos de Ação em Governo Aberto da cidade de São Paulo.

Name: Gemeinde Buchrain
Description:
Buchrain liegt mit 7'000 Einwohnerinnen und Einwohnern im Südosten des Kantons Luzern auf 459 m ü.M. auf dem Hundsrücken, dem Hügelzug zwischen Reuss und Rontal. Zum Gemeindegebiet gehört zudem der westliche Teil der Industriesiedlung Perlen (Dorf Perlen). 

Als wachstumsstarke Vorort-Gemeinde gehört Buchrain zu den Top-Gemeinden der Region und gilt als attraktiv, aufstrebend und aufgeschlossen. Buchrain ist nicht nur unweit von Luzern entfernt sondern auch in einem schönen Naherholungsgebiet, das zum Wandern, Joggen, Velo fahren, Reiten und für Flussfahrten einlädt – oder einfach zum Verweilen. 

Buchrain ist mit den öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln – Bus, S-Bahn und dem Autobahnanschluss A14 verkehrstechnisch sehr gut erschlossen.

The CSSC are partners with the Customer Service Institute of America (CSIA) who has the exclusive North American rights to distribute the International Customer Service Standard (ICSS) and are delegated by the ICCSO to manage the International Service Excellence Awards. The Customer Service Standard Certification (CSSC) Limited who recently launched its operations in the region also has responsibility in the West Indies for customer service training and licensing the Licensed Assessors which conduct the onsite assessments which lead to the awarding of "Certified Customer Service Organization" status. Name: Virtual Assistance by Nicola Clark

Nicola Clark is a highly experienced Virtual Assistant, Website Designer and SEO / SMM specialist, based in Margate, Kent.  If you're looking for somebody to support you in your business, with the ability to assist in its development and growth, then you are in the right place.

A Virtual Assistant is a business support professional that works remotely to undertake a variety of tasks to assist you in the smooth running of your business. This can be administration, accounting, website design, S.E.O, event organisation, marketing, P.R., research and can even involve overseeing your H.R and managing staff.

A business of any size can benefit from using a V.A. Small businesses and entrepreneurs can use the service as their main source of support, whereas larger companies can use a V.A. for sick / maternity cover, during busy periods (when an extra pair of hands can help), or for specific projects.

A V.A is cost-effective, because you only pay for the time you need, and there are none of the costs associated with permanent staff or even temporary staff working on your premises. You don't have to provide a workstation, equipment, support, pension, deal with payroll (including those costly N.I. contributions) or worry about health & safety aspects. On top of that, you don't have to pay for breaks, sick time, holidays, uniform / specialised clothing.  

Please get in touch for further details.

Em suma, atualmente a Interview Jobs USA é uma agência de consultoria norte-americana que auxilia você, que é proveniente de outro país, a encontrar emprego aqui nos Estados Unidos. Name: Landesforst MV – Anstalt des öffentlichen Rechts
Description:
Mit 29 Forstämtern und 191 Revieren bringen wir Leben in die grüne Lunge des Nordens:

 Wir bewahren den Wald und sorgen für Wachstum. Wald macht glücklich – wenn es ihm gutgeht. Deshalb schützen, erforschen und mehren wir ihn. Und damit das auch morgen gelingt, geben wir unser Wissen in der beru ichen Ausbildung an den Nachwuchs weiter. 
Wir bringen Ökologie und Ökonomie in Einklang. Im Landeswald kümmern wir uns um alle Aufgaben einer naturnahen Forstwirtschaft – von der Pflege des Waldes über die Verwaltung der Ruhestätten bis zur nachhaltigen Nutzung der wertvollen Wild- und Waldprodukte. 
Wir geben grünes Licht fürs Waldeigentum. Wir beraten kostenfrei, bewilligen Förderprogramme und übernehmen für Waldbesitzer:innen gern die komplette Beförsterung. Mit vielfältigen Umweltdienstleistungen unterstützen wir alle, die in den Wald investieren. 
Wir wecken Freude am Erholen und Entdecken. Schlendern, staunen, studieren … 
Wir fördern das Erlebnis Wald. Zum Beispiel in Heil- und Kurwäldern, auf Lehrpfaden sowie mit waldpädagogischen Angeboten für Kinder und Schulklassen.

Name: World Baton Twirling Federation, Inc
Description:
The WORLD BATON TWIRLING FEDERATION (WBTF) was formed in 1977 to develop, encourage, and standardize the sport. In October of 1979, the Federation representatives met in Paris to finalize all plans for the first WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS OF BATON TWIRLING, bringing together teams from ten countries to compete in a spirit of healthy, athletic competition. The United States Twirling Association, Inc. hosted the first World Championships in Seattle in 1980. 

The current member countries of the World Baton Twirling Federation are:

Australia, Belgium, Brazil, Canada, Catalonia, Croatia, England, France, Germany, Holland, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Japan, Norway, Puerto Rico, Romania, Scotland, Slovenia, South Africa, Sweden, Switzerland and the United States of America.

Membership in the WBTF offers the following:

•International Clinics taught by coaches from around the world 
•A standardized Judges’ Training Program
•A standardized Coaches’ Training Manual and training films have been established for all member countries to utilize. 
•In 2005, the W.B.T.F. introduced the “International Cup”, which will allows for three (3) new events to be introduced:  Solo, 2-Baton and 3-Baton
•In 2006, the compulsory event for the Senior Men and Women was be eliminated and a new “Short Program” was introduced.
•The World Baton Twirling Championships are held on each even numbered year.
•The WBTF International Cup is held on each odd numbered year.

The WBTF is committed to the ideals of democracy, fairness, and honesty; its Board of Directors work on long-range projects and oversees specific focus areas.  The Technical and Judges’ Committees have standardized the sport of baton twirling through extensive testing and development.

If you are new to the sport, I encourage you to browse the site and learn more about the sport of baton twirling, including an analysis of our sport. Should you wish to contact the WBTF, please visit www.wbtf.org and use the Contact Form.

PROGRAMME AIM & OBJECTIVES

The BeOnBoard Programme aims to support businesses and organisations, particularly across the South West of England, to improve the diversity of their Governing Bodies and Boards, specifically providing a pool of competent women and men and women from black ethnic minority (BAME)
background. In short, the On Board programme seeks to:

❖ Identify and develop emerging leaders from ethnic minority backgrounds for board positions
❖ Create a diverse and board-ready talent pool for companies in the South West and beyond
❖ Provide a networking platform for potential and existing board members to build relations
❖ Match interested businesses with the required specialist skill sets needed at board level
❖ Support both businesses that are engaged and candidates placed to enhance success

TAKING OUR RELATIONSHIP FURTHER

We would like to initially explore potential needs for your board on a one-to-one basis and how we can be of support through our programme. For further information, please get in touch with us at info@beonboard.co.uk
