Description:
כמומחית אדמיניסטרטיבית ויזמית חלוצה בתחום ניהול המשרד, פגשתי אינספור מנהלים ומנהלות שמצאו עצמם טובעים בים המשימות, טרודים בכיבוי שריפות ומתוסכלים מהתנהלות רפיטטיבית שנוגסת בזמנם היקר ומגבילה תהליכי פיתוח וצמיחה יעילים. 
ומכיוון שאני הכי טובה בלסדר כל בלאגן אדמיניסטרטיבי וליצור שגרות עבודה יעילות שמתפקדות היטב - יסדתי את חברת A.S.P שמלווה עסקים וחברות שחוו קפיצת גדילה וזקוקות לתכנון והקמה או שיפור של התשתית האדמיניסטרטיבית הקיימת ("בק אופיס"), בניית תהליכי עבודה חכמים, לגיוס והשמת מנהלות משרד בהתאמה מדויקת לצרכי הארגון ולהכשרות בהתאם לצרכי הארגון.
התחומים בהם אני עוסקת:
• ייעוץ עסקי-אדמיניסטרטיבי
• גיוס והשמת מנהלות משרד
• ניהול משרד במיקור חוץ
• הכשרות מקצועיות למנהלות משרד
בנוסף, אני מנהלת את קהילת הוונדר-וומן – קהילת מנהלות המשרד הגדולה בישראל שמעניקה ערך מקצועי עצום לאדמיניות ומאפשרת לתחום כולו להשתדרג ולהתפתח משמעותית.  
מה חשוב לי?
 לעזור לכם לחסוך זמן, להפחית עומס ולנהל עסק שמתפקד בצורה חלקה
 למצוא עבורכם את מנהלת המשרד המושלמת שמחזיקה את כל הקצוות
 להנגיש שיטות עבודה באמצעותן כל משרד יכול להתייעל 
 להעניק הכשרה איכותית ומתגמלת למנהלות משרד
 לחלוק מהידע, התובנות והניסיון שצברתי במשך 20+ שנים בתחום 
אם אנחנו שותפים לאמונה שניהול משרד מצוין הוא נתון קריטי לצמיחה והתפתחות עסקית, אשמח להתחבר. מוזמנים לשלוח לי הודעה או בקשת Connect.

Name: Business Coaches and Associates
Description:
Business owners get themselves so wrapped up in the day-to-day operations of their companies that they end up "being owned" by the company.  They only work IN the business, not ON the business.

Goals are set. Intentions are great. But then "life happens" and work becomes all about fixing problems rather than reaching goals and developing your business. Optimism and enthusiasm are replaced with anxiety, stress, frustration, or at best, acceptance of mediocrity. Profits are smaller. Opportunities are missed.

BUSINESS COACHES AND ASSOCIATES KEEP YOU FROM GOING DOWN THAT ROAD!

As your Business Coach I can help guide you in identifying your specific challenges. Together, we set the priorities of those challenges and develop a solid plan. Then, we take the specific, agreed upon action steps to move you toward success.

When "life happens," you and I will address those new challenges. But your major objectives will never get lost along the way! "Detours" are allowed, but "U-turns" are not!

Through regular, thoughtful actions steps, you continuously move forward. Profits are realized. Opportunities are capitalized on. Morale skyrockets. Being a business owner becomes rewarding again!

Plain and simple: Having me as a Business Coach significantly increases the likelihood of achieving your goals. This works. In fact, it's guaranteed or it costs you nothing!

Michael Mills is a Certified, Professional Business Coach and is accredited through the Professional Business Coaches Alliance.

Kothari Leadership & Business Advisory provides executive coaching focused on leadership and the achievement of business results.

Mission
We are committed to empowering our clients to achieve breakthrough results at work and in all other facets of life. Our primary objective is to accelerate the achievement of desired business results, with the additional benefit of increasing effectiveness in your personal life. Most importantly, we empower our clients with the skills they need to thrive without continued coaching; promoting compounding, sustainable results in the workplace – leading to significant breakthroughs one person, then one organization, at a time.

Description
Led by Amit Kothari, we have guided countless business leaders in growing and transforming their organizations including creating and achieving a corporate vision, mergers and acquisitions, post-acquisition integration, corporate turnaround, and restructuring. Our leaders are typically C-level executives or partners of service organizations, who lead teams of 20 – 1,000 people; essentially stakeholders from employees to customers to investors.

We work directly with our client, and then include various levels of organizational management, as needed to align actions and behaviors to exceed corporate goals. We value simple, practical advice that can be implemented immediately, generating positive momentum that leads to accelerated results. Our methods work to exceed corporate goals by transforming the leader, both in the outlook and the substance of their thoughts. This includes removing psychological blockages (fear, uncertainty, and doubt), allowing you to focus and analyze the underlying issues in your company; empowering you to achieve a higher level of leadership and true results.

Name: L'Expérience Concierge
Description:
L'Expérience Concierge is a premium luxury and lifestyle concierge service dedicated to creating tailor-made experiences that prioritize time management and the unique desires of each client. We believe that life is meant to be lived fully, with moments of joy, discovery, and unforgettable memories—your life, your way.

Our mission is to simplify and enhance the lives of our clients by providing personalized solutions that combine sophistication, precision, and exclusivity. Whether it’s planning bespoke travel itineraries, organizing private events, or managing lifestyle requests, we bring attention to detail and a deep understanding of our clients' needs to every interactio

Entendemos que a vida é muito mais do que apenas trabalho e responsabilidades. É também sobre aproveitar o tempo livre, experimentar coisas novas e criar memórias inesquecíveis.

Por isso, oferecemos uma ampla gama de serviços de lifestyle personalizados para ajudá-lo a viver a vida ao máximo.

L'Expérience Concierge: transformando sonhos em viagens memoráveis

Empresa de turismo especializada em viagens sob medida, com foco na excelência e na criação de experiências únicas e memoráveis para seus clientes. 

A empresa conta com uma equipe de profissionais altamente qualificados e apaixonados por viagens.
O processo de planejamento de uma viagem conosco começa com uma conversa com o cliente para entender seus interesses, desejos e estilos de vida. A partir dessa conversa, a equipe da empresa elabora um roteiro personalizado, que inclui passagens aéreas, hotéis, atividades e passeios.

A L'Expérience Concierge também oferece serviços de gerenciamento de estilo de vida, que podem incluir tarefas domésticas, organização de eventos e até mesmo a compra de presentes.

Acreditamos que o relacionamento humano é fundamental para a criação de experiências memoráveis. Por isso, a L'Expérience Concierge se concentra em interagir com clientes, fornecedores e colaboradores com a mesma importância e respeito.

Name: Hundlur
Description:
The Hundlur Group is a Luxury, Lifestyle & Consumables Group, founded in 2011 and will enjoy its ten-year anniversary in October 2021. The Group’s Corporate HQ is based at The World Trade Centre, Bahrain and Hundlur recently opened its European HQ in London, UK. The Hundlur Group currently operates across 18 countries with an HQ team of 30 people and 300k Group Insta Followers.


The Hundlur Group consists of eight distinct divisions:

RETAIL DIVISION - branded 'Le Temps' this division is a contemporary stop-and-shop concept which extends from a clean and simple counter or cabinet display to a full espace, shop-in-shop and store format.
Le Temps is currently located in: Saks 5th Avenue, Harvey Nichols, The Virgin Megastore, Bahrain World Trade Centre, City Centre, Moda Mall and Al Aali Mall. Our portfolio includes; Corniche, Hoffman, Meccaniche, Nuun, 7-Friday and Zinvo among other brands.

WHOLESALE DIVISION - branded 'Le Temps Wholesale', we currently supply our own Nuun Official watches and a portfolio of other leading watch brands including the above to distributors and retailers in:
USA (New York), Oman (Salalah), Saudi, Cambodia, Kuwait, Qatar, UAE, Japan (Tokyo), Turkey and other territories.

OWN BRANDS - These include:
Nuun Official: our flagship watch brand with an ex-Richemont Group CEO at the helm. Nuun is a complete in-house brand - conceived and fully designed at Hundlur WTC HQ, it is a distinctive sporty leisure watch which represents in particular - The Outdoor Life.

FOOD & BEVERAGE - Hundlur owns the highly prestigious Japanese Yoku Moku gifting confectioners. This brand features heavily in: Bergdorf GoodNieman Marcus, Saks and another 300 points of sale worldwide.

Joint Ventures - including the TGC brand – a fashion house specializing in best-in-class branded polo-shirts. The Hundlur Group will partner and support start-up/level-up businesses who have an alluring proposition.

LIFESTYLE MEMBERSHIP

Name: Banskobystrický samosprávny kraj
Description:
Banskobystrický samosprávny kraj (BBSK) je s rozlohou 9454 km2 najväčším samosprávnym krajom v SR. V rámci kraja sa nachádza 13 okresov: Banská Bystrica, Banská Štiavnica, Brezno, Detva, Krupina, Lučenec, Poltár, Revúca, Rimavská Sobota, Veľký Krtíš, Zvolen, Žarnovica a Žiar nad Hronom.

Sídelným mestom kraja je Banská Bystrica. V kraji žije viac ako 650 000 obyvateľov. Na čele BBSK stojí od decembra 2017 Ing. Ján Lunter.

Ako predstavitelia Banskobystrického samosprávneho kraja si uvedomujeme dôležitosť ekonomického a sociálneho rozvoja v našom kraji. Programy a politiky obsiahnuté v tomto dokumente považujeme za strategické rozvojové priority. Preto sa zaväzujeme všestranne podporovať uznesenia Zastupiteľstva Banskobystrického samosprávneho kraja a aktivity Predsedu a Úradu Banskobystrického samosprávneho kraja smerujúce k realizácii týchto priorít.

Name: H4 ENTERPRISES, LLC
Description:
H4 Enterprises has recently expanded from a primary focus on facilities management and facilities maintenance to specializing in systems integration. Building on our practical experience managing and maintaining complex facilities, we are now extending this expertise specifically into building management systems and building automation systems as a system integrator—enabling us to offer comprehensive, integrated solutions that enhance the performance, efficiency, and resilience of the facilities we serve.

H4 Enterprises offers building management and automation via Syncromesh by AerisTech. Syncromesh is an advanced IoT technology that transforms facilities management and enables smart, connected environments. Our secure, scalable wireless platform acts as the “central nervous system” for buildings, managing energy use, comfort, safety, occupancy, and operational efficiency across both new and existing facilities. This IoT backbone empowers innovative solutions like the Grace by LifePatterns—an ambient AI , privacy-first system seamlessly integrated with building controls to optimize resident independence, health outcomes, and staff efficiency. Grace delivers real-time data and proactive care insights, supporting older adults’ ability to live more safely and independently, while maximizing operational ROI and sustainability for operators.

Demonstrated by a proven record as a federal contractor and recognized as a certified Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB) and 8(a) program participant, H4 Enterprises brings a long-standing reputation of trust, reliability, and mission-focused performance to every project. Our expertise spans IoT integration, smart building retrofits, adaptive care technologies, and compliance for government and commercial clients alike. At H4 Enterprises, we build smarter, more supportive environments—where advanced technology and care innovation create lasting value for residents, partners, and communities nationwide.

Name: Mary Aikenhead Ministries
Description:
Mary Aikenhead Ministries was granted canonical status as a public juridic person of pontifical right by the Congregation for Institutes of Consecrated Life and Societies of Apostolic Life on 25 April 2008. The accountability once exercised by the Congregational Leader and Council of the Religious Sisters of Charity were handed to the Trustees as Canonical Stewards. In becoming the Canonical Stewards of Mary Aikenhead Ministries, the Trustees accepted the transfer of stewardship of the Apostolic Works of the Sisters of Charity from the 1 July 2009.

This has required a distinct ecclesial ministry of leadership of the Public Juridic Person, calling many individuals to faithfully fulfil their civil and canonical responsibilities for the greater glory of God. Mary Aikenhead Ministries continues the mission of Jesus Christ when it assumed responsibility to further the health, aged care, education, and some welfare ministries. This is reflected in the crest of Mary Aikenhead Ministries which acknowledges our heritage, tradition and values, while being innovative and visionary in supporting our mission for the future.

Name: Raj Group
Description:
From our humble beginning in 1992 as Raj Homes, we have evolved as an integrated infrastructure player and have diversified across key industry verticals: Real Estate, Print and Digital Media, Industries and Education.

What began in 1992, with a small construction project of merely 16 flats, later grown into a full-fledged real estate outfit getting into residential townships, commercial complexes etc. The year 1997 – 98 raised a new landmark in our history with the foundation of our prestigious project of Minaal Residency, which today stands as one of the largest integrated township of central India. Over the years, We have created more than 6000 finest homes of Bhopal.

In the year 2005, the Company made its foray into the print media sector and launched a newspaper in the name of ‘Raj Express’. Initially, the newspaper was launched in the city of Bhopal on March 1, 2005 and later in Indore in the year 2006. Soon thereafter, Raj Express became one of the largest circulated Hindi dailies in Madhya Pradesh. Its nine editions of Bhopal, Indore, Jabalpur, Gwalior, Ujjain, Ratlam, Rewa, Satna and Chhindwara cover the entire state of Madhya Pradesh.

The Educational & Welfare Society supported by Raj Group – was established in the year 2005 & has established several campuses which provides education to all communities and to people living in various strata of the society. The ambition of our founders is to serve the local community and give certainty to those people who need it by providing education with a combination of national and international standards and deliver a service that help individuals, institutions and societies that are facing the challenges of change.

Our industrial segment manufactures or procures all the building material to help us tap into the economies of scale, thereby, maintaining quality and speed of work.

Name: Abschlussprüferaufsichtsstelle (APAS) / Auditor Oversight Body (AOB)
Description:
Die APAS wurde durch das Abschlussprüferaufsichtsreformgesetz (APAReG) zum 17. Juni 2016 eingerichtet. Das APAReG dient der Umsetzung der aufsichts- und berufsrechtlichen Vorschriften der Richtlinie über Abschlussprüfungen von Jahres- und Konzenabschlüssen sowie der Ausführung der unmittelbar anwendbaren Verordnung (EU) Nr. 537/2014 über spezifische Anforderungen an die Abschlussprüfung bei Unternehmen von öffentlichem Interesse.

Die APAS hat ihren Sitz in Berlin und unterhält weitere Standorte in Düsseldorf und in Eschborn. Die APAS ist eine unabhängige Behörde im funktionalen Sinn, die organisatorisch in das BAFA eingegliedert ist.

Description:

Desde 2010 se centra en el desarrollo del territorio de La Sagra a través del trabajo de juventud.  A lo largo de este tiempo hemos creado y participado en diferentes proyectos locales e internacionales en el área de juventud como: Intercambios Juveniles Europeos; proyectos de Servicio de Voluntariado Europeo tanto de envío como de acogida; así como diferentes formaciones locales e internacionales, tanto para jóvenes como para personas adulta. La edad de los y las jóvenes que participan en nuestras actividades es desde 12 hasta 30 años. 
En la comarca de La Sagra, Toledo, trabajamos en alianza con las autoridades locales e instituciones públicas de diferentes pueblos. En estos momentos hemos firmado acuerdos de colaboración en materia de apoyo a la juventud y la participación con los ayuntamientos de: Numancia de La Sagra, Borox, Esquivias, Yuncos y Bargas; seguimos actuando para expandir nuestro trabajo en un mayor número de localidades de nuestro área geográfica. En estas actividades locales e internacionales con jóvenes hemos encontrado una poderosa puerta de entrada de motivación del público juvenil que nos ha permitido también entrar en contacto con otros colectivos y fomentar así la participación de la población en la vida social, el protagonismo en la transformación de la realidad, la autonomía personal, el aprendizaje a lo largo de toda la vida y unos modelos de relación y crecimiento saludables que incluyen el contacto entre diferentes generaciones de vecinos y vecinas.

Por eso, trabajamos para que la cultura y la comunicación se utilicen como herramientas de reflexión, desarrollo individual y defensa de las identidades colectivas ante las amenazas homogeneizadoras de la globalización.
Location: Numancia de la Sagra, Castile-La Mancha

Name: Saarland Government
Description:
Saarland is a state of Germany. Saarland is located in western Germany covering an area of 2,570 km2 (990 sq mi) and a population of 995,600 (2015), the smallest German state in both area and population apart from the city-states of Berlin, Bremen, and Hamburg. Saarbrücken is the state capital and largest city, while other major cities include Homburg and Saarlouis. Saarland is surrounded by France to the west, Luxemburg to the north and the German state of Rhineland-Palatinate to the east. 

Saarland has successfully accomplished an enormous economic transformation which has seen it develop into a high-technology hub over recent years. It's a high-quality location for business which also offers an excellent quality of life – all at much lower costs than other cities and regions. 

The state government: 
According to Saarland's constitution the state government comprises the Prime Minister as well as the ministers and secretaries of state. The election of the head of government requires an absolute majority of the state parliament's MPs, i.e. 26 out of 51 votes. The Prime Minister appoints and dismisses the ministers and sets the policy agenda. Saarland has the smallest cabinet of any German federal state.

As of June 1, 2024, Uplevel Coworking is a part of the Regus family. Contact the Community Team at madison.wbroadway@regus.com to set up a tour and learn more about the space.


Uplevel Coworking is a coworking space in Madison, WI committed to helping our members do good work & thrive. We attract members from the Greater Madison Area including McFarland, Sun Prairie, Cottage Grove, Windsor & Deforest, and even Poynette. Uplevel offers a variety of flexible office solutions including flex and dedicated desks, private and semi-private offices, conference rooms and a podcast studio. We offer day passes, month-to-month and discounted 6 and 12 month memberships. One of the many membership perks is 24/7 access to the space.

In addition to our superfast WiFi, complimentary tea/coffee bar (a must-have at any coworking space), indoor bike rack, onsite shower, free parking and many more amenities, we also host wellness and social events for our members. After all, what's the point of joining a coworking community if you're going to experience the same isolation as you would at home by being a remote/hybrid worker or entrepreneur? We also host several no and low fee events open to the public. We are continually looking for ways to collaborate with and support the local community. As of 2024, we are excited to display the work of and support local artists through the Uplevel Art Gallery.

We were named one of Dane County's 2023 Climate Champions thanks to efforts such as our Conscious Commuter Program.

Description:
Urantia Foundation was established in 1950 to be the custodian of the inviolate text of The Urantia Book and to ensure that the book's teachings are spread, with the help of readers and fraternal organizations, to all people. This site is provided as a service to the community of Urantia Book readers and in no way implies responsibility for any individual, religious group, or social organization.

Urantia Foundation is a non-profit, educational foundation that operates under a Declaration of Trust. It has been printing the book in English since 1955, and in recent years has been translating the book into many other languages of the world.

The home of Urantia Foundation, 533 W Diversey Parkway, Chicago, Illinois, was built in 1908. Prior to publication of The Urantia Book, the building was used for regular meetings of early readers of the transcripts. The entire estate was bequeathed to the Urantia Foundation in 1969. Today it consists of offices, a basement for storage and shipping operations, a 'Forum room' for meetings and study groups, and two residential apartments.

Name: NTUGSA - Nanyang Technological University Graduate Students’ Association
Description:
The Nanyang Technological University Graduate Students’ Association (NTUGSA) is the elected representative body of the graduate student community in Nanyang Technological University and is supported by the Students Affairs Office (SAO).

Originally registered as the NTU Graduate Students’ Club on 2 September 2010 as a culmination of months of preparation and soul-searching by members of the pro-tem committee, the Club was a small volunteer group promoting and organizing social, recreational, cultural and sporting activities among the graduate students. In the process, the Club has migrated to a Council and has come to serve as a critical link between graduate students, the undergraduate student community, and the university administration. The Council has taken initiatives in advancing the concerns and welfare issues of the graduate student community to the administration.

With the effect from 2nd May 2018, new Constitution claimed formation of Graduate Students’ Association with a new structure. NTUGSA consists of EXCO headed by GSA President and Council that includes Presidents of constituent bodies, namely school-based Graduate Student Clubs. Introduction of the new structure would facilitate communication between Student Affairs Office and graduate students community. Collaboration on events would allow to expand target audience and improve publicizing of activities that would result in reaching out to every student.

The Association represents the interests of graduate students and raises their issues to the university administration with the purpose of seeking ways to resolve them, organizes orientation programmes for new graduate students, promotes the welfare of members within the University, tries to improve the graduate student life on campus by planning and organizing activities and events, which may not be limited to just social, recreational, sporting, cultural, educational, and career related purposes and works to foster a strong and meaning

Name: Federación de Estudiantes de la Universidad Nacional (FEUNA), Costa Rica
Description:
La Federación de Estudiantes de la Universidad Nacional, es una entidad independiente y autónoma del movimiento estudiantil de la UNA. Como elemento esencial, la FEUNA goza de su autonomía administrativa, financiera, organizativa y de gobierno, en concordancia con lo establecido en el Artículo 205 del Estatuto Orgánico de la Universidad Nacional.
La Federación de Estudiantes es un órgano estudiantil universitario absolutamente pluralista sin fines lucrativos y no puede adherirse a ninguna organización política, filosófica o de credo religioso, partido político nacional o extranjero. La autonomía e independencia estudiantil dentro y fuera de la Universidad Nacional, se debe al legítimo servicio de la sociedad costarricense en las diferentes áreas del quehacer orgánico de la institución y las que se estimen de interés por parte de la población estudiantil (investigación, educación, cultura, arte, deportes, social, económica, vivienda, salud, entre otros).
La búsqueda constante de valores para alcanzar la justicia social, como la solidaridad y la no discriminación de carácter socioeconómico, político, étnico, filosófico, de orientación sexual, identidad de género, de capacidades especiales o de cualquier índole, será una lucha constante por parte del movimiento estudiantil.

We also contribute to the profession as a volunteer technical auditor for NATA, a community-endorsed consultant, and a published thought leader in The Auditor Online, with presentations at global auditing conferences.

We combine deep knowledge of standards with practical experience in mentoring, business strategy, and system improvement. Our approach is human-centric, evidence-based, and focused on sustainable, risk-aware, and values-driven system maturity. By translating complex ISO requirements into plain language, we help businesses build confidence, capability, and reputation in their teams.

We work with businesses of all sizes seeking structure, credibility, and confidence, whether to achieve ISO certification, meet tender or supplier requirements, reduce risk, or enhance overall business performance.

Whether you’re starting your ISO journey or evolving an existing system, Adaptable Quality provides structured guidance, mentoring, and strategic support to make compliance an asset, not a burden. Our goal is to integrate systems into daily business, supporting growth, resilience, and continuous improvement.

You won't find any templates here, and we are hands on, conversational and holistic in our approach.

ISO Consulting Brisbane • ISO Certification • ISO 9001 • Accreditation • Compliance • Business Strategy

Description:

Aligned Ventures Innovative Fund (“AVIF”) began on January 31, 2014.  It was created to provide a forward-thinking, dynamic opportunity for the management and employees of each of the companies AVIF is invested in, where management and employees work together as equals.  

Our business model puts great emphasis on our employees investing in their own future. Through matching Group RRSPs and individual investments into our group of companies, we want the success of the AVIF group of companies to be the success of our employees.

We believe that the best way to build an organization is to find great people to work with and give them opportunities to succeed. We encourage creative thinking, skill development, passion for what we do and respect for the people we work with and serve.

Our goal is to build a team of diverse people who share our 6 basic values: Seek first to understand, then to be understood; Say what you mean, Do what you say; Remember to have fun at work; Always strive to continually improve; Commitment to the health, safety, and care for the environment; And finally, to always provide legendary customer service.

AVIF’s group of companies touch on a broad range of industries. In doing so, our employees gain valuable experience and knowledge in multiple sectors. AVIF Support LP delivers centralized labour, management and administration to all of our invested entities. 

We are looking for driven individuals who share our values, enjoy challenges, and fit into our culture. We strongly believe a company’s success is the result of each employee working together as a team to achieve a collective goal. You cannot expect to finish a puzzle without all the pieces. Alone you can do so little, but together we can do so much more.

Name: Bhutan Chamber of Commerce & Industry
Description: Established under the Royal Command of His Majesty the King in 1980, the Bhutan Chamber of Commerce & Industry (BCCI) is a non-profit organization comprising of members from business community in the country, and is the apex body of the private sector in Bhutan. The General Body of the BCCI is the apex forum that comprises of business representatives from twenty Dzongkhags elected for the term of five years by the respective business members in each Dzongkhags and meets annually with the BCCI for Annual General Meeting (AGM). Under the General Body, the Executive Committee consist of President of BCCI and two Vice Presidents, and Presidents of ten sector associations, while additional five regional Executive Committee members are elected by the General Body members during the AGM once in five years. Below the Executive Committee, the Secretariat is managed by a salaried Secretary General overseeing the day-to-day functioning of the organization.

Modern yüzyılın en önemli devinimlerinden olan Bauhaus Ekolü’nün “Ressamlık, mimarlık, heykeltıraşlık ve zanaatkârlık iç içe olmalıdır” anlayışından etkilenerek İç mekan tasarımı ile başlayan Tasarım Departmanı’na, Grafik ve Ürün Tasarımı’nı da eklemiş; kişi, kurum ve kuruluşların istek, tarz ve ihtiyaçlarına yönelik daha bütüncül yaklaşımlarla tasarımlarını sunmuştur. Tasarım Departmanı, sanat ve zanaatın birleşimi üzerine kurmuş olduğu Tasarım felsefesini, sürekli üzerine ekleme bilinciyle tıpkı eğitim alanında olduğu gibi yenilikçi düşünce ile geliştirmekte ve tasarımlarını daha iyiye götürme amacını taşımaktadır. Bu bağlamda, ihtiyaca yönelik ergonomik, fonksiyonel ve sanatsal nitelikli ürünleri, bir kişiyi yada bir stili taklit etmeksizin aldığı referanslar, tasarım teorileri, modern teknoloji ve estetik görüş ışığında analiz ederek marjinal bir sunuş için sonsuz sayıda fikir üretimi ile çalışmalarına devam etmektedir.

The ICT was originally established as a forum for discussion on technology matters relating to printed circuit interconnection. This has now been expanded to include their assembly and related technology.

The ICT operates a grading procedure for membership that will enable industry to measure the levels of specialist education, skills and experience.The membership is graded into Fellow, Member and Associate, designating the level of expertise and experience.

Name: Pafos Chamber of Commerce and Industry
Description:
The Paphos Chamber of Commerce and Industry (PCCI) is a private corporate body functioning under special law The Chambers of Commerce and Industry Act of 1968 (Law 56/1968) and is financially independent, free of any influence by the state. The Chamber is funded by its members’ subscription fees, the revenue of issuing Certificates of Origin and through income generated from a number of services it provides.

The PCCI is the Paphos Union of Cypriot businessmen, the interests of whom it promotes by submitting to the government and the Parliament through the Cyprus Chamber of Commerce and Industry (CCCI) the members’ positions on matters in which they are involved, while, through its participation in tripartite bodies and committees, it conveys and promotes the views of the business community.

The PCCI was founded in 1952 under the name “Paphos Federation of Trade & Industry”, and in 1963 a new structure was adopted, which remains in operation to date, under the name of: “Paphos Chamber of Commerce and Industry”, and joined the Cyprus Chamber of Commerce and Industry (CCCI) power. In 1968, the Chamber of Commerce and Industry Law of 1968 (Law 56/1968) was passed that regulates the establishment and operation of the Local Chambers and the powers and responsibilities provided by law to the Chamber’s of Commerce and Industry.The CCCI – Cyprus Chamber of Commerce and Industry – consist of all local Chamber’s and is essentially the Federation of the Local Chambers of Commerce and Industry (CCIs) which operate in Nicosia, Limassol, Famagusta, Larnaca and Paphos. The local CCI’s have a geographical coverage of their respective districts. The membership of the CCCI exceeds 8,000 enterprises from the whole spectrum of business activity. Affiliated to it are more than 140 Professional Associations from the trade, industry and services sectors.

Name: MFBC Malaysian-Finnish Business Council (Executive Office)
Description:
Follow us on social media for the latest news and updates:
 > Facebook: www.facebook.com/malaysianfinnishbusinesscouncil
 > Google+: https://plus.google.com/+MfbcOrgMy
 > Homepage: www.mfbc.org.my
 > LinkedIn Profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/MFBC-KL/

BACKGROUND AND HISTORY
MFBC was established in early 2001 with the mission to “foster friendship and promote close and harmonious educational, economical, trade and industrial relations between Malaysia and Finland”. 

MFBC is still today a private, voluntary and non-profit organization linking the private and public sectors of Malaysia and Finland together, encouraging companies to start doing business in Malaysia, and promoting greater understanding between the countries. One of our key objectives is also to provide a discussion and networking platform for companies and organizations operating in Malaysia.

Although MFBC doesn’t provide direct business consulting, start-up or financial advisory services, we are an essential connection between Finnish companies already operating in Malaysia or companies looking to enter the market, linking them together with government organizations, ministries and consulting service providers in Malaysia. 

OUR STRATEGY AND PLAN OF ACTION
MFBC works closely together with the Finnish Embassy in Kuala Lumpur, Finpro, the EU-Malaysian Chamber of Commerce and Industry (EUMCCI) and the other European and Nordic Business Councils, which all are important links between the business community, government and public sectors in Malaysia. 

Our mutual goal is to promote the Malaysian market and business environment to Finnish companies and organizations and to encourage more companies to establishing an office or setting up operations in Malaysia. 

MFBC’s role and presence in Malaysia is valuable and highly beneficial as we represent all our members equally, promoting and safeguarding the motives and interests of our members on the market.

Name: The Loveland Group LLC
Description:
The Loveland Group LLC was founded in 2018, by Rachel E. Cargle, public academic, writer, philanthropic innovator, and social cause entrepreneur. The Loveland Group LLC includes The Great Unlearn, Elizabeth's Bookshop & Writing Centre, and Rachel's consultancy, and speaking and lecturing work. This family of ventures are dedicated to investment in Black and QTBIPOC culture, opportunity, healing, and life-long learning.  A percentage of proceeds from The Loveland Group LLC ventures go to support the work of The Loveland Foundation, Inc.
 
The Great Unlearn (TGU) is a self-paced learning community of over 22,000 Unlearners using Rachel’s curated social syllabi for and engaging with monthly experts. Areas of exploration have included the history of race, unlearning America’s birth story, Medical Racism, and the Adultification of Black girls.
 
The Great Unlearn on Instagram: www.instagram.com/thegreatunlearn/
 
Elizabeth’s Bookshop & Writing Centre is an innovative literacy center designed to amplify and celebrate marginalized voices. Its catalog highlights, promotes, and honors the work of writers who are often excluded from traditional cultural, social, and academic canons. Elizabeth’s seeks to educate and re-shape the lens of readers - how they see themselves and how they view the world.
 
Shop at Elizabeth’s: https://bookshop.org/shop/Elizabeths Elizabeth’s on Instagram: www.instagram.com/elizabethsofakron/
 
Rachel is the Founder of The Loveland Foundation, Inc., 501(c)(3) non-profit, committed to showing up for communities of color in unique and powerful ways; prioritizing access, validation, and healing, with a particular focus on Black women and girls and gnb/gnc individuals. A percentage of proceeds from The Loveland Group LLC ventures go to support the work of The Loveland Foundation, Inc.
 
To learn more about the Loveland Foundation visit: https://thelovelandfoundation.org The Loveland Foundation on Instagram: www.instagram.com/thelovelandfoundation/

Name: Landratsamt Vogtlandkreis
Description:
Das Landratsamt Vogtlandkreis ist die zentrale Verwaltungsbehörde für den Vogtlandkreis, einer der schönsten Regionen Deutschlands. Als moderner Dienstleister für rund 220.000 Bürgerinnen und Bürger stehen wir für bürgernahe, effiziente und transparente Verwaltung. 

Unsere Aufgaben reichen von klassischer Verwaltung bis hin zu Umwelt-, Bau- und Ordnungsangelegenheiten. Darüber hinaus sind wir Arbeitgeber für mehr als 1.200 Mitarbeitende in unterschiedlichen Fachbereichen - von Verwaltung und IT über Technik bis hin zu sozialen und medizinischen Berufen. 

Wir verstehen uns als verbindendes Element zwischen Bevölkerung, Wirtschaft, Kommunen und staatlichen Stellen. Dabei setzen wir auf Teamarbeit, nachhaltiges Handeln und kontinuierliche Weiterentwicklung. 

Zugleich haben wir es uns zum Ziel gesetzt, auf die Vorzüge unserer Region hinzuweisen. Der Vogtlandkreis bietet mehr als nur berufliche Perspektiven - er ist ein Ort mit hoher Lebensqualität. Eingebettet in eine reizvolle Mittelgebirgslandschaft vereint die Region Natur, Kultur und ein starkes Miteinander. Bezahlbarer Wohnraum, kurze Wege, diverse Freizeitmöglichkeiten, familienfreundliche Strukturen und eine vielfältige Wirtschaft machen das Vogtland besonders attraktiv - auch für jene, die neu in die Region kommen (wollen).

Name: Housechill Yönetim
Description:
Housechill 2000 yılında Paris'te, dünya üzerindeki gezginler ile ev sahiplerini ortak bir platformda buluşturmak amacıyla kurulmuştur.

Ardından, 2004 yılında bünyesine hukukçu, mimar, peyzaj mühendisi ve gerekli tüm teknik personeli de ekleyerek, profesyonel site ve tesis yönetimi hizmeti sunmak üzere ilk adımı atmış ve 4 yıl süren mobilizasyon ve eğitimden sonra, 2008 yılında Montpellier'de Housechill Yönetim'i hizmete açmıştır.

Housechill Yönetim, ülkemizde hızla büyüyen inşaat sektörü ve inşa edilen toplu konut ve site projelerinin artması sebebi ile Fransa'da edindiği tecrübe ve birikimleri Türkiye'deki projelere entegre etmek için 2013 yılında İstanbul'da ilk ofisini açmıştır.

Her geçen gün bünyesine yeni projeler ekleyen Housechill Yönetim; sektördeki profesyonel yönetim anlayışına İstanbul, Bursa, Paris ve Tivat ofisleri ile Housechill normlarını katmayı başarmış ve 2018 yılı itibariyle yatay büyümeyi hedefleyerek Housecurity Güvenlik firmasını kurmuş ve yönetim hizmeti sağladığı projelere bu hizmeti mobilize etmiştir.

Memnuniyet ve şeffaf yönetim anlayışını benimseyen Housechill Yönetim, hizmet verdiği her projede ilk günkü heyecan ve özveriyi korumaya devam etmekte ve müşteri portföyünü genişleterek büyümesini sürdürmektedir.

Name: Upsource
Description:
Outsourcing is not a luxury

Trying to do it all yourself can be the quickest way to burnout, not to mention forgetting important duties or making mistakes. Upsource is a small team of virtual assistants, or VAs, who work side by side with you to help support and empower you on your journey to success - whatever form that support needs to take. 

The support you need, when you need it

Let’s face it: modern lives are busy. The line between home and work has all but gone, and we’re expected to be switched on 24/7 and quick to respond. It’s just impossible to keep up with it all - and what will you let slide? What gets deprioritised in the push for more and now?

The good news is that you can manage it all, but you’ll need a little help to get there. That’s where Upsource comes in. We can help you figure out what can only be done by you, and what you can get someone else to do. We work with you to order those priorities and to help you hit your goals, to thrive in work and in life. 

Many areas of life can be outsourced. With the right support from Upsource, you can have another pair of eyes looking after your weekly online shop, helping you to keep a zero inbox, handle your calendar and diary appointments, and more. Or you can take it a step further, and have one of our able and assured (and insured!) assistants to help get your startup off the ground, handle your digital marketing, deal with accountants and Companies House - whatever you need, let’s talk about how we can support you.
Fancy a chat?

No pressure, no fuss - let’s talk about your challenges, and find a solution together.

www.weareupsource.co.uk

Name: The Free Agent Collective
Description:
One of the best things about being self-employed is that you get to do what you want to do. That’s probably why you went into business for yourself.

Now, there are going to be a lot of moving parts in your business life, no matter what the business idea and how you decide to build it. Marketing, selling, production, procurement, sub-contracting, accounting, delivery, proposal writing, contract negotiation… it’s a long, long list.

And it’s on you to figure it all out.

Often, it can be overwhelming, and it’s not helped by the general day-to-day isolation we encounter when we’ve got our heads down working on our business.

All too often, the reality is you just struggle through your issues the best you can, often wasting valuable time flip-flopping between possible options with no forward movement.

Which is where having a readily available, diverse, and easy to access team of advisors can be a game-changer for you.

People who are familiar with the challenges you’re facing and keen to share their experiences and insights with you. Peers who will encourage and support you, but also hold you accountable for taking action and moving forward. So you can grow your skills. Improve your decision-making. Build your confidence. Boost your focus and productivity. And grow your success.

And that’s exactly what The Free Agent Collective is. A ready-made community of self-employed professionals who are individually working on improving their own game and tapping into the community for accountability, advice, encouragement, and support.

When you join The Free Agent Collective, you can immediately tap into the combined wisdom of the community to help figure out what your best next step is in moving your game forward.

Easily accessible. Diverse and deep skill sets. Very affordable. And highly effective at moving you and your game forward.

Name: Sugamya Accessibility & Inclusion
Description:
About Sugamya - Accessibility and Inclusion OPC Pvt Ltd.

Sugamya - Accessibility and Inclusion OPC Pvt Ltd. is dedicated to achieving universal accessibility for persons with disabilities, aiming to create an enabling and barrier-free environment. The company focuses on three key areas:

- Built-Environment Accessibility
- Transportation System Accessibility
- Information and Communication Ecosystem Accessibility
- Disability, Inclusion and Sensitization Training

Accessibility in the Built-Environment:

Environmental access comprises a set of norms and standards designed to provide safe and independent use of various environments, including transportation, roads, buildings, and communication, by persons with disabilities. Universal design is a commitment to designing products and environments for the broadest population possible, especially for those who have traditionally been excluded from the general population.

Access Audit:
An access audit is an inspection used to assess the ease of access to, and ease of use of, an environment (such as a building or landscape), a service, or a facility by people with a range of access impairments. This audit evaluates how well a particular building or environment performs in terms of access and ease of use by a wide range of potential users, including people with disabilities, and recommends improvements.

Standards:
- Revised National Building Code 2016 (NBC): Emphasizes making buildings and public spaces friendly for people with disabilities.
- Harmonized Guidelines and Space Standards for Barrier-Free Built Environment: Developed by the Ministry of Urban Development, Government of India, these guidelines serve as a reference for ensuring accessibility in built environments.

Im Rahmen von regelmäßigen Veranstaltungen als Videokonferenzen und – wenn möglich – als Präsenzveranstaltungen möchten wir Sie herzlich einladen sich aktiv an den Diskussionen und Arbeitstreffen zu beteiligen.

Unsere Leitlinien:

Alle zusammen: Das Netzwerk lebt vom Mitmachen und der Nutzen entsteht, wenn sich alle beteiligen. 

Kommunale Familie leben: Positive wie negative Erfahrungen austauschen und für andere verfügbar machen, Wissen und Informationen teilen, Kontakte, Werkzeuge und Lösungen bereitstellen.

Offen sein: Experimentierräume im Verwaltungsalltag schaffen, auf neue Methoden einlassen, eine Fehlerkultur in den Verwaltungen etablieren

Name: Ideal Interactive Group
Description:
Ideal Interactive Group LTD is a global group of companies with HQ in Plymouth United Kingdom. 

Established in 2017 in Perth Australia, Ideal (Independent, development, Education and Learning) started out as a direct fundraising company raising vita; support for some the largest charities around the world.

Ideal Interactive Group through effective training and a successful blueprint grew very quickly. We grew the company into the U.K, NZ and Australia markets.

Our early success came down to development, we fully believe in sharing knowledge by providing industry leading training. This inspired our small team to think bigger. 

Since relocating the business back to the U.K in 2019 we now operate across four main industries. Hospitality, Real estate, Direct Marketing and Finance. 

Below are the companies under the Ideal Group umbrella 

Ideal Fundraising - A marketing agency that recruits a consistent stream of regular donors for our charity partners and non for profits via D2D, Events and B2B marketing campaigns. 

Vegginwavey Restaurants and Surf School - vegginwavey is a healthy planet conscious restaurant with a surfer theme. We operate on beaches across the Southwest U.K with plans of global expansion through franchisees. 

Ideal Property - Our real estate portfolio has investments across different countries around the world inclusive of Europe, Australia, U.K and the United States. We have a combination of rental and investment properties that generate a consistent positive cash flow.

Ideal Finance - A investment portfolio that is spread across both cryptocurrency and stocks. 

Our objective over the next 10 years is to work alongside other companies that are passionate about helping the planet and becoming more sustainable as a culture. 

Since covid-19 we are aware that things needs to change, now we are in the renewable energy age, we want to work alongside companies that are forward thinking and innovative. Contact us directly for projects.

Beyond enhancing homes, SEVA Home empowers underprivileged communities through skill-building initiatives, helping them achieve brighter futures. Every candle purchased not only lights up your home but also supports these communities, spreading joy and opportunity.
At Inspira Global, our commitment to innovation and excellence drives us to create value across all our ventures. Our diverse companies work synergistically to inspire better living and shape the future of their industries.

Name: Torres de Hércules
Description:
Las dos torres están conectadas por un puente. Son dos columnas de hormigón industrial ancladas prácticamente a nivel del mar, en lo que fue una marisma, por lo que cuenta con una cimentación a base de pilotes de hormigón armado a 40 metros de profundidad.

No solo destaca por sus aspectos arquitectónicos, también lo hace por el significado mitológico que se le atribuye pues, por su ubicación en el Estrecho de Gibraltar, punto en el que se unen dos mares y dos continentes, hacen referencia a las conocidas como "columnas de Hércules" que señalaban a los navegantes el fin del mar, "non plus ultra", frase que puede leerse en la fachada del edificio.

Rafael de La-Hoz
Rafael de La-Hoz Castanys es un arquitecto cordobés que actualmente se encuentra a cargo de la firma Rafael de La-Hoz. Fundada por su padre en 1920, fue pionera en diseño, arquitectura y sostenibilidad y cuenta con la autoría de proyectos como el Hospital Rey Juan Carlos de Móstoles, el emblemático edificio de Gran Vía 48 de Madrid o el Campus Repsol, entre otras construcciones.

Name: Stadt Buchs
Description:
Stadt in ländlicher Umgebung:

Die Stadt Buchs im St. Galler Rheintal ist das Zentrum der Region Werdenberg. Buchs ist mit über 14'000 Einwohnerinnen und Einwohnern eines der grössten städtischen Zentren zwischen dem Bodensee und Chur.

Buchs liegt im Dreiländereck Schweiz, Liechtenstein und Vorarlberg in einem ländlichen Raum inmitten einer einzigartigen Naturkulisse. Das knapp 16 km2 grosse Gemeindegebiet erstreckt sich vom Talgrund (441 m ü. M.) mit Wohn- und Arbeitsgebieten, umgeben von Landwirtschaft und Natur, über Bergwälder und Alpen bis auf den Gipfel des Glannachopfs (2'232 m ü. M.). Eingebettet zwischen Rhein und Alvier-Gebirgskette wird die kontrastreiche Landschaft weiträumig umrahmt von den bizarren Formationen des Alpsteins. Bei Föhnwetter scheinen die Berge zum Greifen nah.

Buchs bietet auf engem Raum sehr viel: Mit über 8'500 Arbeitsplätzen in allen Sektoren und Branchen ist die Stadt zunächst ein wirtschaftlich starker Werkplatz. Buchs ist zudem ein beliebter Einkaufsort und - dank der Interstaatlichen Hochschule für Technik, der International School Rheintal und des Berufs- und Weiterbildungszentrums - ein regionales Bildungszentrum. Ebenfalls bereichert ein vielfältiges Kulturangebot auf kleinstem Raum. Buchs bietet also Wohnen mit hoher Lebensqualität und einem vielfältigen Lebensraum direkt vor der Haustür.

Buchs liegt verkehrsgünstig und ist gut erschlossen mit dem öffentlichen Verkehr und der Autobahn A13. Die Städte St.Gallen, Chur und Zürich sowie Feldkirch (A) und Bregenz (A) sind innerhalb einer Fahrzeit von rund einer Stunde erreichbar. Bis zum Flughafen St.Gallen-Altenrhein sind es nur 40 Kilometer.

Name: Robe River Kuruma Aboriginal Corporation RNTBC
Description:
Based in Karratha, Western Australia, Robe River Kuruma Aboriginal Corporation's vision is to work together as a community to establish a solid foundation towards independence, community wellbeing, healthy Country, and cultural identity now and for future generations. 
Robe River Kuruma Aboriginal Corporation (RRKAC) is the registered native title body corporate for Robe River Kuruma (RRK) native title determined areas. The RRK people have traditional rights to an area covering nearly 16, 000 square kilometres in the Pilbara region of Western Australia. Their lands lie within the Shire of Ashburton and comprise part of the Fortescue River and the complete river system of the Robe River, in the most westerly part of the Hamersley Range.
RRKAC has a pivotal role in progressing the broader interests of approximately 400 RRK people and in representing them in their dealings with government and the private sector. In addition, RRKAC monitors and implements obligations under the RRK people's various participation agreements, provides services that protect and preserve RRK cultural heritage, and utilises charitable trust funds to deliver programs for the betterment of the RRK people.

Name: Grønt Iværksætterpanel

Danmark har brug for et stærkt grønt iværksættermiljø, der kan skabe nye ideer og løsninger 

Iværksættere med grønne løsninger er en vigtig del af den grønne omstilling af Danmark. Vi har som samfund brug for et stærkt grønt iværksættermiljø, der kan skabe nye ideer og løsninger, og bidrage til, at mere viden og forskning bliver kommercialiseret til nye grønne iværksættersucceser 

Derfor har regeringen nedsat Grønt Iværksætterpanel, som skal komme med anbefalinger til, hvordan man kan understøtte, at Danmark får flere grønne iværksættere og bliver kendt som et grønt iværksætterland. Panelet skal også udmønte midler til mindre, eksperimentende pilotprojekter og testforløb inden for grønt iværksætteri.

I spidsen for panelet står iværksætter og investor Esben Gadsbøll, der bl.a. er medstifter af WhiteAway Group, TechBBQ og partner i Nordic Makers.

Alle medlemmer af Grønt Iværksætterpanel:
 Esben Gadsbøll (formand), formand Danske Tech Startups, medstifter af WhiteAway Group, medstifter af TechBBQ, partner i Nordic Makers
 Jes Broeng, Professor og direktør for DTU Entrepreneurship
 Jesper Højberg Christensen, Næstformand i DanBan og chefredaktør på Bootstrapping.dk

In 2016 Willis Bond & Co took ownership and has completely refurbished the buildings welcoming surrounding tenants Catalina Bay Farmers Market, Siamese Doll, Fabric and Little Creatures into the exciting hub of Catalina Bay.
 
There are monthly membership options for Flexi and Fixed members. For smaller businesses looking for longer term agreements, seven studios are available retaining all the benefits of the co-working environment while enjoying your own private space to work in.
 
The Hangar at Catalina Bay also provides meeting rooms and conference facilities to hire by the hour, half or full day.

Contact us to secure your space today!

Name: Downtown Bozeman Partnership
Description:
The Downtown Bozeman Partnership serves as an incorporated management agency providing combined operational support in the form of offices and employees for its three member organizations: Business Improvement District, Downtown Bozeman Association, and Urban Renewal District.

The Downtown Business Improvement District (BID) is an organization of downtown property owners who work together to keep our downtown a safe, beautiful and vibrant place. The BID administers numerous programs including the summer flower baskets, holiday lighting, graffiti removal service, and year-round maintenance staff.

The Downtown Bozeman Association (DBA) is a membership organization that promotes downtown Bozeman as a center of business, culture and entertainment. Annual DBA special events include: the Christmas Stroll, the Bridal Walk, Crazy Days, the Art Walk series, Music on Main, and the Cruisin’ on Main car show. The DBA also administers the Downtown Dollars program.

The Downtown Urban Renewal District (URD) was created to fund the implementation of the 1995 Downtown Bozeman Urban Renewal Plan. As mandated by Montana Code, the URD invests in infrastructure projects and economic development initiatives that add long-term value to the district. Utilizing tax increment financing, the URD was the major funding source for downtown's Bridger Park--Bozeman's first parking garage.

Name: Stadt Albstadt
Description:
Albstadt ist eine Wohlfühlstadt, in der es sich auf hohem Niveau arbeiten und leben lässt.

Ist es die unberührte Natur, in die wir eingebettet sind? Oder das städtische Flair, das Albstadt urban und familiär zugleich macht? Sind es die kurzen Wege zum Arbeitsplatz und zur Kita? Die Möglichkeiten, Loipe oder Trail mit dem Alltag zu verbinden? Die Bildungsinstitutionen von Weltrang? Oder die großen Chancen für neue Einwohner*innen und Unternehmer*innen?

Wir sind stolz auf Arbeitgeber von Weltrang und viele gleichermaßen traditionsreiche wie erfolgreiche Mittelständler, die einen wichtigen Beitrag für uns alle leisten. Sie lassen viele Albstädter ganz entspannt in die Zukunft blicken - selbst sportliche Mittagspausen mit den Langlaufskiern in der Loipe oder mit dem Mountainbike auf einem Trail sind hier ganz normal.

Jobs bei der Stadtverwaltung sind angestaubt und spöde? Nicht in Albstadt! Denn auch hier leben wir unser Motto Arbeiten. Weit über normal. Ob hybrid, oder im Büro. Ob Teilzeit, oder Gleitzeit. Ob kreativ, technisch, oder mit Kindern. Alles ist möglich!

Auf unserem Stellenportal findest Du unsere aktuellsten Stellenangebote und Deinen Weg nach Albstadt. Komm vorbei und lass Dich überzeugen https://albstadt.bewerbung.dvvbw.de/index.

Name: PS-Elektro B.V.
Description:
Wat voor pand is het? Wat voor installatie wilt u hebben? Wat is voor u belangrijk zoals, BREEAM, functionaliteit of efficiënt gebruik van het daglicht. Dat zijn onder andere de vragen die nodig zijn voor een gedegen ontwerp. We bespreken de antwoorden op deze vragen graag met u en maken zo een gedegen onderbouwing voor het ontwerp. Of u nu installateur bent (met de handen in het haar) of een architect, het ontwerp is gedegen en onderbouwd. Uw wensen zijn het uitgangspunt voor het ontwerp, maar wij zorgen er ook voor dat het ontwerp voldoet aan alle normen en veiligheidseisen, zoals:

- veiligheidseisen
- brandveiligheid
- verlichtingsnormen
- ontruiming voorschriften

De volgende stap is het opstellen van het bestek. Daarin zetten wij alles klaar voor de installateur om aan de installaties te werken. Het resultaat van het ontwerp is de werktekeningen en bestek: de basis voor de calculaties.

Op basis van de werktekeningen, maken wij de calculaties. Daarbij gaan we verder dan alleen het berekenen wat de installaties kosten: we checken bijvoorbeeld ook de technische haalbaarheid, of het ontwerp voldoet aan de NEN-normen en gebruiksgemak. Daarnaast nemen wij ook de hulpmiddelen, het materieel en de personeelskosten mee in de kostprijsbegroting.
Wij werken met ons eigen ontworpen calculatietool, welke op een makkelijke manier in gelezen kan worden bij  Syntess, Acto, ENK, Install Office.

Name: Elche Coworking

Trabaja a tu ritmo

Has decidido emprender. Ahora tienes miles de ideas en la cabeza, miles de acciones para llevar a cabo y validar tu proyecto.

No es momento de gastar energía en  alquilar un local, diseñarlo, ocuparte de todos los gastos (luz, agua, seguros...) ¿Y cuándo tienes que salir de ese espacio? ¿Quién se queda para atender a tus clientes, recibir tu correo o gestionar tus llamadas? Solo estás tú!

Por esa razón, porque ya hemos vivido esa soledad del emprendedor te ofrecemos Elche Coworking.

Paga solo por el tiempo que necesites. Tenemos oficinas individuales y espacios de trabajo flexibles que puedes contratar por horas, días, semanas o periodos concretos.

Una sala de reuniones para que puedas atender a tus clientes o proveedores con las mayores comodidades (agasájalos de una forma que se lleve el mejor recuerdo de ti, nosotros nos ocupamos de todos los detalles)

 Una sala de formación para que empieces a comprobar que el miedo escénico no te paralizó y que te sientes muy muy cómodo compartiendo con los demás tu conocimiento. A eso le llaman KnowHow y tú quieres también ayudar a otros, como nosotros lo vamos a hacer contigo.

Comparte con otras personas como tú esos días negros que sufrimos los emprendedores. ¿Quién mejor que nosotros para saber lo que cuesta seguir los sueños? ¿Y quién mejor que nosotros para darte ese respaldo y fuerza que necesitas en estos días tontos? No queremos que decaigas, #juntosesmasfacil

Trabaja a tu ritmo junto a la comunidad de @ElcheCoworking. Y disfruta de lo que haces.

Name: SpectraGeo
Description:
Fundada em 2018, a SpectraGeo surgiu como uma empresa de geologia, geofísica e inovação tecnológica situada na incubadora do Parque Tecnológico da COPPE/UFRJ. A empresa é composta por equipe multidisciplinar de geólogos, físicos e geofísicos que tiveram como know-how os setores de O&G e geotecnia, e, a partir disso, se juntaram para agregar tecnologia e fornecer soluções para outros setores do mercado.
Desde a fundação, a natureza da empresa esteve associada à oferta de serviços executados a partir da integração dos métodos geofísicos, geológicos e de sensoriamento remoto nas áreas de parques eólicos e solares, linhas de transmissão, geotecnia, mapeamento de aquíferos e gestão hídrica, contaminação de solo e mineração. A SpectraGeo desenvolve soluções para mapeamento de subsuperfície a partir da utilização de técnicas de alta resolução e baixo impacto ambiental.
Para isso, a empresa utiliza não somente os métodos geofísicos tradicionais, mas quando possível, recorre também às inovações tecnológicas a fim de melhorar a qualidade e abrangência dos resultados, facilitar a leitura dos entregáveis, reduzir tempo e custo para os clientes. 
A empresa possui equipamentos para aquisição de dados sísmicos, elétricos, eletromagnéticos e tem vasta experiência com os métodos potenciais e consultoria técnica. Para todos os métodos citados é possível realizar o fluxo de trabalho completo, desde a aquisição até a interpretação dos dados.
A SpectraGeo faz parte do time de empresas de inovação e aceleração do Vetor AG da Andrade Gutierrez. Nossos principais clientes são: Andrade Gutierrez; Elecnor; Braskem; Prefeitura de Marica e IGUA. E os principais parceiros são: COPPE/UFRJ; Universidade Federal Rural do Rio de Janeiro e AG.

Name: Kontorfællesskabet 5teSTED
Description:
Kontorfællesskabet 5teSTED 

Københavns hyggeligste kontorfællesskab ligger i Gothersgade - lige ved Kgs. Nytorv.

Har du brug for et dejligt sted at arbejde og søde folk omkring dig, er 5teSTED det helt perfekte sted.

5teSTED blev oprettet i sin nuværende form i 2011 som en naturlig udvikling af et mindre set-up med stort branchespænd og en enormt hyggelig stemning rundt om frokostbordet. En stemning vi har bibeholdt til trods for at vi i dag består af mere end 80 virksomheder og over 130 kontorkolleger. 

Hvor end du sidder i huset, sidder du ved siden af en kompetencestærk kollega hvor sparring, networking og samarbejde er en mulighed. Vi har et utal af samarbejder på tværs af huset. Mange formes over en kop kaffe i frokoststuen eller på netværksmøderne, der foregår en gang om måneden.

Navnet
4. dimension, 5te sted, 6.sans...? Navnet stammer fra dengang Wilhelm Hansen-brødrene købte huset i 1874. Dengang var 5teSTED en del af adressen på bygningen, fordi den er 5te bygning fra Kongens Nytorv. Wilhelm Hansen-brødrene havde i tidernes morgen den største produktion af noder i Europa og blev efterfølgende til musikforlag og meget andet. I dag ejes bygningerne af Wilhelm Hansen Fonden, der lejer det meste ud til 5teSTED, der drives af Mikkel og Britt.

Ledige pladser
Vi er som oftest meget tæt på fuldt belagt, men er du på udkig efter en plads eller et kontor, så kontakt os alligevel. Vi er gode til at finde på løsninger.   

Kontakt os på 3325 5800 eller mail@5tested.dk, så aftaler vi en tid, hvor du kan kigge forbi, se stedet an og smage vores gode kaffe.

Welcome to the Executive Roundtable, where C-Suite and VP leaders come together to share invaluable insights, gain new perspectives, and deepen their knowledge in a truly unique and interactive setting.

For over 15 years, our exclusive forums have brought together a diverse group of senior-level (VP to C-Suite) professionals from different industries and organizations, spanning from Fortune 100 companies to disruptive startups in hypergrowth. With panel discussions taking place in 23+ markets across 12+ states, and growing, each event is meticulously curated, ensuring that our guest lists are limited to foster an intimate and engaging experience. We believe in creating an environment where panelists and attendees alike can savor the opportunity to connect, sparking meaningful conversations and forging lasting connections. In order to do so, our events are private and attendance is limited.

Please contact us at Emily.Connors@ExecutiveRoundtable.org with any questions or inquiries.

Name: The South Big Data Innovation Hub
Description:
Our Vision is to mobilize the Southern data science community to collectively accelerate scientific discovery and innovation, spur economic development in the region, broaden participation and diversity in data science, and address societal challenges affecting the Southern United States. 

At this moment, businesses, researchers, governments, and individuals are creating digital data at an unprecedented pace. However, the great challenge is how to harness these large, complex data sets and research findings into economic growth and positive impacts for people and communities. 

The South Hub builds the necessary bridges and acts as a community convener, collaboration hub, and catalyst for data science innovation, through education, funding support, and collective action. The Hub also amplifies the successes of the community, provides programs and funding, as well as shares credit across the community to encourage collaboration and mutual success toward shared Goals and Priority Areas

The South Hub serves the Southern U.S. Census Region (i.e. 16 States: Delaware - Texas, including Washington DC, Puerto Rico, the U.S. Virgin Islands, and territories). It is part of a network of four regional Big Data Hubs, launched by the National Science Foundation including the Midwest, Northeast, and West Big Data Hubs, to engage local or regional stakeholders, e.g., city, county, and state governments, local industry, and nonprofits, and regional academic institutions, in big data research, and permit a focus on regional issues. The Hubs are funded in part by host universities and other partners. 

The South Big Data Innovation Hub is managed jointly by the Georgia Institute of Technology and the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill, the South Hub provides critical infrastructure for the transition of Big Data to Benefits—with more than 1300+ members from universities, corporations, foundations, and cities committing their support.

Name: Secretaria Nacional de Políticas Penais (SENAPPEN)
Description: A Secretaria Nacional de Políticas Penais (SENAPPEN), vinculada ao Ministério da Justiça e Segurança Pública, é o órgão executivo responsável por acompanhar a aplicação da Lei de Execução Penal e implementar as diretrizes da Política Penitenciária Nacional. Suas competências estão previstas na Lei nº 7.210/1984 e em normativos complementares. A SENAPPEN administra o Sistema Penitenciário Federal, voltado ao isolamento de lideranças do crime organizado e à custódia de presos de alta periculosidade, e também é gestora do Fundo Penitenciário Nacional (FUNPEN), que financia ações de modernização do sistema prisional. A Secretaria é responsável pela estruturação da Polícia Penal Federal, força de segurança pública criada pela Emenda Constitucional nº 104/2019 e regulamentada em 2024, bem como pela gestão das carreiras que a compõem: Policial Penal Federal, Especialista Federal em Assistência à Execução Penal (nível superior) e Técnico Federal de Apoio à Execução Penal (nível médio).

Name: Eavesdropping Detection Solutions (EDS) (A business division of CBIA)
Description:
Eavesdropping Detection Solutions (EDS) is one of the World's leading technical surveillance countermeasures (TSCM) service providers. EDS is based in South Africa but also provides consultation and survey services on a select basis to other regions in the World. 

EDS provides high quality survey services, training courses and equipment to government and professional corporate TSCM teams.

EDS is one of a handful of TSCM service providers in the World that is capable and equipped to provide a cyber TSCM survey service. 

All EDS staff are trained, certified and registered members of associations such as the Espionage Research Institute International (ERII), Business Espionage Countermeasures South Africa (BECSA), ASIS International, South African Institute of Security (SAIS) and many more.

EDS uses only the latest and most advanced countermeasures equipment available on the market. All our equipment carries a Certificate of Quality from the manufacturers. The certificate affirms that the equipment is of the latest model, firmware, software and recently serviced and calibrated.

Name: BNI Urban Professionals

Our Philosophy 

The philosophy of this organization is built upon the idea of "Givers Gain": By giving business to others, you will get business in return. This is predicated on the age-old idea of "What goes around, comes around." 

Our Mission 

The mission of BNI is to help members increase their business through a structured, positive, and professional "word-of-mouth" program that enables them to develop long-term, meaningful relationships with quality business professionals. 

Belonging to BNI is like having dozens of sales people working for you... 

...because all of them carry several copies of your business cards around with them. When they meet someone who could use your products or services, they take out your card and recommend you.* It's as simple as that! It's simple because it's based on a proven concept by BNI Founder, Dr. Ivan Misner, called "Givers Gain." If I give you business you'll give me business and we'll both benefit as a result. 

Last year alone, members of BNI passed 6.2 million referrals... 

...which generated over $2.6 billion dollars (U.S.) worth of business for its members! BNI is a business and professional networking organization that allows only one person per professional classification or specialty to join a chapter.

¿Qué hacemos?

Nos dedicamos a gestionar de manera integral la información socio-territorial, utilizando datos relevantes para la toma de decisiones y estratégias que impulsen un turismo sostenible: 

- Analítica de datos para la oferta y demanda de la actividad turística.
- Diagnóstico socio-territorial para la planificación turística.

Brindamos oportunidades formativas para que los diferentes actores del turismo puedan adquirir conocimientos y habilidades bajo un enfoque práctico:

- Programas de formación y capacitación.
- Certificaciones y formación en alianza con instituciones educativas.
- Formación especializada a través de viajes experienciales y pasantías.

Promovemos el fortalecimiento de emprendedores, incentivando acciones colaborativas y acceso a mejores mercados:

- Mentoría para el emprendimiento y desarrollo de negocios.
- Vinculación con actores claves en la cadena de valor del turismo.

Implementamos una visión compartida del turismo en el territorio, diseñando soluciones innovadoras y estratégicas que promuevan el patrimonio natural y cultural:

- Planificación territorial y estratégica para el desarrollo turístico.
- Puesta en valor del patrimonio natural y cultural.

Impulsamos la ejecución de proyectos turísticos que generen un impacto positivo en distintos actores de interés, a través de la implementación de criterios ASG (ambientales, sociales y de gobernanza) como parte integral de la estrategia de sostenibilidad de una organización:

- Diseño e implementación de estrategias de sostenibilidad con foco en turismo

Name: Old Harbor Native Corporation
Description:
Incorporated in 1973 under the Alaska Native Claims Settlement Act, Old Harbor Native Corporation (OHNC) began with 329 shareholders and today represents approximately 550. Shareholders primarily reside in Anchorage, Kodiak, and Old Harbor, with others living as far away as Iceland and Switzerland.

OHNC’s mission is to grow and manage the Corporation’s assets for the benefit of shareholders while preserving and protecting the Alutiiq culture, traditions, and values of this 7,500-year-old community. The Corporation maintains a diverse investment portfolio that includes commercial real estate holdings in Anchorage and Kodiak, market securities, and ownership in several successful subsidiaries.

In 2002, OHNC formed Three Saints Bay, LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary focused on federal government contracting. Through its family of companies, including Amee Bay, Barling Bay, Rolling Bay, Shearwater Systems, Ocean Bay, and Kiliuda Consulting, Three Saints Bay continues to grow and expand in both national and international markets.

Beyond government contracting, OHNC invests in industries that strengthen Alaska’s infrastructure and support sustainable growth. Kodiak Microwave Systems provides rural broadband and communication services across Kodiak Island and the Kenai Peninsula. Delta Leasing delivers high-quality equipment leasing and rental services throughout Alaska’s oil, gas, and construction sectors. Geofortis produces natural pozzolan products that offer a sustainable alternative to traditional cement, reducing the environmental impact of concrete manufacturing.

For over five decades, OHNC has remained dedicated to the well-being of its people, community, and shareholders. Guided by the wisdom of Elders and the leadership of the Board of Directors, the Corporation continues to honor its heritage while building opportunities for future generations.

•	Health & Benefits, which involves developing optimal employee health plans with the carriers themselves, as well as determining a suite of alternate remuneration options to provide equitable solutions to employees
•	Mergers & Acquisitions, examining fit across cultures, job-types, transaction costs
•	Communication, including tracking employee attitudes, engagement, and other employee behaviors
•	Recruitment process outsourcing
At A.R.M. Consulting, we take a holistic approach to helping our clients. We see HR as a critical part of any business, and regard people as the most important asset in any organization.
Our Capabilities include:
•	Business Process Management and Redesign (BPM and BPR)

Name: Association of Professionals and Supervisors of CBC/RC
Description:
The Association of Professionals and Supervisors of CBC/Radio-Canada (APS) represents all first-line supervisory staff and professional employees of CBC/Radio-Canada, and all employees who perform similar or comparable functions, excluding certain specific areas of activity. Members may be permanent, contractual or temporary employees. More than 900 employees spread across the country are included in APS, from St. John’s to Vancouver, with a large concentration of members in Toronto, Montreal and Ottawa.

The fundamental objective of APS is to support its members. First, the Association represents its members in negotiations with CBC/Radio-Canada on numerous matters, including wages, staff benefits, insurance and many others. As well, it comes to the defense of any member who may become the victim of an injustice, abuse or discrimination. It also promotes integration and the development of ties among employees through various social activities. Finally, the Association, viewing transparency as a value to be defended, keeps its members informed, in a timely fashion, of everything concerning the above.

Name: Stay at home Dad - SAHD
Description: Stay at home dad - True, only 159,000 men are classified as full-time fathers according to the 2006 U.S. Census Bureau numbers. That’s compared with 5.6 million full-time moms. INSPIRAR, INCUBAR Y ACELERAR GRUPOS DE TRABAJO Y COMPAÑÍAS
Para el desarrollo, construcción, acceso al mercado y sostenimiento de los primeros meses de vida de productos de software global.

¿Que Buscamos?
Identificar, evaluar, seleccionar y desarrollar el ciclo de vida de una idea para convertirse en un producto de software global.

¿Que es inspirar?
Transformar una idea en un diseño de producto factible y con mercado, basados en potenciar las cualidades específicas diferenciales, el mercado objetivo y las capacidades de los creadores.

¿Que es incubar?
Transformar un diseño de producto (factible y con mercado) y un equipo, en una organización capaz de producirlo y evolucionarlo de manera sistemática y profesional, logrando una versión temprana de un producto.

¿Que es acelerar?
Empujar una organización que supo crear un producto temprano con potencial real, en una empresa establecida, independiente y con capacidad de generar y evolucionar nuevas ideas sustentables.

Name: Resume Writer
Description:
Resume Services:

Our resume services and packages are designed to be consultative experiences that provide you with a unique process that allows you to truly uncover your professional worth, value and professional story. Check out our packages below or if you are looking for a more customized offering, scroll down to request a quote.

Resume Package:

The Professional Resume & Profile Branding Package is designed for the high performing professional interested in branding themselves professionally. 

Resume Process & Service Description

Branding Questionnaire: Our Branding Questionnaire is designed to get you started thinking about your professional brand, where you've been, what you've accomplished, and where you are headed in your career. 

Upfront Resume Consultation: Once you complete the Branding Questionnaire, we will partner you with an expert resume writer best suited to your background, goals, and personality. You will meet with our resume expert for a consultative upfront meeting over the phone or via Skype. During this meeting, the resume writer will work with you to hone your accomplishments and develop powerful messaging around your unique, executive brand. 

Resume Revision Process: Within 5 - 7 business days of the upfront meeting, you with receive the first draft of your resume. Our resume expert will work directly with you and provide up to 2 to 3 rounds of edits. 

Resume: The final resume will further your executive brand and boost your earning potential. The resume will clearly define your objectives, identify your top achievements and showcase your career trajectory.

Bio: A one page bio that will showcase your unique career trajectory and can be used in job search, speaking engagements, project outlines, or wherever a bio is needed. 

Cover Letter & Thank You Letter: Your resume writer will also supply you with a flexible and impressive cover letter and thank you note to use during your job search.

Name: Center for ECOintention
Description:
Alles is energie. De mens kan deze energie met zijn aandacht en intentie versterken en richting geven. Dat is de basis van ECOintention. 

ECOintention is een methode om gezonde energie en flow in organisaties en natuurgebieden terug te brengen. In een helder traject krijgen managers en beheerders handvatten om hun systeem weer vitaal te maken. Door de energie terug te brengen en met intentie richting te geven verbeteren welzijn en communicatie en wordt de output verhoogd. 
 
ECOintention is uniek
Er bestaat geen andere methode die gezonde energie en flow in de organisatie terugbrengt en tegelijkertijd de opdrachtgever coacht. Bewustwordings- en veranderprocessen gaan door deze integrale manier van werken sneller en zijn duurzamer.

Alles is Energie
Het atom bestaat voor 99,99999999% uit ruimte gevuld met levensenergie. Alle oude culturen hadden een naam voor levensenergie, in de wetenschap spreekt men van nulpuntenergie. Levensenergie wordt gevoed door aandacht en gericht door intentie. Zo kan iederen de gezonde kracht in zijn bedrijf en de natuur verbeteren. 

Mind Moves Matter
ECOintention verbindt moderne wetenschappelijke kennis met oude wijsheid en maakt deze tot een praktisch toepasbare methode. De basisgedachte is: Mind Moves Matter. 

Coaching
Als opdrachtgever word je tijdens het hele traject gecoacht. Je leert hoe je organisatie energetisch functioneert, hoe je de energie beheert en met intentie richting geeft. Het oplossen van stagnatie in het  bedrijf en van oude patronen bij jezelf zijn belangrijke onderdelen. 

Center for ECOintention heeft meer dan 25 jaar ervaring met het toepassen van de methode in talrijke projecten op kleine en grote schaal, lokaal en internationaal. Ir Hans Andeweg en Rijk Bols zijn de oprichters en dagelijkse leiding van Center for ECOintention. Het werken met levensenergie en vitaliseren van bedrijven en natuurgebieden is hun dagelijks werk. Zij verzorgen ook de beroepsopleiding tot ECOintention Practitioner.
