Description:
Joru Green Solutions bv is naast adviseur en uitvoerder rondom groen dak groen gevel aanleg, het Verkoopkantoor van groene sector Nederland. Het kantoor is verantwoordelijk voor de uitbouw van het verkoopnetwerk en het aanbrengen en begeleiden van de projecten. Het verkoopkantoor groene sector Nederland met hun projectmanagers zorgen er samen voor dat de systemen worden voorgeschreven door opdrachtgevers, woningbouwverenigingen, architecten, studiebureaus etc. Deze projectmatige benadering heeft zich op de markt reeds bijzonder succesvol bewezen.

Joru Begroeningstechniek BV gelooft in een duurzame wereld en werkt daarom samen met haar partners Fier Dakcontrol, Green Art Solutions en Stichting Roofupdate. Dankzij deze samenwerking bent u verzekerd van onafhankelijk advies over groene daken, daktuinen en groene gevels. 

Wij delen namelijk graag onze mening en hebben een passie voor de natuur. Dankzij deze passie bent u verzekerd van onafhankelijk advies over het conserveren, renoveren en transformeren tot Innovatieve groene Dak & Gevel-oplossingen.

Door onze kennis en ervaringen op alle onderdelen van het dak & gevel kunnen wij een optimaal product aanbieden, waarbij er steeds een aanspreekpunt is gedurende het gehele proces. Naast het uitvoeren van werkzaamheden voor grote aannemersbedrijven, werken wij ook graag voor particulieren opdrachtgevers. Wij zijn dan ook erg servicegericht en proberen samen met de klant tot een goed eindresultaat te komen, waarin zowel de klant als wijzelf tevreden kunnen zijn.

Name: E7 GRUP
Description:
• 1966'da Gaziantep'te kurulan fabrika ile 10 yıl süreyle Türkiye'nin 4. büyük imalatçısı olarak ayakkabı sektöründe yer aldı.

• 1976'dan 1986'ya kadar 10 yıl süreyle ithalat ile ilgili iş faaliyetlerini sürdürdü.

• 1986'dan 2008'e kadar 22 yıl gayrimenkul yatırımı ve inşaat sektörü alanlarında faaliyet gösterdi.

• 2008 yılının Eylül ayından itibaren E7 YapıMarket adı altında 'tedarikçi firma' olarak hizmet vermeye başladı.

• 2008 yılının Aralık ayından itibaren E7 Yapı Halkalı'da 850 dairelik ilk projesine imza attı.

• 2009 yılının Ocak ayından itibaren enerji sektöründe, E7 Enerji olarak faaliyet göstermeye başladı.

• 2009 yılının Haziran ayında yapı malzemeleri grubunda üretici markası olan ZIMMER´i faaliyete geçirdi.

• 2009 yılında grup bünyesine katılan E7 Elektrik bölümü ile elektrik alanında da çalışmalarda bulunmaya başladı.

• 2010 yılında E7 Maden olarak maden sektöründe faaliyet göstermeye başladı.

• 2010 yılında NETZ markasıyla ısı yalıtım sektöründe sıva filesi ithalatına başladı.

• 2011 yılında SETTE markasıyla Endüstriyel Mutfak alanında E7 Mutfak faaliyet göstermeye başladı.

• 2011 yılında yapı malzemeleri grubunda üretici markası olan MESSIGRANIT' i dâhil etti.

• 2011 yılında Akçakoca'da 5 yıldızlı Sky Tower Hotel E7 Grup bünyesinde hizmet vermeye başladı.

Name: Stadt Mössingen
Description:
Sozial – Sicher – Modern

Die Große Kreisstadt Mössingen liegt im schönen Landkreis Tübingen. Die Stadtverwaltung mit ihren ca. 450 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern in unterschiedlichsten Bereichen besitzt die Strukturen einer Großen Kreisstadt, behält sich jedoch eine familiäre Arbeitsatmosphäre, in der man einander kennt.

Wir bieten unseren Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern ein abwechslungsreiches Arbeitsumfeld in der Stadtverwaltung, den Stadtwerken, der Stadtbücherei sowie in unseren Kindertageseinrichtungen. Hier können Sie sich einbringen und eigenverantwortlich aktiv sein! Mit gut ausgebildetem, engagiertem und motiviertem Personal entwickelt die Stadt sich permanent weiter mit dem Ziel, bestmöglich für die Bürgerinnen und Bürger der Stadt da zu sein.

Die Vorteile für unsere Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter im Überblick:
- Flexible Arbeitszeiten mit Gleitzeitkonto in der Kernverwaltung
- Viele Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten durch selbst gewählte Seminare und Fortbildungen
- Ein umfassendes Betriebliches Gesundheitsmanagement: kostenlose Nutzung der Mössinger Bäder, jährlicher Zuschuss für Kurse zur Gesundheitsprävention, zahlreiche Sportgruppen, Seminare aus dem Themenbereich Gesundheit und vieles mehr
- Bei Bedarf garantieren wir einen Platz in einer Kindertagesstätte im Stadtgebiet Mössingen

Größten Wert legen wir auch auf die Ausbildung unserer Nachwuchskräfte, weshalb bei der Stadt und den Stadtwerken ein vielseitiges Ausbildungsangebot zur Verfügung steht.

Außerdem bieten wir Ihnen die Möglichkeit, einen Freiwilligendienst (Bundesfreiwilligendienst, Freiwilliges Soziales Jahr) in ganz unterschiedlichen Bereichen der Stadt zu absolvieren.

Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Bewerbung!

Name: VEA
Description:
Today’s changing job market and technologies demand and allow for the efficient, professional and economical support acquired through the services of a Virtual Executive Assistant (VEA). This structure allows you to utilize services on an “as needed” basis.  You can get what you need when you need it.

My experience includes working with business owners, executives, managers, spouses, architects, brokers, bankers, stylists, designers, producers, writers, attorneys and real estate agents. A wide-range of diverse professionals have relied on my professional experience with their projects including creating and maintaining new file systems and personal schedules, tracking and managing expenses, scheduling business travel, conference reservations and lodging. I also offer on-line research, as well as placing custom orders ensuring on-time delivery and receipt.  Spanish/English translation services are also available as I am bilingual. These services and many more are also available to the non-business individual who may require help with their busy everyday life.

If you have a need for an efficient, capable and professional VEA on an as-needed Basis, please consider me as your loyal 100% private Personal Assistant.  

Please feel free to contact me anytime by email or phone.  I will respond promptly.

Name: The Garage - Rapid City
Description:
What was once a specialty car dealership and auto repair shop is being converted into an innovative, contemporary coworking space in downtown Rapid City for small businesses, nonprofits and freelance creatives this spring. “The Garage – Rapid City” is a new building concept and work environment that is the first of it’s kind for Rapid City.

The coworking space is located in the Motor Service Building at 402 Saint Joseph Street in Rapid City. Built in 1929 by Edgar Morrisson, the building was recently placed on the Historical Registry, and underwent exterior restoration to the brickwork, neon signs and front awnings. Nearly a half million dollars is going into renovating the interior space for the new coworking concept.

The downtown development project is a collaboration between three local businesses: McCarthy Properties, MAC Construction and The Numad Group. 

Location 
402 Saint Joseph Street, downtown Rapid City

Total Square Footage 
7,000

Building features 
•	10 private offices 
•	12 private, assigned workstations in an open floor concept through a membership program
•	Additional first-come, first-serve open work stations through a membership program
•	1 conference room 
•	Open before and after traditional working hours 
•	Completely wireless 
•	Video conferencing capabilities 
•	State-of-the-art lighting, with lots of natural light 
•	High ceilings and historic architectural elements
•	Safe and secure document storage 
•	Kitchen 
•	Bathrooms and showers 
•	Available for small events
•	Meter-free parking just outside the building

Name: Latvijas Raidorganizāciju asociācija
Description:
Biedrība “Latvijas Raidorganizāciju asociācija” (LRA) ir dibināta 2001. gadā ar mērķi veidot atbildīgu Latvijas mediju vidi, pārstāvēt un aizstāvēt tās biedru intereses. LRA apvieno ietekmīgākos Latvijas komerciālos elektroniskos plašsaziņas līdzekļus. LRA pastāvēšanas pamatā ir tās biedru atbildība pret Latvijas sabiedrību un mediju vidi, kā arī tos vienojošās vērtības: vārda brīvība, viedokļu daudzveidība, tiesiskums, godīga konkurence un citas demokrātiskas sabiedrības pamatvērtības.
 
LRA līdzdarbojas visos ar Latvijas mediju vides un politikas veidošanu un mediju konkurētspējas palielināšanu saistītos procesos, piedaloties diskusijās ar valsts pārvaldes iestādēm un nevalstiskajām organizācijām. LRA darba kārtībā ir tādi vitāli svarīgi jautājumi kā jauna normatīvā regulējuma izstrāde, sabiedrisko mediju iziešana no reklāmas tirgus, iespējamās izmaiņas televīzijas zemes un radio apraides nodrošināšanas kārtībā, kā arī risinājumu meklējumi nacionālā satura veidošanas atbalstam.

The Crizone Advantage:
We handle the overhead so you can focus on your core business. Every Crizone member enjoys:
• Seamless Connectivity: Enterprise-grade high-speed internet with redundant backups.

Name: AS KALİBRASYON
Description:
AS KALİBRASYON LTD. ŞTİ. 01.09.2008 de,ülkemiz sanayi sektörüne TS EN ISO/IEC 17025 şartlarına uygun kalibrasyon hizmeti vermek amacıyla kurulmuştur.
 
İstikrarlı büyümeyi amaçlayan AS KALİBRASYON, tüm çalışanlarıyla birlikte oluşturduğu '' Takım Ruhunu '' kaliteli hizmetle birleştirerek, bu faaliyetlerin sürekliliğini sağlamak ve her noktada sürekli gelişebilmek için TS EN ISO/IEC 17025 standardını uygulamaktadır.
 
Laboratuarımız sıcaklık, basınç, kütle,terazi,hacimsel,boyutsal olmak üzere toplam 7 konuda tek denetimde TÜRKAK Akreditasyon sertifikasına almaya hak kazanmıştır.
 
AS KALİBRASYON Kaliteyi yaşantısının her alanına yayarak, onu sürekli geliştirmek, kendine, müşterilerine, çevreye saygılı olmak ve ortak çıkarları korumak için problem çözmekten ziyade önlemeye yönelik bir şekilde 15 yıl tecrübeli bir ekiple çalışmaktadır.
 
Firmamız 2014 yılı şubat ayında Bilim Sanayi ve Teknoloji Bakanlığından yetki alarak Adana'da  İLK  tartı aleti YETKİLİ MUAYENE SERVİSİ olmayı başarmıştır. 
 
Firmamız Kalibrasyon hizmetinin yanı sıra eğitim,ölçüm cihazı satışı ve danışmanlık hizmetleri de vermektedir.
 
 
 
MÜŞTERİ MEMNUNİYETİ POLİTİKAMIZ / 20.10.2012
 
 
AS KALİBRASYON ulusal pazarda güvenilir kalibrasyon firmalarından biri olmayı hedeflemiştir, bu hedefe ulaşabilmek için, her şikâyet sürekli iyileştirme için bir fırsattır anlayışı ile hizmet vermektedir.
En üst seviyede müşteri memnuniyeti ve sürekliliği sağlamanın tüm ekibimizin bilinç ve bilgi düzeyleri ile yakından ilişkili olduğunu bilmekte ve çalışanlarının katılımını sağlamaktadır. 

AS KALİBRASYON müşterilerinin öneri, istek ve şikâyetlerini müşteri odaklı bakış açısı ile adil ve tarafsız olarak, 17025 standardı ve yasal şartlara aykırı olmayacak şekilde ele almaktadır. 

Müşterilerinin memnuniyetsizlikleri ile ilgili bildirimlerini kayıt altına almakta ve tüm iletişim kanallarını açık bulundurmaktadır. Bu sayede geliştirilmesi gereken alanlarını özenle tespit ederek proseslerini sürekli, hızlı ve etkin bir şekilde iyileştirmektedir.

Name: The Executive Connection
Description:
The Executive Connection LLC is a company that is focused on establishing B2B communications at an executive level. 

In the past, successful executives were frequently ‘divorced from day-to-day activity’ while they were intimately involved with strategic decision-making. Often they were most engaged in changing and improving a company’s core business process.

Today as a result of downsizing and economic pressure executives are engaged in both strategic and day-to-day decisions. However, they are still surrounded by traditional ‘gate-keeping’ technology such as voice mail, e-mail and administrative interception designed to block direct communication. 

When do you need us?
 
Executive Connection can help when a client’s business requires contacting executives and starting a dialog that can involve:

What we do:
 
Step #1 – Identify and plan a target company contact strategy

Step #2 – Contact key executives at Target Company or Companies

Step #3 – Identify key decision makers and budget cycle at Target Companies

Step #4 – Present compelling Client Company ‘call to action’

Step #5 – Engage key Target and Client company executives in a dialog

Step # 6 – Measure, monitor and report on the sales cycle to the Client Company.

How to become an EC client company:
 
A/. Call 603.845.7479 to discuss requirements

B/. Meet with EC management team

C/. Review EC proposal and pricing
.
D/. Sign contract (6 month commitment)

E/. Benefit from new contacts, sales and revenue

Name: Branstone Farm
Description:
The Isle of Wight Council and a range of Island businesses and organisations has been involved in creating a new £13.6 million scheme including affordable housing, an outdoor education area, new green space, a rural business park area, and a new brewery and visitor centre for Goddard’s Brewery at Branstone Farm. 

Nature and sustainability are at the heart of this flagship regeneration scheme which the Isle of Wight Council and its partners hope will serve as an exemplar for future development on the Island.

Inspired by the Isle of Wight Biosphere declaration in 2019, a group of organisations including Vectis Housing Association, the council's regeneration team, the Isle of Wight Chamber of Commerce and other local partners have secured funding and planning consents to begin the creation of a new rural area where the Biosphere principles of live, work and play can come to life. 
With a focus on the Isle of Wight's Biosphere, about half of the farm site will become a new public green space which will be open to all, and include hedges, new woodland, ponds and an outdoor education area.

This will continue the tradition of education on the farm, which was established by the then Isle of Wight County Council as the Branstone Farm Studies Centre in 1973.

The Isle of Wight AONB Partnership has been leading on the Isle of Wight Biosphere, and will be one of the first organisations to be based in the new Branstone Farm project. 

Finance for the work has come from the partners and from national funds, with nearly £4 million coming from Homes England and the Solent LEP.

Name: The Adamjee Group
Description:
The Adamjee name has been a prominent and highly reputed  name amongst the business circles of the Indian subcontinent throughout the 20th century.

The House of Adamjee was founded in Burma (now Myanmar) by the illustrious Sir Adamjee Haji Dawood. Born in 1880 in Jetpur Town of Gujarat. Whilst still in his teens, he ventured out to Burma and started operating as an independent businessman. The first few years of his career were spent in rice, matches & jute trade. With his keen business sense and financial acumen, he met with early success.

By 1922, he had accumulated sufficient resources and a strong presence in the commodities markets, enabling him to setup his first Industrial venture - a match factory in Rangoon [now Yangon]. In 1927, he returned to India to establish a jute mill in Calcutta. The Adamjee Jute Mill Ltd. was the third jute mill to be setup by an Indian and the first Muslim public company. To capture this emerging niche, Adamjee alongwith Mr. G.D. Birla of Birla Jute, broke into this monopolistic trade controlled by the East India company.

The founding father of the Adamjee industrial group was not just a businessman, but also an avid educationist and philanthropist. Education of the youth, was a subject very close to his heart, thus he was responsible for financing and helping a number of educational institutions. In addition to that, he also established numerous educational institutions from his own resources.

In recognition for his services to his countrymen, the British government knighted him in 1938.

By the 1940's, Sir Adamjee, as he was then called, had become a prominent figure in the business circles of India and Burma. His recognition was acknowledged by Muhammad Ali Jinnah (Founder of Pakistan) who become a good friend and appointed him advisor to the freedom movement of the Muslims, which eventually led to the Creation of Pakistan.

2015 yılında, yer seçim çalışmalarının tamamlanması ile birlikte OSB Müdürlüğümüz 27/02/2015 tarihinde 133,5 hektar alan üzerinde kuruldu. 2016 yılında, genişleme çalışmaları başladı.  Sonrasında 2017 yılında, genişleme için yer seçim işlemi tamamlandı. 2018 yılında, genişleme ile birlikte Düzce-Gümüşova Organize Bölgemiz, 360,6 hektar büyüklüğe ulaştı. İmar planları ise aynı yıl içerisinde Bakanlıkça onaylandı. 2019 yılında ise imar planları ile birlikte altyapı planları onaylandı ve altyapı çalışmalarına başlandı.

2019 yılının ilk yarısında 360,6 hektar büyüklüğe ulaşan Bölgemizde, toplam sanayi parsel sayısı 98 adettir. Faaliyette veya inşaat halinde olan firma ise 32 adet sayısına ulaşmıştır.

Organize Sanayi Bölgemizde faaliyet gösteren firmalara; yağmur suyu, elektrik, içme suyu, kanalizasyon ve yol yapımı gibi çeşitli altyapı hatlarında; ayrıca dere ıslahı ve su arıtma tesisi gibi kurulumlar ile tam teşekküllü bir şekilde hizmet verilmektedir.

2019 yılında devam eden diğer çalışmalarımız ise, Organize Sanayi Bölgemizde bulunan vatandaşa ait parsellerin kamulaştırma işlemlerine başlanmış olup, bu işlemler Müdürlüğümüzün kendi öz kaynakları kullanılarak yapılmaktadır.

Son olarak, 2018 yılında onaylanan OSB imar planı ile birlikte imar uygulamalarına başlanmıştır. Organize Sanayi Bölgemiz, alan olarak 2 bölgeye ayrılmıştır. Her iki bölgede de 18. Madde uygulama çalışmalarına başlanmıştır.

Name: Office de la surveillance de l'accessibilité des produits et services
Description:
OSAPS' missions are defined by the Law of 8 March 2023 on accessibility requirements for products and services.
OSAPS ensures that products and services are accessible to all, by monitoring standards, supporting businesses and raising public awareness.
Monitoring the compliance of products and services
OSAPS verifies that products and services comply with accessibility standards.
Example: Ensuring that a bank website is accessible to visually impaired people with a screen reader.
Checking the CE marking and declarations of conformity
It checks whether products bear the CE marking and whether they comply with European accessibility criteria.
Example: A ticket machine must allow the use of headphones to give audio instructions to blind people.
Checking for exemptions from accessibility
It ensures that exceptions to accessibility rules are justified and not abused.
Example: A small business can apply for an exemption if adapting a service is too expensive.
Helping small businesses comply with the rules
OSAPS provides tools and advice to microenterprises to help them make their products and services accessible.
Example: Creating a guide to help a small business make its e-commerce site accessible to deaf people.
Informing and raising public awareness
It informs citizens and businesses about their rights and obligations regarding accessibility.
Example: Publishing explanatory videos on the adaptations needed to make a website accessible.
Collecting data to improve accessibility
It collects information on the needs of people with disabilities to improve services.
Example: Analysing how many online banking services are actually accessible to people with motor disabilities.
Transmit information to the competent authorities
It shares its analyses with other organisations to improve monitoring and compliance with standards.
Example: Informing the authorities if a telephone operator does not offer a service that is accessible to people with hearing impairments.

Name: SAKOM - Serbian-Azerbaijani Chamber of Commerce
Description:
The Serbian-Azerbaijani Chamber of Commerce (SAKOM) was established on May 31, 2010 by 5 founders and pursues the following aims:

 
	
– 	To represent, cooperate, support and protect economical, commercial and technical interests of its members,
– 	To support the development of trade and industrial activities of its members through the organization of production and technological cooperation and trade between Serbia and Azerbaijan,
– 	Development of measures for providing various information and documentation, industrial and commercial marketing, market research, etc.,
– 	Organization of consulting, commercial arbitration and conciliation between the members of the Chamber and between them and third parties,
– 	Organization by the competent authorities of trade fairs and specialized exhibitions, advertising and commercial activities,
– 	Publication and distribution of catalogs, newsletters, professional advices, brochures and other publications of technical, market and advertising in print and digital format,
– 	Establishing and developing relations with similar associations and employers’ organizations in Azerbaijan, through its membership, exchange of commercial information, or other forms of cooperation,
– 	Training and professional development of members of the Chamber and other business entities in accordance with their needs and interests, and depending on the requirements of the market in Serbia and in Azerbaijan,
– 	Organization of seminars, conferences, business forums, as well as other events of a similar nature,
– 	Careful monitoring of commercial, economic and financial laws and the laws on working conditions in Azerbaijan and Serbia in the commercial, economic and financial areas by educating their members.

Name: Grupo Neosol Investimentos S.A

Imbued with patriotism, is committed to help leverage the country's economy as a long term goal by investing in projects with small or large-scale economic impact. Neosol has a range of investments in sectors such as: health, hospitality, construction, oil, media and manufacturing.

A Neosol é uma empresa angolana que aposta no desenvolvimento de produtos e serviços locais. Estamos comprometidos em contribuir para alavancar a economia do país a curto e longo prazo, por meio de participações em investimentos lucrativos de pequena ou grande escala. Tencionamos ser mais um elo entre Angola, África e o mundo, distribuindo por equidade o nosso portfolio de investimento e impulsionando o empreendedorismo a nível local, sobretudo em fase de iniciação. O nosso objectivo é contribuir desta forma para a criação de empregos, enquanto catapultamos de forma igual a qualidade de vida dos angolanos e a diversificação da economia.

Name: Association of German Municipal Statisticians
Description: Der Verband Deutscher Städtestatistik (VDSt) ist ein eingetragener gemeinnütziger Verein. Er ist der Berufsverband für Städtestatistik und angewandte Stadtforschung in Deutschland. Zu den Zielen des Verbandes gehören die Förderung der Vernetzung zwischen seinen Mitgliedern sowie des Austauschs zwischen Städtestatistik, Wissenschaft, amtlicher Statistik sowie Stadtplanung und –entwicklung. Der VDSt ist rechtlicher Träger des KOSIS-Verbunds und Herausgeber der Zeitschrift Stadtforschung und Statistik. Ein Großteil der Aktivitäten im Netzwerk der Städtestatistik erfolgt  in den regionalen und fachlichen Arbeitsgemeinschaften.

Maritime

The Group via its chartering department has developed an extensive network for charterers and shipowners covering general cargoes to project transports and logistics

IT technology
We recognized the importance of IT technology from our start point and we always invested on latest hardware and software and when necessary developing our own software.  
We realized the necessary specialization in this sector and we further progressed with the formation of Kocaeli Burada dedicated in internet media and site development respectively.
Logistics and trade
Caspian Trans LLC.  was formed in 2001 and as its name implies is here to serve each and every need of transport in the Caspian Region and surrounding countries, whether this need calls for land, sea or air transport or a combination of all, in other words a multimodal door to door service.

Name: Maitland Metro
Description:
Maitland Metro is a R1,2 billion inner-city rejuvenation project that is transforming Cape Town’s gateway suburb through the delivery of significant new inclusionary housing and job-creating commercial opportunities.

Located at the gateway to the City of Cape Town’s Voortrekker Road development corridor, the project is designed to unlock the untapped potential of this strategically important area, just five kilometres from the centre of the CBD.

Construction has reached completion on the first project, and has just begun on the second, of at least seven new buildings, which will collectively deliver more than 50,000m² of mixed-use development bulk, and add at least 1,200 residential opportunities aimed at low to middle income households.

Description:
MombasaWorks is a coworking and learning space and community of independent professionals and entrepreneurs in Mombasa. 

We design work spaces and curate events to bring people together. We believe that the most powerful societal change often comes from unlikely alliances between people who have previously seen little need to work together; and that real and sustainable development will come from more collaboration.

We chose the name ‘MombasaWorks’ to serve as a small reflection of the diverse pockets of entrepreneurial energy in Mombasa - people making Mombasa work, as it were. As well as support the development of new and exciting initiatives improving the economy and the livelihoods therein.

Description:
We turn data into better business results!

Numerical Insights is a boutique consulting firm specializing in solving business challenges using data. We understand many of the business problems that companies face today because our team members have all been there. We also understand that a data-driven approach to investigating those problems is the best way to augment "gut instinct" and give you the best chance of problem resolution. Providing data access and visibility to your team members enables better decision making. This drives better business results.

Whether your challenges are in operations, manufacturing, inventory, product demand or human resources, Numerical Insights will help you clearly define your issues and work with you to implement the right analytical solution.

Siamo un gruppo di professionisti in zona Treviglio che ha deciso di condividere la propria esperienza e i propri spazi di lavoro con tutti.

Offriamo scrivanie, sala riunioni, tavolo di lavoro ed uno spazio condiviso in cui collaborare, crescere, sognare insieme.

Perchè proprio a Treviglio?
Perchè cercando anche noi un posto in coworking nella nostra zona non lo abbiamo trovato. Nel 2015 pensiamo che sia NECESSARIO uno spazio coworking nella nostra zona geografica tra Bergamo e Crema.

Chi siamo?
Siamo un gruppo di professionisti ed imprenditori che gestice il primo coworking a Treviglio, per aiutare tutti i professionisti (e non solo) con la nostra visione collaborativa.

A chi ci rivolgiamo?
A te che hai cercato in rete "coworking Treviglio" perchè sicuramente sei un freelance o un professionista che ha bisogno di una scrivania (anche solo per qualche ora a settimana) ma cerca anche nuove collaborazioni.

Name: Virtual Secretarial Services - Hilary Mitchley
Description:
I am a Virtual Assistant based in Gauteng on the East Rand.  I am a mature, easy and outgoing person.  I have always worked in the Administrative field, starting out as a Receptionist in my very first job and working my way up to a PA in my last work place.  I have 25+ years working experience.  I decided to take that leap of faith and start up my own VA business as I feel I have a lot more to offer as an individual contractor.

I have a broad spectrum of administrative skills, or what I call myself – “A Jill of all Trades”.  I have over the years gained experience in the property market, from dealing with clients to contractors to municipal organisations as well as tenants and rentals.

As a Girl Friday in a Consulting Engineering firm I also gained experience in Tender Documentation, Traffic Impact Analysis and working with various government departments.  One of the projects we were involved with was the Coega Harbour Development.

As a person of integrity, honesty and very down to earth my mission is to assist individual and small businesses with their everyday administration tasks and in so doing affording you the time to build up your business.
My vision is to work hand-in-hand with you the client by building a strong working relationship, getting to know your business and creating a behind the scenes structure suitable to your needs.

My motto is to be Virtually All You Need

There are overhead costs to consider when hiring a PA, for example finding and hiring the right person and having to pay a full time salary, setting them up in an office, maternity and or sick leave – the list is endless. 
As your VA none of the above is applicable.  I am, as you are, passionate about what I do and am willing and able to go that extra mile.  I have all the required tools at my disposal to assist you.

For a complete list of Services Offered / Pricing please feel free to send me a mail - hilary@virtual-secretary.co.za

Name: The Commons - An Uncommon Workplace
Description:
The Commons - An Uncommon Workplace is a coworking space in Deephaven, Minnesota.

The Commons brings independent workers together, with all the amenities of a fully operational office, but without the overhead. This revolutionary way of doing business is called "coworking" and today there are people all over the world that are thriving in this type of environment. Just because you work for yourself doesn't mean you have to work by yourself. Members may be doing completely different jobs in entirely different industries, however the unavoidable collision of ideas, perspectives, networking and energy greatly benefits everyone. That's something you just can't replicate at your home office or local coffee house. Yes, this is an uncommon workplace... and that's a good thing! The communities in the western suburbs are ready for this model of "going to work" and The Commons is thrilled to provide them with it.

The Commons offers individual and company memberships to meet any need. Highlights include secure, high-speed internet; high-tech conference rooms; free coffee/tea; and networking and marketing opportunities galore!

•	Project support – focused input to keep specific initiatives running smoothly on time and on budget

Whichever option you choose, we integrate seamlessly into your team – without being on your payroll. You only pay for the support you need, when you need it.

About us

Founded in 2016 by Jen Workman, Business Owl brings together legal know-how, project management skills and a passion for sustainability. Jen’s background as a Legal Executive and senior PA means she “gets” both the legal detail and the bigger business picture.

Business Owl has grown into a small, trusted team of associates who share Jen’s commitment to professionalism, trust and values-led working. Collectively, we bring specialist skills – ensuring our clients always feel supported, never overwhelmed.

Jen is an approved member of the Society of Virtual Assistants; Runner-up, Outstanding VA 2022, Virtual Assistant of the Year North East England 2021 and more recently accredited as Carbon Literate.

Somos una fuerza vital en el Ecosistema de Innovación regional. Colaboramos estrechamente con empresas e instituciones que lideran actividades clave en este ecosistema. Estamos comprometidos con la expansión y la aceleración de la innovación en nuestra comunidad.

Name: Organización Venezolana de Jóvenes para las Naciones Unidas
Description:
La Asociación Civil sin Fines de Lucro Organización Venezolana de Jóvenes para las Naciones Unidas (OVJNU) es una institución reconocida por el registro subalterno de San Cristóbal desde el año 2007, con el Registro de Información Fiscal J – 29497736-7, que trabaja en cooperación con distintos socios institucionales comunidad de la sociedad civil organizada, en acuerdo de Cooperación General. Basándose en el Plan Nacional Simón Bolívar 2007 – 2013.

La OVJNU promueve los objetivos del milenio de las Naciones Unidas y de la Cumbre de las Américas, que buscan la creación de oportunidades de empleo y de la confrontación de la pobreza a través de actividades que desarrollen las habilidades de liderazgo y emprendimiento en la juventud.

El talento de los y las jóvenes de Venezuela determina el potencial para el futuro crecimiento económico y Desarrollo Social del país. Los jóvenes creativos e ingeniosos ofrecen una mejor perspectiva para la construcción de un país ideal y de equidad social que se desea lograr. Pero la realidad demuestra que solamente capacitando e invirtiendo en el presente se puede edificar el mañana.

Para el crecimiento de lo sustentable y sostenible en la juventud, la OVJNU apoya programas innovadores, que desembocan en el enfoque integral y emprendedor de crear nuevas oportunidades y servicios sociales para las Organizaciones Juveniles, Consejos Comunales, Gremios Juveniles, y grupos de jóvenes en condición de vulnerabilidad (Mujeres, Afrodescendientes, Etnias, Indígenas, LGBTI, Discapacitados, Personas con Enfermedades Infecto Contagiosas).

La meta de la OVJNU es incrementar el espíritu emprendedor, las habilidades interpersonales, empresariales de la juventud de la región, y así beneficiar a todas las Organizaciones, Instituciones y Empresas donde los jóvenes hacen vida en la República Bolivariana de Venezuela.

Name: Meisje van het Zuiden
Description:
Wil je tijd creëren die jou in staat stelt om werkzaamheden uit te voeren die tot een beter rendement leiden? Wil je je focus herpakken en andere werkzaamheden uitbesteden? Heb je een gebrek aan tijd, resources of specialistische kennis? Als ondernemer moet je overal verstand van hebben.

Herkenbaar? Toch hoeft dat voor jou niet zo te zijn. Focus je op de dingen waar jij goed in bent en die het meest van belang zijn. Ik help je met de rest van je commerciële werkzaamheden. 

WAAR KAN IK JOU BIJ HELPEN
Hoe zou het voor je zijn als je uren terugwint? Als Commercieel Virtual Assistant neem ik commerciële taken uit handen. Dat levert jou overzicht en structuur, tijd en ruimte voor focus en tijdswinst. Minder to-do’s en minder stress. Meer werkplezier, financieel voordeel en meer body voor je bedrijf. Dat geeft rust en ruimte in je hoofd. Én in je agenda. 

Fijn, want voortaan kun jij je bezighouden met je klanten, de groei van je bedrijf en andere zaken die jij belangrijk vindt. En dat is misschien wel de grootste winst; je stelt jezelf in staat het beste uit jezelf te halen! 

WAT HEB IK IN HUIS
Ik ben een creatieve en oplossingsgerichte verbinder. Ik help graag met de stip op de horizon, maar ben ook one of the guys als sparringpartner. Als ondersteuner ben ik een echte El Positivo met een besmettelijk enthousiasme. 

WHY
Ik geloof dat iedereen zijn eigen krachten heeft en dat je op je best bent als je jezelf in staat stelt die krachten volledig te benutten. Doen wat je ligt en leuk vindt. Als verbinder geloof ik dat samenwerken en een positieve mindset het werken én leven leuker maakt. Ik werk graag voor opdrachtgevers die weten dat 1 en 1 meer is dan 2. Die zich willen omgeven met gepassioneerde, energieke mensen om te kunnen groeien en excelleren.

MATCHEN WIJ?

Name: Imperial Standard Holdings (Private Family Office)
Description:
Mr. N. Hayden Winther is a Managing Partner of a Copenhagen-based and privately owned Family Office in operation since its September, 2016, Q3, inception. Mr Hayden Winther previously had over 5 years experience of working with large international clients in the realms of bespoke consumer behavioural research and data analytics for executive-level business optimisation. Drawing on both contacts and business experiences made, incl. nearly 10 years of managing private trading & investment accounts, the opportunity came to establish a dedicated Family Office in 2016.

One investment fund has mainly been active in the precious metals sector (physical bullion in AU/AG) but the Office also oversees a growing diversified portfolio of alternative investments (tangible) / base metals as well as other soft/hard commodities, Real Estate, and investment-grade collectables. We are currently looking at Real Estate projects all over South East Asia (Thailand, the Philippines, Vietnam), and are operating mainly in the commercial real estate market sector. Having lived in Luxembourg for many years, the Family enjoys strong ties to the country and it is planned that we expand investment operations to Luxembourg in the coming decades ahead.

Since 2017, we operate an active derivatives strategy with a positive expectation. All research - technical and fundamental - as well as General Accounting, Estate Planning, Law and Tax Advisory is mostly done in-house, but also with the help of our trusted partners both at home and abroad.

The central consolidated fund aims to beat local real inflation as well as compete with the top ranking in the Barclays' Hedge Fund Index in terms of performance. The active fund is long/short / multi-strategy and striving for a near global reach. In our investment philosophy, we focus strongly on social and environmental sustainability as a priority in all of our investments.

Our service-orientated approach has ensured that we have remained at the forefront of our industry.

We are registered with the Estate Agency Affairs Board as the regulatory body for the industry.  Our brokers also complete our own in-house Business Broking Training.  With our brokers stemming from various backgrounds and experience, the collective result is a business brokerage group with a vast amount of knowledge that provides excellent services to our clients.

Aldes uses a single database for both sellers and buyers. This means that the prospective buyer needs only to talk to one broker to find the perfect business opportunity. Whether you’re interested in buying or selling a business, Aldes will guide you through the entire process with expertise and professionalism.

Name: Business Crescent for Trading Services
Description:
BUSINESS CRESCENT FOR TRADING SERVICES

The Company holds the cherished motto of Vision 2030 of the Government of Saudi Arabia for diversification of industry and business to sustain growth and development. Our venture is committed to being part and parcel in the noble cause of nation building as envisioned by the Government.

IMPORT SCENARIO

Recently there was a spurt in the import of food and beverage products to Saudi Arabia due to the Food Security Policy of the Government. The Kingdom imports every year approximately 80% of the needs for food and beverage. Entry of new players in both wholesale and retail markets, expansion of existing entrepreneurs, attractive marketing policies, competitive prices, an introduction of healthy and exotic food and beverage are all contributing factors for growth. The current value of total import is roughly US$24 Billion, which is expected to touch US$ 35 Billion by the end of the year 2020 as per market research and analysis.

*Research and Markets


ADVANTAGE SAUDI ARABIA

The geographic and demographic conditions of the Kingdom give tremendous scope for Food and Beverage Business. Saudi Arabia is blessed with a population of around 60% youth. The changing trend of lifestyle, food habit of youth, health and hygiene, taste, dietary nutrition, purchasing power, employment of tempting marketing techniques, attractive prices, vantage locations, professional care and honesty in business are some of the ingredients spur the rapid growth. Saudi Arabia is projected to be the top regional performer over the next five years for the Snack and Confectionery, which is expected to grow at an annual rate of 6.5%.

*Source: bmiresearch

Description:

The rugged coastlines and vast rural expanses means when things go wrong, these regions are vulnerable and isolated.  The speed and maneuverability characteristics of a rescue helicopter offer unique advantages over conventional land ambulances and in a life and death situation, the rescue helicopter service may be a patient’s only chance for survival.

Our rescue crews make a real different in the lives of our communities.  They can provide advanced care to patients much faster.  In remote and hard to reach areas, the rescue helicopter can mean the difference between life and death.

Name: LiveLink Resource
Description:
We're specialist virtual assistants and remote receptionists.  We love working with private health care clinics like yours and nothing makes us happier than when we see that your diary is full, your clinic is growing, and you are happy.  Best of all, when the patient is surprised that we're not actually based at the clinic.

We are a small team which means we are very approachable and more hands-on than the larger, more familiar call centres.  

Much is spoken about having a 'can do' attitude.  Our team truly does.  Our aim is always to say yes.  It's your clinic and we want to work with you.  We may make some suggestions that from our experience, will help you - we certainly don't tend to make things easier for ourselves.

Whatever your system (or if you have no system), we will probably have used it before.  If you don't have a system currently, we can help you implement the right system for you and your clinic.  We can set it up for you too.
The most popular systems that we use are Jane Clinic Management, Cliniko, TM3, PPS, Practice Pal, Write Upp, Pabau, Clinic Office and more.

If you're setting up and need help, or if you're already established, call us on 01603 513111 for a chat and we can take things from there.

عن سمو
شركة سمو العالمية المتميزة المحدودة هي كيان يضم مجموعة من الشركات والمؤسسات والمكاتب داخل المملكة العربية السعودية وخارجها في الدول العربية والإسلامية . حيث تهدف الشركة إلى تقديم كل ماهو جديد في مختلف مجالاتها للتفرد في القمة دائما، ويتشارك الجميع في مزوالة أعمال الشركة بطريقة تعتمد على مبدأ التعاون والإحترافية ، ويتبنى الجميع المسؤولية الإجتماعية للشركة وإلتزامها الدؤوب نحو النجاح والإبداع وتحقيق الأهداف .

مهامنا
تمتلك شركة سمو العالمية المتميزة المحدودة كوادر محترفة عالية الكفاءة تهدف إلى إنجاز جميع مهام الشركة بدقة وإتقان وبسرعة عالية لتلبي إحتياجات السوق وإرضاء العملاء الذين يبحثون عن الجودة والتميز في نوعية المنتجات والخدمات على حد سواء. حيث تكمن مهام الشركة في تقديم خدماتها المتنوعة في مختلف المجالات بشكل متميز ومتفرد بها.
الخدمات التسويقية
خدمات التغذية
خدمات النقل
الخدمات اللوجستية
خدمات رجال الأعمال
إدارة الفنادق
تسويق الفنادق
إدارة الشركات السياحية
إدارة الشركات التجارية



إنجازاتنا
استطاعت شركة سمو العالمية المتميزة المحدودة أن ترسخ لنفسها مكانة رائدة في السوق ضمن القطاع التسويقي والإداري والتجاري والسياحي والفندقي في المملكة العربية السعودية وفي الدول العربية والإسلامية، واليوم تمثل شركة سمو العالمية المتميزة المحدودة العديد من الشركات في هذه القطاعات. يقع مقر الشركة الرئيسي في العاصمة المقدسة واستطاعت أن تنتشر بفروعها في كل من المملكة العربية السعودية - مصر - الأردن - الجزائر - تركيا - وإندونيسيا ، حيث تنطلق من هذه الأماكن لخدمة جميع عملائها الأعزاء.

Name: Cambridge University Malaysia Society (CUMaS)
Description:
It is a non-profit organization founded in 1994 dedicated to the support of Malaysian undergraduates and post-graduates at the University of Cambridge. CUMaS provides a social platform for members to interact and participate in various activities and events which are tailored for the welfare of its members and to promote Malaysian culture in general. It also serves as a platform to unite Malaysians who are scattered over the many colleges of the university. CUMaS provides a place where members are free to express themselves in a familiar setting whilst in a foreign country.

Our annual flagship events include a Fresher’s Banquet in Malaysia for would be freshers to get acquainted with existing members; a Malaysian Food Feast mid-term for when we miss our extraordinary matchless Malaysian cuisine while overseas; a Malaysian Cultural Night to show-off our rich culture while drawing members closer together; and a summer Garden Party to celebrate those who have successfully finished their time at Cambridge and also just to bring out that post-exam festive cheer. But this is only the tip of the iceberg to a whole host of other events we have and numerous formal dinners, cookouts, sports and just plain having fun and hanging out together.

CUMaS is run by a dedicated student committee, and funded by generous sponsors. We are always open to any feedback, so do give us a shout if you have any questions or comments!

Description:
LaScott Virtutech Solutions, under LS Virtual Consulting LLC was found in May 2016 and officially launched on February 26, 2018 by LaToya Scott, a happily married mom to a wonderful family. She has many years of design, administrative, and technical support experience since 2002. She went to school from 2000-2002 for Graphic Design and Computer Applications. In 2004, she started doing various tasks such as creating event calendars, banners, event programs, marketing brochures, managing church databases, and other tasks for my brother's church as a church secretary. 
LaToya has always had a thing for blending administrative work with a creative flair, a talent she first discovered while helping her family with business consulting and web design. Grateful for this unique gift, she decided to embrace it fully. In 2006, she took on a role as a full-time Office Assistant for an innovative magnetic bookmark company, where her journey truly began. By 2008, she stepped into the world of freelancing as a Virtual Assistant, working from the comfort of her home. Diving into office management, design, tech, and admin tasks ignited a passion that she couldn’t ignore! Recognizing her potential, LaToya felt it was time to evolve from her administrative roots into the tech realm. Just a few months later, she successfully transitioned to offering services in system setups with the power of AI, email marketing automation, website migration, and more. LaToya's journey is a testament to following your passions and continuously embracing new opportunities for growth!
She’s dedicated to empowering busy, overwhelmed female coaches and Online Business Managers, setting up their HubSpot CRM, and ClickUp systems, managing their email marketing campaigns, migrating and refreshing their sites, and other tasks. By simplifying, automating, streamlining and managing their backend operation, she helps them reclaim precious time, allowing them to focus on what they love most—growing their business!

Name: Mastermind Nxt Level
Description:
Hi! Wij zijn Indra, Eveline, Debbie en Anouk. In 2020 begonnen we onze eigen Mastermind groep: Mastermind Nxt Level. Maar wie zijn wij nou eigenlijk?

 Indra Kusters: Een Belzje Madame, die anderen weet te prikkelen om zichzelf te laten zien, online. Initiatiefneemster van deze Mastermind. 

 Eveline van Vliet: De Creatieve Merkmaker, gaat tot ‘t gaatje om jouw karakter vorm te geven in alles waar jij mee communiceert. 

 Debbie van Cleef: de Avontuurlijke Zwedofiel, bommetje vol kennis over de technische kant van online ondernemen. 

 Anouk Sonnemans: een Nuchtere Balanstrut, die op ‘t irritante af rake vragen stelt over jezelf op nummer 1 zetten. 

 Wat is een Mastermind nou precies? 
Het is simpel: een groep gelijkgestemde ondernemers die regelmatig samenkomt om te sparren, ideeën te delen, elkaar te steunen en aan te moedigen. Een beetje alsof je je eigen collega’s kiest, zonder dat ze per se in dezelfde branche zitten (bij ons doet ook iedereen wat anders, juist dát werkt.). Alles mag op tafel komen: successen én struggles. Voor ons was dit dé game changer. Je hebt altijd ‘partners in crime’ om op terug te vallen, die je uitdagen en je naar een hoger level tillen. Samen groeien we echt next level als ondernemers! 

 Samen ondernemen, samen groeien.
Vier vrouwen, vier verhalen, maar één missie: elkaar steunen en motiveren als ondernemers! We zijn allemaal zzp’ers en weten hoe fijn het is om mensen om je heen te hebben die je scherp houden en aanmoedigen. Bij Mastermind Nxt Level inspireren we elkaar om onze dromen na te jagen, doelen te halen en successen groots te vieren! Dat doen we met een flinke dosis humor en plezier, want hé, ondernemen mag ook leuk zijn!  Hier op deze pagina nemen we je mee in onze avonturen als Mastermind matties.

Name: Gemeinde Kaiseraugst
Description:
Rund 5'600 Einwohnerinnen und Einwohner tragen tagtäglich zu einem lebenswerten Kaiseraugst bei. Gute öV-Verbindungen, Einkaufs- und Freizeitmöglichkeiten sowie die Nähe zur Stadt Basel zeichnen Kaiseraugst als attraktive Wohn- und Arbeitsgemeinde aus. Kaiseraugst ist lebenswert dank dem Engagement der Bevölkerung.  
Kaiseraugst wächst: so entsteht in den nächsten rund fünf Jahren Wohnraum für rund 600 Menschen. Die Gemeinde entwickelt gemeinsam mit der Bevölkerung ideale Lebensräume, so dass der Mensch sich im urbanen Raum wohlfühlen kann. Begegnungsorte und Grünräume tragen zu einem nachhaltigen Klima bei.

Die Gemeindeverwaltung
Die Gemeindeverwaltung unterstützt die Bevölkerung bei ihren Anliegen und kommuniziert auf vielfältige Art und Weise. Unsere Dienstleistungen sind aber nur so gut wie unsere Mitarbeitenden. Darum legen wir Wert auf eine faire und verantwortungsvolle Personalpolitik. Nebst einem marktgerechten Lohnsystem und vorteilhaften Sozialleistungen bilden sich unsere Mitarbeitenden regelmässig weiter. Teamgeist ist uns wichtig. Ausgewogene Anstellungsbedingungen, inklusive der Möglichkeit je nach Aufgabe und Funktion Home-Office zu machen, ermöglichen ein effizientes Arbeiten.
Die Gemeinde Kaiseraugst beschäftig in den Bereichen Verwaltung und kommunale Betriebe rund 65 Mitarbeitende. Zudem bieten wir Ausbildungsplätze für Kaufmann/-frau (KV) EFZ Profil E oder bei Eignung M, Fachmann/-frau Betriebsunterhalt EFZ – Werkhof und Fachmann/-frau Betriebsunterhalt EFZ - Hausdienst.
Unser vollständiges Stellenangebot finden Sie unter: https://www.kaiseraugst.ch/offenestellen.

Name: Take Up The Slack
Description:
I work with a range of clients as a VA to save them time, to let them focus on other areas of their businesses, and to allow them the freedom to do more of what they love.

Although I am based in Leyland, in the North West, I work with businesses throughout the UK.

If you’re a business owner in need of that freedom, here are some of the things I can do for you;

Checking, responding to, and filing emails
Arranging meetings, calendar shuffling, and sending those all-important reminders
Data entry and checking
Client and supplier communication
Client onboarding
Organising your cloud-based files, folders, and documents, so you can always find them when you need them
Proofreading, standardising, and branding up your documents.

What you won’t get is a “yes woman”.


If I think we could do things differently I’ll always suggest it. But, if you don’t personally enjoy challenges toward “but we’ve always done it like that”, I’m probably not the VA for you.

So, if you’re feeling aggrieved with your admin, exasperated with your emails, or patchy with your productivity and you want to change all that, let’s grab 15 minutes over a video call to look into the many ways I can improve your predicament, support you with your challenges, and get your business running as smoothly as possible.

Name: Federación de Estudiantes de la PUCP - FEPUC
Description:
La Federación de Estudiantes de la Pontificia Universidad Católica del Perú - FEPUC es un espacio que existe con un doble propósito. 

El primero es la unión de los estudiantes para plasmar de manera organizada la posición de los estudinates de la PUCP respecto de temas que sean de su interés. 

El segundo propósito es el trabajo en pro de los estudiantes canalizado a través de proyectos que busquen mejorar la calidad de vida de los estudiantes. 

Todos los estudiantes de la PUCP forman automáticamente parte de la FEPUC -salvo que pierdan su calidad de federados-, por lo que es vital para todo alumno estar informado de la marcha de esta institución. 

A la FEPUC la representa una Mesa Directiva conformada por un Presidente, un Vice-presidente y 5 secretarías. 

La Mesa Directiva se elige anualmente en elecciones generales cada mes de noviembre. 

Finalmente, como un apoyo permanente de las secretarías se encuentran también las coordinaciones, que no son parte de la Mesa Directiva pero sí del equipo de trabajo. Los coordinadores son en total 6 y son elegidos por sus respectivos secretarios según lo establece el Estatuto FEPUC.

Name: Virtual Aide & CO
Description:
Hi there, my name is Delphine.

After studying Psychology in France, I decided to cross the channel and moved to the UK to find and know myself away from my family and friends.

I always wondered about my purpose in life, why am I here, what legacy I want to leave, and what is alive inside of me.

Just before turning 40, I had to stay at home due to an injury and spent most of this time reflecting. I shifted my mindset, beliefs, and priorities. I no longer wanted to work for a “boss”, who was suppressing my skills, my intentions, my purpose…my being! I wanted to lead my own personal and professional life and decided to start my own VA business called Virtual Aide & Co.

I have been and still am very lucky and blessed to work with AMAZING, CARING, LOVING, and INSPIRATIONAL individuals!!

I do not work for them but with them. We COnnect, COllaborate, CO-create, and CO-regulate.

I help coaches to implement the best solution and tools for their business, to simplify the way they do things so they can spend their time doing what they love and what they are meant to be doing.

I save YOU time and make YOUR life easier!

My motto is: “Let’s work SMARTER and not harder!”

My skills:

Social Media & Content Management
Digital Marketing
Web Design
Workshops and Webinars Coordination
Business Management

A few years ago, I was introduced to TRE and it changed my life!
I finally found my purpose: sharing this powerful tool with as many people as possible.

I also realised that if I had been introduced to TRE at a younger age, I would have managed better with stress, anxiety, sleeping difficulties, and PTSD. I, therefore, decided to teach this natural and organic mechanism to children and especially those who are suffering from ADD, ADHD, children of divorced parents, and those who experienced or are being bullied.

Name: National Agency of Ukraine for finding, tracing and management of assets derived from corruption and other crimes (abbr. - Asset Recovery and Management Agency or ARMA)
Description:
National Agency is part of Executive, newly established state body, which on behalf of the Government the only one authorized to lay down the rules in asset recovery and asset management, create and implement a state policy in the sphere of tracing, finding and management of assets, including regulatory, analytical and methodological documents.
Functions
	Tracing, finding of assets that are subject to seizure in criminal proceedings.
	Management of assets seized in criminal proceedings, including: 
•	transferring into management under contract, 
•	assets disposal 
•	taking other measures endorsed by a special law in order to preserve or maintain economic value of the assets.
	Drafting proposals for formulation and implementation of the state policy in the sphere of tracing, finding and management of assets.
	Development and administration of the Unified State Register of Assets seized in criminal proceedings.
	Presentation of interests of Ukraine at foreign jurisdiction in cases related to return to Ukraine of assets  derived from corruption and other crimes

Name: FICCI-ILIA
Description:
FICCI-Indian Language Internet Alliance (FICCI-ILIA) is a non-government and not-for-profit organisation that works towards development of local language content for Internet in India. 

With improved connectivity and growing proliferation of smartphones in the country, India is expected to have over 650 million Indians connected to the Internet by 2020. There is an urgent need to make the internet content more useful for Indians, many of whom do not speak English. As FICCI-ILIA we aim to work with stakeholders across government, publishers and technology companies, to achieve the shared vision of furthering Indic internet. 

Our immediate mandate is to: 
● Build capacities of Indic publishing ecosystem
● Work towards establishing standards across industry for input and discoverability
● Create a framework to support innovations in Indic ecosystem
● Build awareness about the benefits of incorporating local languages content on Internet.

Name: theGeniusBox
Description:
We’re theGeniusBox : THE facilitation business.

We design and deliver creative workshops that get people in business solving problems brilliantly.

We do this in two ways:

1.	We teach your people to facilitate creative workshops for you
2.	We facilitate the creative process by running projects with you.

1.	TEACH
We have a creative process we can teach module by module or in bigger blocks that ladder up to a comprehensive ‘bootcamp’ lasting a week.  We price each module as a ‘product’. Expect to invest in a Premium fee.

2.	FACILITATE
We facilitate projects using the same creative process.  The minimum commission is a SCOPING phase – and that’s common to all projects we deliver regardless of ambition.  We have a ‘parts’ and ‘labour’ pricing for projects. 

What we do isn’t easy and it’s significantly harder to undo poorly designed interventions, so our approach isn’t academic theory instead, it’s borne from thousands of creative sessions we’ve ran globally across banking, pharma, FMCG and technology sectors.

Elegant solutions arise when your people are shepherded through an inspiring process by people for whom creative facilitation is a way of life. That’s what we do.

Our style is a rich mixture of social science, design thinking and hands on practical project experience.
We specialise in executive vision and strategy, project facilitation and training people to think more innovatively.

www.thegeniusbox.com
